55|f35525|    private func closeTab(_ tab: Tab) {
56|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
57|dc033d|            tabs.remove(at: index)
58|adc83b|
59|c6ba74|            // If we closed the active tab, activate another one
60|7fb881|            if activeTabId == tab.id {
61|fce7de|                if tabs.isEmpty {
62|8cf647|                    activeTabId = nil
63|fdd0e2|                } else {
64|d77f53|                    // Try to activate the tab to the right, or the last one if we closed the last one
65|51dd50|                    let newIndex = min(index, tabs.count - 1)
66|1dc7de|                    activeTabId = tabs[newIndex].id
67|4e2d32|                }
68|a7dc16|            }
69|5f3077|        }
70|27e597|    }
71|adc83b|
72|2c4bc2|    private func activateTab(_ tab: Tab) {
73|4370c7|        activeTabId = tab.id
74|27e597|    }
75|adc83b|
76|0ee0ae|    private func togglePin(_ tab: Tab) {
77|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
78|68edaf|            tabs[index].isPinned.toggle()
79|44e8fd|            tabs[index].isPreview = false
80|5f3077|        }
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|a18b96|    private func closeOthers(except tab: Tab) {
84|bb9a07|        tabs = tabs.filter { $0.id == tab.id || $0.isPinned }
85|695c78|        if activeTabId != tab.id {
86|2f7846|            activeTabId = tab.id
87|5f3077|        }
88|27e597|    }
89|adc83b|
90|fa8b74|    private func closeTabsToRight(of tab: Tab) {
91|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
92|729830|            // Keep tabs up to index, plus pinned tabs that might be to the right (though pinned tabs should be on left)
93|9966a5|            let tabsToKeep = tabs.prefix(through: index)
94|74e089|            let remainingTabs = tabs.suffix(from: index + 1).filter { $0.isPinned }
95|7549b0|            tabs = Array(tabsToKeep) + Array(remainingTabs)
96|5f3077|        }
97|27e597|    }

188|6b7af0|struct TabDropDelegate: DropDelegate {
189|b60411|    let item: Tab
190|703487|    @Binding var tabs: [Tab]
191|3fcf36|    @Binding var draggedItem: Tab?
192|b4687f|    
193|00181c|    func performDrop(info: DropInfo) -> Bool {
194|483695|        draggedItem = nil
195|4add8d|        return true
196|27e597|    }
197|b4687f|    
198|d60902|    func dropEntered(info: DropInfo) {
199|1bfbb6|        guard let draggedItem = draggedItem,
200|002bc1|              draggedItem.id != item.id,
201|08a456|              let fromIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == draggedItem.id }),
202|4e0f6c|              let toIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == item.id }) else { return }
203|d6ed84|        
204|408502|        withAnimation {
205|97fe34|            tabs.move(fromOffsets: IndexSet(integer: fromIndex), toOffset: toIndex > fromIndex ? toIndex + 1 : toIndex)
206|5f3077|        }
207|27e597|    }

225|8136c0|// MARK: - Draggable To New Window Modifier
226|adc83b|
227|cbdbb5|extension View {
228|87ac85|    func draggableToNewWindow(tab: Tab, onDrag: @escaping () -> NSItemProvider) -> some View {
229|576cdd|        #if os(iOS) || os(visionOS)
230|35716a|        return self.onDrag {
231|112f72|            // Create a provider that supports both tab reordering and window creation
232|97cc72|            let provider = onDrag()
233|3070d1|            
234|344f40|            // Register additional data for window creation on iPadOS
235|16670b|            if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(tab) {
236|455993|                provider.registerDataRepresentation(forTypeIdentifier: "com.vscodeipados.tab", visibility: .all) { completion in
237|b13ba7|                    completion(data, nil)
238|024b84|                    return nil
239|4e2d32|                }
240|a7dc16|            }
241|3070d1|            
242|33162e|            return provider
243|5f3077|        }
244|f6012e|        #else
245|8092f8|        return self.onDrag(onDrag)
246|6a3e13|        #endif
247|27e597|    }
248|b31277|}

53|411ba5|class RecentCommandsManager: ObservableObject {
54|d3834f|    @Published var recentCommands: [String] = []
55|4d914d|    private let maxRecent = 5
56|f67f90|    private let storageKey = "recentCommands"
57|b4687f|    
58|359b1b|    init() {
59|880bd6|        loadRecent()
60|27e597|    }
61|b4687f|    
62|230e29|    func addRecent(_ commandName: String) {
63|fe3482|        recentCommands.removeAll { $0 == commandName }
64|d6c233|        recentCommands.insert(commandName, at: 0)
65|8a5223|        if recentCommands.count > maxRecent {
66|578c6f|            recentCommands = Array(recentCommands.prefix(maxRecent))
67|5f3077|        }
68|a8ef93|        saveRecent()
69|27e597|    }
70|b4687f|    
71|998823|    private func loadRecent() {
72|7e091c|        if let saved = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: storageKey) {
73|cbe995|            recentCommands = saved
74|5f3077|        }
75|27e597|    }
76|b4687f|    
77|956c57|    private func saveRecent() {
78|98ac56|        UserDefaults.standard.set(recentCommands, forKey: storageKey)
79|27e597|    }

82|af0ecd|// MARK: - Fuzzy Search
83|adc83b|
84|9fce4f|struct FuzzyMatcher {
85|ae76bd|    static func score(query: String, target: String) -> Int? {
86|34cef6|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return 1000 }
87|d6ed84|        
88|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
89|18ea38|        let targetLower = target.lowercased()
90|d6ed84|        
91|c33784|        // Exact match gets highest score
92|bea5c7|        if targetLower == queryLower { return 10000 }
93|d6ed84|        
94|bffced|        // Contains full query
95|8cd767|        if targetLower.contains(queryLower) {
96|1063f5|            // Bonus for starting with query
97|d0876a|            if targetLower.hasPrefix(queryLower) {
98|2e989d|                return 5000 + (1000 - target.count)
99|a7dc16|            }
100|c9ab09|            return 3000 + (1000 - target.count)
101|5f3077|        }
102|d6ed84|        
103|83786c|        // Fuzzy character matching
104|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
105|7f11d4|        var targetIndex = targetLower.startIndex
106|268b95|        var score = 0
107|5dc28e|        var consecutiveBonus = 0
108|1d718f|        var lastMatchIndex: String.Index? = nil
109|d6ed84|        
110|308cfe|        while queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && targetIndex < targetLower.endIndex {
111|c13bec|            if queryLower[queryIndex] == targetLower[targetIndex] {
112|145bbf|                score += 100 + consecutiveBonus
113|216278|                
114|d6ef12|                // Bonus for consecutive matches
115|9f661a|                if let lastIdx = lastMatchIndex,
116|83874f|                   targetLower.index(after: lastIdx) == targetIndex {
117|9c7108|                    consecutiveBonus += 50
118|fdd0e2|                } else {
119|51d442|                    consecutiveBonus = 0
120|4e2d32|                }
121|216278|                
122|c7d2d9|                // Bonus for matching at word boundaries
123|3c44b0|                if targetIndex == targetLower.startIndex ||
124|75c499|                   !targetLower[targetLower.index(before: targetIndex)].isLetter {
125|78d351|                    score += 75
126|4e2d32|                }
127|216278|                
128|b7133b|                lastMatchIndex = targetIndex
129|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
130|a7dc16|            }
131|916731|            targetIndex = targetLower.index(after: targetIndex)
132|5f3077|        }
133|d6ed84|        
134|989e1f|        // All query characters must be found
135|0160b5|        guard queryIndex == queryLower.endIndex else { return nil }
136|d6ed84|        
137|c07521|        return score
138|27e597|    }
139|b4687f|    
140|ace7c9|    static func highlight(query: String, in text: String) -> [(String, Bool)] {
141|81813c|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return [(text, false)] }
142|d6ed84|        
143|b880d0|        var result: [(String, Bool)] = []
144|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
145|a14f23|        let textLower = text.lowercased()
146|d6ed84|        
147|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
148|a07ffc|        var currentSegment = ""
149|d3c359|        var isMatch = false
150|d6ed84|        
151|4083e9|        for (i, char) in text.enumerated() {
152|212094|            let textIndex = textLower.index(textLower.startIndex, offsetBy: i)
153|3070d1|            
154|3f747d|            if queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && 
155|f8248a|               textLower[textIndex] == queryLower[queryIndex] {
156|eecabe|                if !isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
157|78ec19|                    result.append((currentSegment, false))
158|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
159|4e2d32|                }
160|a00101|                isMatch = true
161|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
162|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
163|f5a6eb|            } else {
164|fbac5d|                if isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
165|15ba04|                    result.append((currentSegment, true))
166|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
167|4e2d32|                }
168|d1cc2f|                isMatch = false
169|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|5d8d48|        if !currentSegment.isEmpty {
174|eb146d|            result.append((currentSegment, isMatch))
175|5f3077|        }
176|d6ed84|        
177|67ed82|        return result
178|27e597|    }
179|b31277|}

403|b4687f|    
404|27623f|    private var filteredCommands: [Command] {
405|93055c|        if searchText.isEmpty {
406|c6a1fd|            // Show recent commands first, then all commands
407|df481a|            let recentNames = Set(recentManager.recentCommands)
408|28414c|            let recent = allCommands.filter { recentNames.contains($0.name) }
409|af65a0|                .sorted { a, b in
410|d73b49|                    let aIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: a.name) ?? Int.max
411|3d02c9|                    let bIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: b.name) ?? Int.max
412|0688f6|                    return aIdx < bIdx
413|4e2d32|                }
414|c4a108|            let others = allCommands.filter { !recentNames.contains($0.name) }
415|4f9548|            return recent + others
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|babd96|        return allCommands
419|519b5d|            .compactMap { cmd -> (Command, Int)? in
420|8c516a|                guard let score = FuzzyMatcher.score(query: searchText, target: cmd.name) else {
421|024b84|                    return nil
422|4e2d32|                }
423|46f56b|                return (cmd, score)
424|a7dc16|            }
425|4a2f11|            .sorted { $0.1 > $1.1 }
426|ffcc79|            .map { $0.0 }
427|27e597|    }
428|b4687f|    
429|debdc2|    private func dismiss() {
430|02562c|        editorCore.showCommandPalette = false
431|27e597|    }
432|b4687f|    
433|3b5568|    private func executeCommand(_ command: Command) {
434|0a37ea|        recentManager.addRecent(command.name)
435|a6f1ca|        command.action()
436|27e597|    }

560|adc83b|
561|f531c6|struct CommandRowView: View {
562|19696f|    let command: Command
563|470a2c|    let searchQuery: String
564|055123|    let isSelected: Bool
565|a41eed|    let isRecent: Bool
566|b4687f|    
567|504e43|    var body: some View {
568|8c28e9|        HStack(spacing: 12) {
569|bf7cbb|            // Category icon
570|b321df|            Image(systemName: command.icon)
571|a57c19|                .font(.system(size: 14))
572|afdbe6|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white : .accentColor)
573|fc6377|                .frame(width: 24)
574|3070d1|            
575|1fc88c|            // Command name with highlighting
576|085bc5|            highlightedName
577|3070d1|            
578|1e6289|            Spacer()
579|3070d1|            
580|f0dd0d|            // Recent indicator
581|1fe14a|            if isRecent && searchQuery.isEmpty {
582|ce2635|                Image(systemName: "clock")
583|43cd83|                    .font(.system(size: 10))
584|39aaec|                    .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white.opacity(0.7) : .secondary)
585|a7dc16|            }
586|3070d1|            
587|2e665a|            // Category badge
588|7ff844|            Text(command.category.rawValue)
589|439860|                .font(.system(size: 10, weight: .medium))
590|f145ac|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white.opacity(0.8) : .secondary)
591|801496|                .padding(.horizontal, 6)
592|aa3473|                .padding(.vertical, 2)
593|f02960|                .background(
594|8ef1be|                    RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
595|276f73|                        .fill(isSelected ? Color.white.opacity(0.2) : Color(UIColor.tertiarySystemFill))
596|6f642e|                )
597|3070d1|            
598|fbe6c5|            // Keyboard shortcut
599|6b1008|            if let shortcut = command.shortcut {
600|6d43ae|                ShortcutBadge(shortcut: shortcut, isSelected: isSelected)
601|a7dc16|            }
602|5f3077|        }
603|a15da8|        .padding(.horizontal, 16)
604|bd7543|        .padding(.vertical, 10)
605|413d6d|        .background(
606|08e8f6|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 6)
607|13be75|                .fill(isSelected ? Color.accentColor : Color.clear)
608|3143a4|        )
609|0921e9|        .padding(.horizontal, 8)
610|ea63eb|        .padding(.vertical, 1)
611|55e29b|        .contentShape(Rectangle())
612|27e597|    }
613|b4687f|

615|a557f4|    private var highlightedName: some View {
616|4c9b69|        if searchQuery.isEmpty {
617|3a60a5|            Text(command.name)
618|737552|                .font(.system(size: 13))
619|6226ee|                .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white : .primary)
620|b31999|        } else {
621|01e1af|            let parts = FuzzyMatcher.highlight(query: searchQuery, in: command.name)
622|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {

624|e6b375|                    Text(part.0)
625|fc096a|                        .font(.system(size: 13, weight: part.1 ? .bold : .regular))
626|ee54d3|                        .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white : (part.1 ? .accentColor : .primary))
627|4e2d32|                }
628|a7dc16|            }
629|5f3077|        }
630|27e597|    }
631|b31277|}

682|b8a7dc|// MARK: - Keyboard Navigation Modifier
683|adc83b|
684|533d2d|private struct KeyboardNavigationModifier: ViewModifier {
685|021242|    let onUp: () -> Void
686|81b54b|    let onDown: () -> Void
687|984088|    let onEscape: () -> Void
688|b4687f|    
689|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
690|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
691|5ddca0|        if #available(iOS 17.0, *) {
692|d1acbf|            content
693|08cff7|                .onKeyPress(.upArrow) { onUp(); return .handled }
694|415326|                .onKeyPress(.downArrow) { onDown(); return .handled }
695|48ee00|                .onKeyPress(.escape) { onEscape(); return .handled }
696|b31999|        } else {
697|d1acbf|            content
698|5f3077|        }
699|27e597|    }
700|b31277|}

53|411ba5|class RecentCommandsManager: ObservableObject {
54|d3834f|    @Published var recentCommands: [String] = []
55|4d914d|    private let maxRecent = 5
56|f67f90|    private let storageKey = "recentCommands"
57|b4687f|    
58|359b1b|    init() {
59|880bd6|        loadRecent()
60|27e597|    }
61|b4687f|    
62|230e29|    func addRecent(_ commandName: String) {
63|fe3482|        recentCommands.removeAll { $0 == commandName }
64|d6c233|        recentCommands.insert(commandName, at: 0)
65|8a5223|        if recentCommands.count > maxRecent {
66|578c6f|            recentCommands = Array(recentCommands.prefix(maxRecent))
67|5f3077|        }
68|a8ef93|        saveRecent()
69|27e597|    }
70|b4687f|    
71|998823|    private func loadRecent() {
72|7e091c|        if let saved = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: storageKey) {
73|cbe995|            recentCommands = saved
74|5f3077|        }
75|27e597|    }
76|b4687f|    
77|956c57|    private func saveRecent() {
78|98ac56|        UserDefaults.standard.set(recentCommands, forKey: storageKey)
79|27e597|    }

82|af0ecd|// MARK: - Fuzzy Search
83|adc83b|
84|9fce4f|struct FuzzyMatcher {
85|ae76bd|    static func score(query: String, target: String) -> Int? {
86|34cef6|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return 1000 }
87|d6ed84|        
88|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
89|18ea38|        let targetLower = target.lowercased()
90|d6ed84|        
91|c33784|        // Exact match gets highest score
92|bea5c7|        if targetLower == queryLower { return 10000 }
93|d6ed84|        
94|bffced|        // Contains full query
95|8cd767|        if targetLower.contains(queryLower) {
96|1063f5|            // Bonus for starting with query
97|d0876a|            if targetLower.hasPrefix(queryLower) {
98|2e989d|                return 5000 + (1000 - target.count)
99|a7dc16|            }
100|c9ab09|            return 3000 + (1000 - target.count)
101|5f3077|        }
102|d6ed84|        
103|83786c|        // Fuzzy character matching
104|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
105|7f11d4|        var targetIndex = targetLower.startIndex
106|268b95|        var score = 0
107|5dc28e|        var consecutiveBonus = 0
108|1d718f|        var lastMatchIndex: String.Index? = nil
109|d6ed84|        
110|308cfe|        while queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && targetIndex < targetLower.endIndex {
111|c13bec|            if queryLower[queryIndex] == targetLower[targetIndex] {
112|145bbf|                score += 100 + consecutiveBonus
113|216278|                
114|d6ef12|                // Bonus for consecutive matches
115|9f661a|                if let lastIdx = lastMatchIndex,
116|83874f|                   targetLower.index(after: lastIdx) == targetIndex {
117|9c7108|                    consecutiveBonus += 50
118|fdd0e2|                } else {
119|51d442|                    consecutiveBonus = 0
120|4e2d32|                }
121|216278|                
122|c7d2d9|                // Bonus for matching at word boundaries
123|3c44b0|                if targetIndex == targetLower.startIndex ||
124|75c499|                   !targetLower[targetLower.index(before: targetIndex)].isLetter {
125|78d351|                    score += 75
126|4e2d32|                }
127|216278|                
128|b7133b|                lastMatchIndex = targetIndex
129|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
130|a7dc16|            }
131|916731|            targetIndex = targetLower.index(after: targetIndex)
132|5f3077|        }
133|d6ed84|        
134|989e1f|        // All query characters must be found
135|0160b5|        guard queryIndex == queryLower.endIndex else { return nil }
136|d6ed84|        
137|c07521|        return score
138|27e597|    }
139|b4687f|    
140|ace7c9|    static func highlight(query: String, in text: String) -> [(String, Bool)] {
141|81813c|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return [(text, false)] }
142|d6ed84|        
143|b880d0|        var result: [(String, Bool)] = []
144|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
145|a14f23|        let textLower = text.lowercased()
146|d6ed84|        
147|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
148|a07ffc|        var currentSegment = ""
149|d3c359|        var isMatch = false
150|d6ed84|        
151|4083e9|        for (i, char) in text.enumerated() {
152|212094|            let textIndex = textLower.index(textLower.startIndex, offsetBy: i)
153|3070d1|            
154|3f747d|            if queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && 
155|f8248a|               textLower[textIndex] == queryLower[queryIndex] {
156|eecabe|                if !isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
157|78ec19|                    result.append((currentSegment, false))
158|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
159|4e2d32|                }
160|a00101|                isMatch = true
161|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
162|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
163|f5a6eb|            } else {
164|fbac5d|                if isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
165|15ba04|                    result.append((currentSegment, true))
166|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
167|4e2d32|                }
168|d1cc2f|                isMatch = false
169|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|5d8d48|        if !currentSegment.isEmpty {
174|eb146d|            result.append((currentSegment, isMatch))
175|5f3077|        }
176|d6ed84|        
177|67ed82|        return result
178|27e597|    }
179|b31277|}

404|27623f|    private var filteredCommands: [Command] {
405|93055c|        if searchText.isEmpty {
406|c6a1fd|            // Show recent commands first, then all commands
407|df481a|            let recentNames = Set(recentManager.recentCommands)
408|28414c|            let recent = allCommands.filter { recentNames.contains($0.name) }
409|af65a0|                .sorted { a, b in
410|d73b49|                    let aIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: a.name) ?? Int.max
411|3d02c9|                    let bIdx = recentManager.recentCommands.firstIndex(of: b.name) ?? Int.max
412|0688f6|                    return aIdx < bIdx
413|4e2d32|                }
414|c4a108|            let others = allCommands.filter { !recentNames.contains($0.name) }
415|4f9548|            return recent + others
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|babd96|        return allCommands
419|519b5d|            .compactMap { cmd -> (Command, Int)? in
420|8c516a|                guard let score = FuzzyMatcher.score(query: searchText, target: cmd.name) else {
421|024b84|                    return nil
422|4e2d32|                }
423|46f56b|                return (cmd, score)
424|a7dc16|            }
425|4a2f11|            .sorted { $0.1 > $1.1 }
426|ffcc79|            .map { $0.0 }
427|27e597|    }

684|533d2d|private struct KeyboardNavigationModifier: ViewModifier {
685|021242|    let onUp: () -> Void
686|81b54b|    let onDown: () -> Void
687|984088|    let onEscape: () -> Void
688|b4687f|    
689|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
690|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
691|5ddca0|        if #available(iOS 17.0, *) {
692|d1acbf|            content
693|08cff7|                .onKeyPress(.upArrow) { onUp(); return .handled }
694|415326|                .onKeyPress(.downArrow) { onDown(); return .handled }
695|48ee00|                .onKeyPress(.escape) { onEscape(); return .handled }
696|b31999|        } else {
697|d1acbf|            content
698|5f3077|        }
699|27e597|    }

123|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
124|e053f1|    private func diffIndicatorsLayer(minimapHeight: CGFloat, lineCount: Int) -> some View {
125|df88d3|        // VS Code minimap diff markers are thin and pinned to the left.
126|352402|        let barWidth: CGFloat = 2
127|adc83b|
128|eb7497|        // Guard against division by zero
129|dad1b1|        if lineCount > 0 {
130|82ebe9|            ForEach(diffIndicators) { indicator in
131|c4c9a2|                let startLine = max(0, min(indicator.lineRange.lowerBound, lineCount - 1))
132|d34bb2|                let endLineExclusive = max(startLine + 1, min(indicator.lineRange.upperBound, lineCount))
133|adc83b|
134|7e47a5|                let startY = (CGFloat(startLine) / CGFloat(max(lineCount, 1))) * minimapHeight
135|634593|                let endY = (CGFloat(endLineExclusive) / CGFloat(max(lineCount, 1))) * minimapHeight
136|13ec78|                let height = max(2, endY - startY)
137|adc83b|
138|ff13e9|                Rectangle()
139|41dcad|                    .fill(diffColor(for: indicator.kind).opacity(0.95))
140|81c659|                    .frame(width: barWidth, height: height)
141|72358e|                    .offset(x: 0, y: startY)
142|a7dc16|            }
143|5f3077|        }
144|27e597|    }

146|906d12|    // MARK: - Visible region math
147|adc83b|
148|6919f3|    private func visibleRegionHeight(minimapHeight: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {
149|ff17e8|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return 0 }
150|c5f520|        let ratio = scrollViewHeight / totalContentHeight
151|f9bc55|        return minimapHeight * min(max(ratio, 0), 1.0)
152|27e597|    }
153|adc83b|
154|ee5041|    private func visibleRegionOffset(minimapHeight: CGFloat, visibleHeight: CGFloat) -> CGFloat {
155|7da55c|        let scrollable = max(0, totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight)
156|45fee0|        guard scrollable > 0 else { return 0 }
157|adc83b|
158|e13930|        let scrollRatio = min(max(scrollOffset / scrollable, 0), 1.0)
159|7c51ab|        return scrollRatio * max(0, minimapHeight - visibleHeight)
160|27e597|    }
161|adc83b|
162|04759d|    // MARK: - Interaction
163|adc83b|
164|7ef7ff|    /// Requests scroll so that the main editor's visible region is centered around the minimap Y position.
165|783b1d|    /// Uses callback to parent - minimap never directly controls editor scroll (prevents jitter).
166|92b230|    private func updateScroll(forMinimapY yPosition: CGFloat, minimapHeight: CGFloat) {
167|78fab1|        guard totalContentHeight > 0 else { return }
168|dac0ba|        guard let onScrollRequested = onScrollRequested else { return }
169|adc83b|
170|783533|        let clampedY = max(0, min(yPosition, minimapHeight))
171|89fa92|        let ratio = (minimapHeight > 0) ? (clampedY / minimapHeight) : 0
172|adc83b|
173|e4e280|        // Target a center position (VS Code behavior).
174|3b7590|        let targetCenter = ratio * totalContentHeight
175|b9ce99|        let desiredOffset = targetCenter - (scrollViewHeight / 2)
176|adc83b|
177|5b5c2d|        let maxOffset = max(0, totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight)
178|6a7c82|        let newOffset = min(max(desiredOffset, 0), maxOffset)
179|d6ed84|        
180|73b1e7|        // Request scroll via callback - parent controls the actual scroll
181|f186d0|        onScrollRequested(newOffset)
182|27e597|    }
183|adc83b|
184|57db31|    // MARK: - Rendering (Canvas)
185|adc83b|
186|ddfd07|    private func drawMinimapPreview(
187|1dbb0f|        in context: inout GraphicsContext,
188|8ae978|        size: CGSize,
189|e54bca|        lines: [Substring]
190|981e04|    ) {
191|c96a6f|        let paddingX: CGFloat = 4
192|435081|        let paddingY: CGFloat = 2
193|adc83b|
194|c711e9|        let contentWidth = max(0, size.width - (paddingX * 2))
195|6c41d9|        let contentHeight = max(0, size.height - (paddingY * 2))
196|adc83b|
197|82f19e|        guard contentWidth > 0, contentHeight > 0 else { return }
198|adc83b|
199|ad5ba7|        let lineCount = max(lines.count, 1)
200|d6ed84|        
201|02e15c|        // FIXED: Use fixed pixels per line (VS Code style) instead of stretching to fill
202|54f182|        // This ensures the minimap always shows a tiny preview regardless of file size
203|3065bb|        let targetPixelsPerLine: CGFloat = 2.5
204|7dd91a|        let pixelsPerLine = targetPixelsPerLine
205|d6ed84|        
206|9b2a64|        // Calculate how many lines we can show in the minimap
207|3e694e|        let visibleLines = Int(contentHeight / pixelsPerLine)
208|d6ed84|        
209|1d6fd4|        // Calculate scroll offset to show the right portion of the document
210|91f804|        // Use scrollOffset and totalContentHeight to calculate current position
211|738fb2|        let scrollRatio = totalContentHeight > 0 ? Double(scrollOffset) / Double(max(totalContentHeight - scrollViewHeight, 1)) : 0
212|5d3dc8|        let startLine = max(0, Int(scrollRatio * Double(max(0, lineCount - visibleLines))))
213|adc83b|
214|03dc30|        // Token-block mode (colored rectangles) - VS Code style minimap
215|200364|        let minBarHeight: CGFloat = 1
216|f6b381|        let barHeight = max(minBarHeight, pixelsPerLine)
217|adc83b|
218|d1e35f|        // Approximate "characters" across minimap width.
219|26fc02|        let maxChars: CGFloat = 120
220|64e37a|        let charWidth = contentWidth / maxChars
221|adc83b|
222|dd472a|        // Render lines starting from startLine (scrolls with document)
223|8082c0|        let endLine = min(startLine + visibleLines + 1, lineCount)
224|d6ed84|        
225|5be8fa|        // Guard against invalid range (endLine must be >= startLine)
226|4957c8|        guard endLine >= startLine else { return }
227|d6ed84|        
228|714e33|        for i in startLine..<endLine {
229|794e26|            let displayIndex = i - startLine
230|82adeb|            let y = paddingY + (CGFloat(displayIndex) * pixelsPerLine)
231|db9e6f|            if y > size.height { break }
232|adc83b|
233|87a58d|            let line = lines.indices.contains(i) ? lines[i] : Substring("")
234|1922e4|            let tokens = tokenize(line)
235|adc83b|
236|ed9464|            var x = paddingX
237|4f7785|            let yAligned = y.rounded(FloatingPointRoundingRule.down)
238|adc83b|
239|993665|            if tokens.isEmpty {
240|e53354|                // Render faint whitespace line.
241|852310|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: max(4, contentWidth * 0.15), height: barHeight)
242|afc890|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(Color(white: 0.45).opacity(0.10)))
243|1df510|                continue
244|a7dc16|            }
245|adc83b|
246|3f8f53|            for token in tokens {
247|0ef518|                guard x < (paddingX + contentWidth) else { break }
248|6f9f42|                let w = max(1, CGFloat(token.text.count) * charWidth)
249|4a0a54|                let rect = CGRect(x: x, y: yAligned, width: min(w, paddingX + contentWidth - x), height: barHeight)
250|0a74f9|                context.fill(Path(rect), with: .color(token.color.opacity(0.80)))
251|354777|                x += w
252|a7dc16|            }
253|5f3077|        }
254|27e597|    }
255|adc83b|
256|3b9c43|    // MARK: - Syntax highlighting (lightweight)
257|adc83b|
258|342387|    private struct Token {
259|2ac01d|        enum Kind {
260|566b1c|            case plain
261|5d29ef|            case keyword
262|0603c2|            case string
263|d9fad7|            case comment
264|efbbfd|            case number
265|6e9645|            case typeName
266|5f3077|        }
267|adc83b|
268|f051aa|        var text: Substring
269|f8a374|        var kind: Kind
270|adc83b|
271|b98be5|        var color: Color {
272|157398|            switch kind {
273|706e3d|            case .plain:
274|7f1b9e|                return Color(white: 0.70)
275|b19882|            case .keyword:
276|5f4852|                return Color(red: 0.78, green: 0.53, blue: 0.95) // purple-ish
277|b4c397|            case .string:
278|964852|                return Color(red: 0.80, green: 0.72, blue: 0.43) // yellow-ish
279|3ded9b|            case .comment:
280|37e86a|                return Color(red: 0.46, green: 0.60, blue: 0.50) // green-ish
281|fea990|            case .number:
282|c38f5f|                return Color(red: 0.40, green: 0.73, blue: 0.92) // blue-ish
283|2c017e|            case .typeName:
284|5585ef|                return Color(red: 0.45, green: 0.83, blue: 0.70) // teal-ish
285|a7dc16|            }
286|5f3077|        }
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|10bee9|    private func makeAttributedLine(from line: Substring, fontSize: CGFloat) -> AttributedString {
290|a59ad5|        let tokens = tokenize(line)
291|adc83b|
292|1b63ae|        var out = AttributedString()
293|09ef1f|        for token in tokens {
294|d1233d|            var chunk = AttributedString(String(token.text))
295|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
296|97f23a|            chunk.foregroundColor = token.color
297|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
298|5f3077|        }
299|adc83b|
300|d11742|        if out.characters.isEmpty {
301|e5b85c|            // Preserve a tiny amount of "whitespace presence" so empty lines still show.
302|9dd08f|            var chunk = AttributedString(" ")
303|9befb1|            chunk.font = .system(size: fontSize, weight: .regular, design: .monospaced)
304|8cb2a3|            chunk.foregroundColor = Color(white: 0.7).opacity(0.25)
305|af1a00|            out.append(chunk)
306|5f3077|        }
307|adc83b|
308|9231ab|        return out
309|27e597|    }
310|adc83b|
311|4abcd7|    private func tokenize(_ line: Substring) -> [Token] {
312|f0a25f|        // Extremely lightweight tokenizer:
313|6188fb|        // - full-line comment if first non-space is # (python-like)
314|de2ec8|        // - inline comment starting at //
315|0a0697|        // - strings in "..." or '...'
316|efb1f5|        // - numbers
317|23cdc0|        // - keywords
318|43ec2e|        // - PascalCase tokens treated as type names
319|39dd2a|        var tokens: [Token] = []
320|3d99ce|        var i = line.startIndex
321|adc83b|
322|600872|        func peek(_ offset: Int = 0) -> Character? {
323|34ecda|            var idx = i
324|c6ee90|            for _ in 0..<offset {
325|2838dc|                guard idx < line.endIndex else { return nil }
326|306cea|                idx = line.index(after: idx)
327|a7dc16|            }
328|5bdcc9|            return idx < line.endIndex ? line[idx] : nil
329|5f3077|        }
330|adc83b|
331|5ea689|        func advance(_ n: Int = 1) {
332|293115|            for _ in 0..<n {
333|42c484|                guard i < line.endIndex else { return }
334|10bf0b|                i = line.index(after: i)
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|adc83b|
338|80ae1a|        // Detect python/shebang-like comment lines: first non-whitespace is '#'
339|5015b2|        if let firstNonSpace = line.firstIndex(where: { !$0.isWhitespace }),
340|fc3e36|           line[firstNonSpace] == "#" {
341|a7cd18|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[line.startIndex..<line.endIndex], kind: .comment))
342|41c689|            return tokens
343|5f3077|        }
344|adc83b|
345|544fab|        while i < line.endIndex {
346|7e4e40|            let ch = line[i]
347|adc83b|
348|40eeea|            // Inline comment: //
349|8fbe15|            if ch == "/", peek(1) == "/" {
350|860932|                let range = i..<line.endIndex
351|b67a6a|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[range], kind: .comment))
352|23d68f|                return tokens
353|a7dc16|            }
354|adc83b|
355|41a694|            // Whitespace
356|76957e|            if ch.isWhitespace {
357|eae3bb|                let start = i
358|7f4f8a|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isWhitespace { advance() }
359|3f1e7d|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
360|1df510|                continue
361|a7dc16|            }
362|adc83b|
363|e53ff2|            // String literals
364|899c9c|            if ch == "\"" || ch == "'" {
365|9d8090|                let quote = ch
366|eae3bb|                let start = i
367|e2aa2f|                advance()
368|4ed8ff|                var escaped = false
369|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
370|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
371|605f4e|                    if escaped {
372|cb9c8a|                        escaped = false
373|3f9321|                        advance()
374|e47242|                        continue
375|c9717a|                    }
376|7f8424|                    if c == "\\" {
377|37863a|                        escaped = true
378|3f9321|                        advance()
379|e47242|                        continue
380|c9717a|                    }
381|d1886f|                    if c == quote {
382|3f9321|                        advance()
383|28a64b|                        break
384|c9717a|                    }
385|7c96dd|                    advance()
386|4e2d32|                }
387|9305c9|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .string))
388|1df510|                continue
389|a7dc16|            }
390|adc83b|
391|bd52f1|            // Numbers
392|38cd36|            if ch.isNumber {
393|eae3bb|                let start = i
394|89de1b|                while i < line.endIndex, line[i].isNumber || line[i] == "." { advance() }
395|8480cb|                tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .number))
396|1df510|                continue
397|a7dc16|            }
398|adc83b|
399|1b4cce|            // Identifiers / keywords
400|181e74|            if ch.isLetter || ch == "_" {
401|eae3bb|                let start = i
402|e2aa2f|                advance()
403|3876db|                while i < line.endIndex {
404|9c755e|                    let c = line[i]
405|e225c5|                    if c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_" { advance() } else { break }
406|4e2d32|                }
407|cd95c9|                let word = line[start..<i]
408|8aa092|                let kind: Token.Kind
409|adc83b|
410|08878f|                if isKeyword(word) {
411|74c41d|                    kind = .keyword
412|be7b6b|                } else if looksLikeTypeName(word) {
413|00ef8c|                    kind = .typeName
414|fdd0e2|                } else {
415|d46347|                    kind = .plain
416|4e2d32|                }
417|adc83b|
418|d43ef3|                tokens.append(Token(text: word, kind: kind))
419|1df510|                continue
420|a7dc16|            }
421|adc83b|
422|612c55|            // Operators / punctuation
423|953483|            let start = i
424|acf00b|            advance()
425|f768b8|            tokens.append(Token(text: line[start..<i], kind: .plain))
426|5f3077|        }
427|adc83b|
428|50a443|        return tokens
429|27e597|    }
430|adc83b|
431|3facb7|    private func isKeyword(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
432|c4f25e|        // Small superset of common Swift/JS/Python keywords.
433|b2b9d9|        // (We can't depend on a full parser here.)
434|396c95|        let keywords: Set<String> = [
435|9af6d0|            "import", "export", "from", "as",
436|dbd304|            "struct", "class", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "func", "var", "let",
437|bd4ed1|            "if", "else", "for", "while", "repeat", "switch", "case", "default",
438|e351bd|            "break", "continue", "return", "throw", "throws", "try", "catch",
439|b9f132|            "do", "in", "where", "guard", "defer",
440|511559|            "public", "private", "fileprivate", "internal", "open",
441|12dd92|            "static", "final", "override", "mutating", "nonmutating",
442|91d838|            "async", "await",
443|6f6f8c|            "true", "false", "nil",
444|0cf8cf|            "self", "super",
445|e39cc4|            // JS/Python-ish
446|ad9513|            "const", "function", "async", "await", "new", "this",
447|1c9b9e|            "def", "pass", "lambda", "None"
448|220505|        ]
449|0da584|        return keywords.contains(String(word))
450|27e597|    }
451|adc83b|
452|e0492d|    private func looksLikeTypeName(_ word: Substring) -> Bool {
453|ce64a9|        // Simple heuristic: PascalCase (leading uppercase).
454|bbf2da|        guard let first = word.first else { return false }
455|248546|        return first.isUppercase
456|27e597|    }
457|adc83b|
458|e2a5f4|    // MARK: - Diff colors
459|adc83b|
460|af35e5|    private func diffColor(for kind: MinimapDiffIndicator.Kind) -> Color {
461|01fe0f|        switch kind {
462|e91923|        case .added:
463|97b08e|            return Color.green
464|1a0dfa|        case .modified:
465|a71900|            return Color.red
466|4fc3e2|        case .deleted:
467|7296db|            // VS Code uses red-ish for deletions too; keep distinct via slightly different tone.
468|c59220|            return Color(red: 1.0, green: 0.35, blue: 0.35)
469|5f3077|        }
470|27e597|    }

141|b4687f|

143|087776|    @State private var regexError: String? = nil

145|623871|    // MARK: - Computed Properties
146|b4687f|    
147|f96259|    /// Returns the filtered, sorted, and limited results
148|f32b09|    var processedResults: [FileSearchResult] {
149|1a5bc0|        var filtered = rawResults
150|d6ed84|        
151|0a214d|        // 1. Filter by binary files
152|99c850|        if excludeBinaryFiles {
153|9b3c53|            filtered = filtered.filter { result in
154|74a475|                let ext = (result.fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
155|979d9d|                return !binaryExtensions.contains(where: { $0.lowercased().hasSuffix(ext) })
156|a7dc16|            }
157|5f3077|        }
158|d6ed84|        
159|23706c|        // 2. Filter by selected extensions
160|8f0448|        if !selectedExtensions.isEmpty {
161|9b3c53|            filtered = filtered.filter { result in
162|74a475|                let ext = (result.fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
163|db0fb9|                return selectedExtensions.contains { $0.lowercased().dropFirst() == ext }
164|a7dc16|            }
165|5f3077|        }
166|d6ed84|        
167|e35546|        // 3. Sort results
168|b5c3d5|        filtered = filtered.sorted { lhs, rhs in
169|cc07ab|            switch sortOption {
170|2eb58c|            case .fileName:
171|c61e48|                return sortAscending ? lhs.fileName < rhs.fileName : lhs.fileName > rhs.fileName
172|7a14db|            case .path:
173|8db7c1|                return sortAscending ? lhs.path < rhs.path : lhs.path > rhs.path
174|f24236|            case .matches:
175|beb3b2|                return sortAscending ? lhs.matches.count < rhs.matches.count : lhs.matches.count > rhs.matches.count
176|a7dc16|            }
177|5f3077|        }
178|d6ed84|        
179|b622d3|        // 4. Apply result limit
180|2f53d7|        if let maxCount = resultLimit.maxCount, filtered.count > maxCount {
181|78a06d|            filtered = Array(filtered.prefix(maxCount))
182|5f3077|        }
183|d6ed84|        
184|ed0d9a|        return filtered
185|27e597|    }
186|b4687f|    
187|afa680|    /// Group results by directory if enabled
188|bf562e|    var groupedResults: [(key: String, results: [FileSearchResult])] {
189|cfef88|        if groupByDirectory {
190|f958d9|            let grouped = Dictionary(grouping: processedResults) { $0.directory }
191|9c37af|            return grouped.sorted { $0.key < $1.key }.map { (key: $0.key, results: $0.value) }
192|b31999|        } else {
193|01a805|            return [(key: "", results: processedResults)]
194|5f3077|        }
195|27e597|    }
196|b4687f|    
197|7eee45|    /// All unique extensions from current results
198|8335d0|    var availableExtensions: [String] {
199|f40721|        let extensions = rawResults.map { (result: FileSearchResult) -> String in
200|b157b5|            let ext = (result.fileName as NSString).pathExtension
201|5a54b3|            return ext.isEmpty ? "noext" : ext.lowercased()
202|5f3077|        }
203|69f3ad|        return Array(Set(extensions)).sorted()
204|27e597|    }
205|b4687f|    
206|12bc82|    // MARK: - Keyboard Navigation Functions
207|b4687f|    
208|f6a132|    /// Builds the flat list of navigation items from results
209|e5849c|    private func buildNavigationItems() -> [SearchNavigationItem] {
210|ccfc3e|        var items: [SearchNavigationItem] = []
211|ad57e8|        let results = processedResults
212|ce48df|        for (fileIndex, fileResult) in results.enumerated() {
213|8e1a42|            for (matchIndex, match) in fileResult.matches.enumerated() {
214|e47853|                items.append(SearchNavigationItem(
215|ef8b8c|                    fileIndex: fileIndex,
216|e7bbe5|                    matchIndex: matchIndex,
217|ef4b99|                    fileID: fileResult.id,
218|a88193|                    matchID: match.id
219|2188d8|                ))
220|a7dc16|            }
221|5f3077|        }
222|1d239a|        return items
223|27e597|    }

225|85bcfb|    /// Focuses the search field
226|b9370c|    private func focusSearchField() {
227|da7ea0|        focusedField = .search
228|27e597|    }

230|a24e67|    /// Clears search and closes results
231|26a7e1|    private func clearSearchAndClose() {
232|682b44|        searchText = ""
233|6ee87b|        replaceText = ""
234|64a40a|        searchManager.clearResults()
235|5ed5cb|        debounceCancellable?.cancel()
236|798fdb|        searchTask?.cancel()
237|ad7577|        navigationItems = []
238|b2cb17|        selectedNavigationItem = nil
239|4a58e9|        focusedField = nil
240|27e597|    }

243|45d728|    private func toggleReplaceSection() {
244|408502|        withAnimation {
245|5c25b2|            showReplace.toggle()
246|3775d6|            focusedField = showReplace ? .replace : .search
247|5f3077|        }
248|27e597|    }
249|b4687f|    
250|b89756|    /// Executes replace all operation
251|8d1407|    private func replaceAll() {
252|41c6de|        performReplace()
253|27e597|    }
254|b4687f|    
255|b84c76|    /// Navigates to next result
256|639992|    private func navigateToNextResult() {
257|e554e3|        guard !navigationItems.isEmpty else { return }
258|d6ed84|        
259|82d91a|        if let current = selectedNavigationItem,
260|e6502a|           let currentIndex = navigationItems.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == current.id }) {
261|9ddba8|            let nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % navigationItems.count
262|59a7a6|            selectedNavigationItem = navigationItems[nextIndex]
263|b31999|        } else {
264|dec0e2|            selectedNavigationItem = navigationItems.first
265|5f3077|        }
266|27e597|    }
267|b4687f|    
268|56119f|    /// Navigates to previous result
269|8adb23|    private func navigateToPreviousResult() {
270|e554e3|        guard !navigationItems.isEmpty else { return }
271|d6ed84|        
272|82d91a|        if let current = selectedNavigationItem,
273|e6502a|           let currentIndex = navigationItems.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == current.id }) {
274|378834|            let prevIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + navigationItems.count) % navigationItems.count
275|c2bab4|            selectedNavigationItem = navigationItems[prevIndex]
276|b31999|        } else {
277|3109a0|            selectedNavigationItem = navigationItems.last
278|5f3077|        }
279|27e597|    }
280|b4687f|    
281|15b717|    /// Opens the currently selected result
282|a787fe|    private func openSelectedResult() {
283|f4616c|        guard let selected = selectedNavigationItem else { return }
284|ad57e8|        let results = processedResults
285|c8f72e|        guard selected.fileIndex < results.count else { return }
286|bdd740|        let fileResult = results[selected.fileIndex]
287|4f603d|        guard selected.matchIndex < fileResult.matches.count else { return }
288|08d2f8|        let match = fileResult.matches[selected.matchIndex]
289|e4b372|        onResultSelected?(fileResult.path, match.lineNumber)
290|27e597|    }

745|e5a893|    // MARK: - Lifecycle
746|b4687f|    
747|413a48|    private func setupDebouncedSearch() {
748|ba1ced|        // Note: Debounced search is handled via onChange modifier and debouncedSearch() function
749|27e597|    }
750|b4687f|    
751|101550|    // MARK: - Debounced Search
752|b4687f|    
753|6320bf|    private func debouncedSearch(immediate: Bool = false) {
754|5ed5cb|        debounceCancellable?.cancel()
755|d6ed84|        
756|26b670|        if immediate {
757|47ed6c|            performDebouncedSearch(query: searchText)
758|b31999|        } else {
759|dcccb0|            setupDebouncedSearch()
760|5f3077|        }
761|27e597|    }
762|b4687f|    
763|1d3cf0|    private func performDebouncedSearch(query: String) {
764|798fdb|        searchTask?.cancel()
765|d6ed84|        
766|e78100|        guard query.count >= 2 else { return }
767|d6ed84|        
768|86191b|        let options = SearchManager.SearchOptions(
769|212967|            isCaseSensitive: matchCase,
770|d0fada|            isWholeWord: matchWholeWord,
771|31ed2c|            isRegex: useRegex
772|3143a4|        )
773|d6ed84|        
774|bed986|        let includeGlobs = filesToInclude
775|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
776|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
777|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
778|d6ed84|        
779|ce8d1a|        let excludeGlobs = filesToExclude
780|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
781|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
782|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
783|d6ed84|        
784|78ed4e|        let searchQuery = SearchManager.SearchQuery(
785|5f3d5e|            text: query,
786|62f7ee|            options: options,
787|ca52d5|            includeGlobs: includeGlobs,
788|f1536d|            excludeGlobs: excludeGlobs
789|3143a4|        )
790|d6ed84|        
791|6b2788|        searchTask = Task { [weak searchManager] in
792|597ee6|            guard let manager = searchManager else { return }
793|08ebed|            guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
794|2e2a14|            manager.search(in: rootURL, query: searchQuery)
795|5f3077|        }
796|27e597|    }
797|b4687f|    
798|d9645c|    // MARK: - Helper Functions
799|b4687f|    
800|1a34a0|    private func collapseAll() {
801|75330a|        NotificationCenter.default.post(name: .collapseAllSearchResults, object: nil)
802|27e597|    }
803|b4687f|    
804|5a8fe8|    private func expandAll() {
805|65da50|        NotificationCenter.default.post(name: .expandAllSearchResults, object: nil)
806|27e597|    }
807|b4687f|    
808|05dba2|    private func performSearch() {
809|cc6ca2|        debouncedSearch(immediate: true)
810|27e597|    }
811|b4687f|    
812|eb174a|    private func performReplace() {
813|a606b5|        guard !searchText.isEmpty && !replaceText.isEmpty else { return }
814|d6ed84|        
815|86191b|        let options = SearchManager.SearchOptions(
816|212967|            isCaseSensitive: matchCase,
817|d0fada|            isWholeWord: matchWholeWord,
818|31ed2c|            isRegex: useRegex
819|3143a4|        )
820|d6ed84|        
821|bed986|        let includeGlobs = filesToInclude
822|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
823|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
824|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
825|d6ed84|        
826|ce8d1a|        let excludeGlobs = filesToExclude
827|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
828|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
829|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
830|d6ed84|        
831|87daa1|        let query = SearchManager.SearchQuery(
832|29db41|            text: searchText,
833|62f7ee|            options: options,
834|ca52d5|            includeGlobs: includeGlobs,
835|f1536d|            excludeGlobs: excludeGlobs
836|3143a4|        )
837|d6ed84|        
838|0f1953|        Task {
839|71cc09|            do {
840|c52263|                let result = try await searchManager.replace(in: rootURL, query: query, replacement: replaceText)
841|71387f|                print("Replace completed: \(result.replacements) replacements in \(result.filesTouched) files")
842|91b9a2|            } catch {
843|e1dc9b|                print("Replace failed: \(error.localizedDescription)")
844|a7dc16|            }
845|5f3077|        }
846|27e597|    }
847|b4687f|    
848|e51120|    private func onAppear() {
849|e87b15|        setupDebouncedSearch()
850|27e597|    }
851|b4687f|    
852|f3013f|    private func onDisappear() {
853|5ed5cb|        debounceCancellable?.cancel()
854|798fdb|        searchTask?.cancel()
855|27e597|    }

857|198b7e|    // Convert SearchManager results to view model
858|55f41c|    private var convertedResults: [FileSearchResult] {
859|c61d86|        searchManager.results.map { fileMatch in
860|cc8682|            let fileName = URL(fileURLWithPath: fileMatch.filePath).lastPathComponent
861|77c8a3|            let matches = fileMatch.matches.map { match in
862|579a9f|                SearchResultLine(
863|d54ce0|                    lineNumber: match.location.line,
864|7b3773|                    text: match.preview,
865|d070d1|                    matches: []
866|6f642e|                )
867|a7dc16|            }
868|6bb23c|            return FileSearchResult(
869|6b113d|                fileName: fileName,
870|0add96|                path: fileMatch.filePath,
871|f12fc3|                matches: matches,
872|e7c6af|                isExpanded: true
873|43d041|            )
874|5f3077|        }
875|27e597|    }
876|b4687f|    
877|44b993|    private var rawResults: [FileSearchResult] {
878|e135b0|        convertedResults
879|27e597|    }

203|fc4e2f|    func updateRatio(at index: Int, delta: CGFloat, totalSize: CGFloat) {
204|aa52a4|        guard index < splitRatios.count - 1 else { return }
205|d6ed84|

213|6df122|            splitRatios[index] = newRatio1
214|7b2474|            splitRatios[index + 1] = newRatio2
215|5f3077|        }
216|27e597|    }

233|504e43|    var body: some View {

235|412812|            if splitManager.panes.count == 1 {
236|d46070|                // Single pane - no split
237|d8d1de|                if let pane = splitManager.panes.first {
238|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
239|4e2d32|                }
240|f5a6eb|            } else {
241|355a3b|                // Multiple panes with split
242|7f3586|                splitContent(geometry: geometry)
243|a7dc16|            }
244|5f3077|        }
245|27e597|    }
246|b4687f|    
247|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
248|850970|    private func splitContent(geometry: GeometryProxy) -> some View {
249|259571|        let totalSize = splitManager.splitDirection == .horizontal ? geometry.size.width : geometry.size.height
250|d6ed84|        
251|ffba2f|        if splitManager.splitDirection == .horizontal {
252|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
253|a708a2|                ForEach(Array(splitManager.panes.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, pane in
254|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
255|fc6e52|                        .frame(width: totalSize * splitManager.splitRatios[index])
256|dd2193|                    
257|497368|                    if index < splitManager.panes.count - 1 {
258|1c47d6|                        SplitDragHandle(direction: .horizontal) { delta in
259|27a7db|                            splitManager.updateRatio(at: index, delta: delta, totalSize: totalSize)
260|392b35|                        }
261|c9717a|                    }
262|4e2d32|                }
263|a7dc16|            }
264|b31999|        } else {
265|92175e|            VStack(spacing: 0) {
266|a708a2|                ForEach(Array(splitManager.panes.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, pane in
267|24bea0|                    SinglePaneView(pane: pane, splitManager: splitManager, editorCore: editorCore)
268|0805c1|                        .frame(height: totalSize * splitManager.splitRatios[index])
269|dd2193|                    
270|497368|                    if index < splitManager.panes.count - 1 {
271|61382d|                        SplitDragHandle(direction: .vertical) { delta in
272|27a7db|                            splitManager.updateRatio(at: index, delta: delta, totalSize: totalSize)
273|392b35|                        }
274|c9717a|                    }
275|4e2d32|                }
276|a7dc16|            }
277|5f3077|        }
278|27e597|    }
279|b31277|}
280|adc83b|
281|93db7d|// MARK: - Single Pane View

283|ca2839|struct SinglePaneView: View {

287|069f66|    @State private var dragOverPane = false
288|b4687f|

291|27e597|    }
292|b4687f|    
293|504e43|    var body: some View {
294|94dd27|        VStack(spacing: 0) {
295|04856d|            // Pane header with tabs and controls
296|ab5617|            paneHeader

299|bc72b1|            if let tab = pane.activeTab {

303|7bbe77|                    splitManager: splitManager,

306|f5a6eb|            } else {

308|a7dc16|            }
309|5f3077|        }
310|8c1a52|        .background(isActive ? Color(UIColor.systemBackground) : Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.3))
311|d38294|        .overlay(
312|d52622|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 0)
313|225f3b|                .stroke(isActive ? Color.accentColor : Color.clear, lineWidth: 2)
314|3143a4|        )
315|d38294|        .overlay(
316|906091|            // Drop zone indicator
317|763642|            Group {
318|d4901a|                if dragOverPane {
319|8ef1be|                    RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
320|7d6dc0|                        .fill(Color.accentColor.opacity(0.2))
321|add301|                        .overlay(
322|fee0d9|                            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
323|701074|                                .stroke(Color.accentColor, style: StrokeStyle(lineWidth: 2, dash: [5]))
324|63214b|                        )
325|4e2d32|                }
326|a7dc16|            }
327|3143a4|        )
328|cf12c6|        .onTapGesture {
329|9dd1a3|            splitManager.activePaneId = pane.id
330|5f3077|        }
331|942311|        .onDrop(of: [.text], isTargeted: $dragOverPane) { providers in
332|2a4c53|            // Handle tab drop
333|40cfc4|            return true
334|5f3077|        }
335|27e597|    }
336|b4687f|

338|250bf4|        HStack(spacing: 0) {

341|7a5371|                HStack(spacing: 0) {
342|3eeda0|                    ForEach(pane.tabs) { tab in

361|c9717a|                    }

373|b2edb7|                        .frame(width: 24, height: 24)
374|4e2d32|                }
375|216278|

382|c9717a|                    }

387|5f3077|        }
388|9df8d7|        .frame(height: 36)
389|185ec4|        .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground))
390|27e597|    }

419|a7c8a1|struct PaneTabItem: View {
420|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
421|055123|    let isSelected: Bool
422|ed36f0|    @ObservedObject var pane: EditorPane
423|40e747|    @ObservedObject var splitManager: SplitEditorManager
424|9d7b13|    @State private var isDragging = false
425|b4687f|    
426|504e43|    var body: some View {
427|e1c66d|        HStack(spacing: 6) {
428|21ea3e|            Image(systemName: tab.language.iconName)

430|16775e|                .foregroundColor(tab.language.color)
431|3070d1|            
432|55fcb3|            Text(tab.fileName)
433|ee466d|                .font(.system(size: 12))
434|2b4299|                .lineLimit(1)
435|3070d1|            
436|b6aa97|            if tab.isUnsaved {
437|134f0e|                Circle()

439|6a9720|                    .frame(width: 6, height: 6)
440|a7dc16|            }
441|3070d1|            
442|cf69b3|            Button(action: { pane.closeTab(id: tab.id) }) {
443|f97da2|                Image(systemName: "xmark")

445|72464b|                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
446|a7dc16|            }
447|5f3077|        }
448|8469b6|        .padding(.horizontal, 12)
449|d332d1|        .padding(.vertical, 6)
450|413d6d|        .background(
451|8dd164|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 4)
452|c4bcbd|                .fill(isSelected ? Color(UIColor.systemBackground) : Color.clear)
453|3143a4|        )
454|2503bb|        .opacity(isDragging ? 0.5 : 1.0)
455|cf12c6|        .onTapGesture {
456|0b7038|            pane.selectTab(id: tab.id)
457|9dd1a3|            splitManager.activePaneId = pane.id
458|5f3077|        }
459|1367a7|        .onDrag {

461|ac49e9|            return NSItemProvider(object: tab.id.uuidString as NSString)
462|5f3077|        }
463|3c5038|        .contextMenu {
464|cf69b3|            Button(action: { pane.closeTab(id: tab.id) }) {
465|2cec90|                Label("Close", systemImage: "xmark")
466|a7dc16|            }
467|3070d1|            
468|e744dc|            Divider()
469|3070d1|            
470|b6d750|            Button(action: { splitManager.moveTabToNewSplit(tab: tab, fromPaneId: pane.id, direction: .horizontal) }) {
471|b2f857|                Label("Move to Split Right", systemImage: "rectangle.split.2x1")
472|a7dc16|            }
473|3070d1|            
474|dff3e6|            Button(action: { splitManager.moveTabToNewSplit(tab: tab, fromPaneId: pane.id, direction: .vertical) }) {
475|3c7146|                Label("Move to Split Down", systemImage: "rectangle.split.1x2")
476|a7dc16|            }
477|5f3077|        }
478|27e597|    }

481|febcd8|// MARK: - Pane Editor View
482|adc83b|
483|081d2d|struct PaneEditorView: View {
484|ed36f0|    @ObservedObject var pane: EditorPane
485|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
486|40e747|    @ObservedObject var splitManager: SplitEditorManager
487|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
488|c97289|    @ObservedObject private var debugManager = DebugManager.shared
489|a9aa54|    @ObservedObject private var foldingManager = CodeFoldingManager.shared
490|eba335|    @State private var text: String = ""
491|4f0ac8|    @State private var scrollPosition: Int = 0
492|36da68|    @State private var scrollOffset: CGFloat = 0
493|d473fd|    @State private var totalLines: Int = 1
494|bcf90b|    @State private var visibleLines: Int = 20
495|9cb5e9|    @State private var currentLineNumber: Int = 1
496|cc347a|    @State private var currentColumn: Int = 1
497|eee196|    @State private var cursorIndex: Int = 0
498|2c43f6|    @State private var lineHeight: CGFloat = 17
499|5c2aeb|    @State private var requestedLineSelection: Int? = nil
500|446eb9|    @State private var requestedCursorIndex: Int? = nil
501|b4687f|    
502|952908|    private var useRunestoneEditor: Bool { FeatureFlags.useRunestoneEditor }
503|adc83b|
504|834dc8|    @AppStorage("lineNumbersStyle") private var lineNumbersStyle: String = "on"
505|b4687f|    
506|5df2db|    private var fileId: String { tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName }
507|b4687f|    
508|504e43|    var body: some View {
509|09743e|        GeometryReader { geometry in
510|3b7550|            HStack(spacing: 0) {
511|57cbc9|                // Line numbers + breakpoints + code folding (gutter)
512|1c3407|                //
513|ed4951|                // IMPORTANT: keep gutter in sync with the editor scroll position. The gutter ScrollView
514|ea8c59|                // is scroll-disabled, and we offset the content to match the editor's scroll.
515|819e1d|                if lineNumbersStyle != "off" {
516|934553|                    ScrollView(showsIndicators: false) {
517|a1a512|                        VStack(alignment: .trailing, spacing: 0) {
518|287ca6|                            // Match UITextView.textContainerInset.top (see SyntaxHighlightingTextView.swift)
519|8aef08|                            ForEach(0..<totalLines, id: \ .self) { lineIndex in
520|3ebc2f|                                HStack(spacing: 2) {
521|336ad1|                                    // Fold chevron icon
522|11d51b|                                    if foldingManager.isFoldable(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex) {
523|91d8b4|                                        Button(action: { 
524|5e28ca|                                            foldingManager.toggleFold(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex)
525|834ec4|                                        }) {
526|011694|                                            Image(systemName: foldingManager.isFolded(fileId: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? "chevron.right" : "chevron.down")
527|1fb1f1|                                                .font(.system(size: 10, weight: .regular))
528|d94af6|                                                .foregroundColor(.secondary.opacity(0.8))
529|1df8a9|                                                .frame(width: 12, height: lineHeight)
530|eed1d8|                                        }
531|30d0d7|                                        .buttonStyle(.plain)
532|719c18|                                    } else {
533|6d00af|                                        // Spacer for alignment
534|17f4b6|                                        Spacer()
535|2344be|                                            .frame(width: 12)
536|8ab74d|                                    }
537|9539f6|                                    
538|e4afd0|                                    // Breakpoint indicator
539|9132d6|                                    Button(action: { debugManager.toggleBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) }) {
540|6304cf|                                        Circle()
541|605456|                                            .fill(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? Color.red : Color.clear)
542|5c2d4a|                                            .overlay(
543|77f785|                                                Circle()
544|ef0c8f|                                                    .stroke(Color.red.opacity(0.6), lineWidth: 1)
545|bfe428|                                                    .opacity(debugManager.hasBreakpoint(file: fileId, line: lineIndex) ? 0 : 0.25)
546|8fe569|                                            )
547|d350e9|                                            .frame(width: 10, height: 10)
548|8ab74d|                                    }
549|475b6d|                                    .buttonStyle(.plain)
550|c99ef6|                                    .frame(width: 14, height: lineHeight)
551|adc83b|
552|8f7419|                                    Text(displayText(for: lineIndex))
553|8fdcdb|                                        .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
554|efb0dd|                                        .foregroundColor(lineIndex + 1 == currentLineNumber ? .primary : .secondary.opacity(0.6))
555|eb881d|                                        .frame(height: lineHeight)
556|bc9c7a|                                        .contentShape(Rectangle())
557|f348f3|                                        .onTapGesture {
558|473b13|                                            requestedLineSelection = lineIndex
559|eed1d8|                                        }
560|f83e05|                                }
561|695c29|                                .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .trailing)
562|89d40a|                            }
563|392b35|                        }
564|539a79|                        .padding(.trailing, 4)
565|88bfb0|                        .padding(.top, 8)
566|ad281a|                        .offset(y: -scrollOffset)
567|c9717a|                    }
568|9f14cd|                    .scrollDisabled(true)
569|06d27a|                    .frame(width: 70)
570|0f5931|                    .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground).opacity(0.5))
571|4e2d32|                }
572|adc83b|
573|266a6a|                // Editor
574|a70ea9|                SyntaxHighlightingTextView(
575|53ec0e|                    text: $text,
576|efee53|                    filename: tab.fileName,
577|5182bc|                    scrollPosition: $scrollPosition,
578|fec2be|                    scrollOffset: $scrollOffset,
579|1b9482|                    totalLines: $totalLines,
580|7a86c9|                    visibleLines: $visibleLines,
581|672538|                    currentLineNumber: $currentLineNumber,
582|fca1f6|                    currentColumn: $currentColumn,
583|caf1e7|                    lineHeight: $lineHeight,
584|290fcf|                    isActive: splitManager.activePaneId == pane.id,
585|5eff51|                    editorCore: editorCore,
586|85e738|                    requestedLineSelection: $requestedLineSelection
587|6f642e|                )
588|717522|                .onChange(of: text) { newValue in
589|ef5cad|                    pane.updateTabContent(newValue)
590|4e2d32|                }
591|f86b95|                .onChange(of: scrollOffset) { newOffset in
592|9b57fb|                    // Track latest scroll offset for this pane, and sync if enabled.
593|f6218e|                    if abs(pane.scrollOffset - newOffset) > 0.5 {
594|edf28f|                        pane.scrollOffset = newOffset
595|c9717a|                    }
596|54e939|                    if splitManager.syncScroll {
597|7b6383|                        splitManager.syncScrollOffset(newOffset, fromPaneId: pane.id)
598|c9717a|                    }
599|4e2d32|                }
600|216278|                
601|7ed984|                // Mini minimap
602|33afde|                MinimapView(
603|c6f098|                    content: text,
604|63c90b|                    scrollOffset: scrollOffset,
605|55164f|                    scrollViewHeight: geometry.size.height,
606|294a32|                    totalContentHeight: CGFloat(totalLines) * lineHeight,
607|882946|                    onScrollRequested: { newOffset in
608|2c2c75|                        scrollOffset = newOffset
609|757ff1|                        scrollPosition = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
610|c9717a|                    }
611|6f642e|                )
612|3c4582|                .frame(width: 60)
613|a7dc16|            }
614|6589b5|            // Sticky Header Overlay (FEAT-040)
615|7a45a9|            StickyHeaderView(
616|948d7a|                text: text,
617|54ab92|                currentLine: scrollPosition, // Using scrollPosition as approximate top line
618|1a8c40|                theme: ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme,
619|95435d|                lineHeight: lineHeight,
620|cd7b67|                onSelect: { line in
621|77691c|                    requestedLineSelection = line
622|4e2d32|                }
623|43d041|            )
624|1c065c|            .padding(.leading, 70) // Offset for line numbers + folding icons
625|0e402e|            .padding(.trailing, 60) // Offset for minimap
626|3070d1|            
627|89a89f|            // Inlay Hints Overlay (type hints, parameter names)
628|661a9c|            InlayHintsOverlay(
629|a9b5c1|                code: text,
630|dc1d64|                language: tab.language,
631|a4876e|                scrollPosition: scrollPosition,
632|95435d|                lineHeight: lineHeight,
633|65b04d|                fontSize: 14,
634|638f59|                gutterWidth: lineNumbersStyle != "off" ? 70 : 0,
635|5f899d|                rightReservedWidth: 60
636|43d041|            )
637|0a7127|            .padding(.leading, lineNumbersStyle != "off" ? 70 : 0) // Offset for line numbers
638|0e402e|            .padding(.trailing, 60) // Offset for minimap
639|3070d1|            
640|057f8e|            // Peek Definition Overlay
641|37dff6|            if let peekState = editorCore.peekState, editorCore.activeTabId == tab.id {
642|7c7415|                 // Calculate simplified position: center of screen for now, but conceptually "inline"
643|7db4cc|                 // To make it truly inline, we'd need more complex geometry, but overlay is a good start.
644|3dc160|                 VStack {
645|0b626e|                     Spacer()
646|7c17cb|                         .frame(height: max(0, CGFloat(peekState.sourceLine - scrollPosition) * lineHeight + lineHeight + 20))
647|a25606|                     
648|13d164|                     PeekDefinitionView(
649|8fdf46|                         editorCore: editorCore,
650|35a17d|                         targetFile: peekState.file,
651|c7a844|                         targetLine: peekState.line,
652|0368a9|                         content: peekState.content,
653|b11dbc|                         onClose: { editorCore.closePeekDefinition() },
654|b70a3a|                         onOpen: {
655|6e77ad|                             editorCore.openFile(FileItem(name: URL(fileURLWithPath: peekState.file).lastPathComponent, path: peekState.file, isDirectory: false))
656|98bb10|                             editorCore.closePeekDefinition()
657|f77f7f|                         }
658|5fd7ac|                     )
659|cfa44f|                     .padding(.horizontal)
660|e7cf39|                     .padding(.bottom, 20)
661|a25606|                     
662|0b626e|                     Spacer()
663|f9188b|                 }
664|dc076a|                 .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity, alignment: .top)
665|8a5992|                 .background(Color.black.opacity(0.01)) // Capture taps outside if needed, or let them pass
666|2bb99b|                 .transition(.opacity)
667|e734a5|                 .zIndex(100)
668|a7dc16|            }
669|5f3077|        }
670|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
671|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
672|1739f9|            // Detect foldable regions for this file
673|806ab8|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: fileId)
674|5f3077|        }
675|9d97c0|        .onChange(of: tab.id) { _ in
676|ba85f8|            text = tab.content
677|679c8b|            // Re-detect foldable regions for new file
678|806ab8|            foldingManager.detectFoldableRegions(in: text, filePath: fileId)
679|5f3077|        }
680|020a1e|        .onChange(of: pane.scrollOffset) { newOffset in
681|557e0a|            guard splitManager.syncScroll else { return }
682|d7142b|            // Avoid feedback loop when we're the source pane.
683|158d19|            if abs(scrollOffset - newOffset) > 0.5 {
684|d0a8f9|                scrollOffset = newOffset
685|4643ad|                if !useRunestoneEditor {
686|195125|                    scrollPosition = Int(newOffset / max(lineHeight, 1))
687|4e2d32|                }
688|a7dc16|            }
689|5f3077|        }
690|27e597|    }
691|b4687f|    
692|46d3db|    private func displayText(for lineIndex: Int) -> String {
693|5d97cf|        switch lineNumbersStyle {
694|a6eb36|        case "relative":
695|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
696|2073fa|            if lineNumber == currentLineNumber { return "\(lineNumber)" }
697|225c80|            return "\(abs(lineNumber - currentLineNumber))"
698|5040ac|        case "interval":
699|b0622f|            let lineNumber = lineIndex + 1
700|bc3fe3|            return (lineNumber == 1 || lineNumber % 5 == 0) ? "\(lineNumber)" : ""
701|520b7d|        default:
702|3880c0|            return "\(lineIndex + 1)"
703|5f3077|        }
704|27e597|    }

710|3050b6|    let direction: SplitDirection
711|5ceab9|    let onDrag: (CGFloat) -> Void
712|b4687f|    
713|9d7b13|    @State private var isDragging = false

715|b4687f|    
716|504e43|    var body: some View {
717|88666c|        ZStack {
718|917510|            // Background
719|8ce5e4|            Rectangle()
720|056552|                .fill(Color(UIColor.separator))
721|3070d1|            
722|46727c|            // Handle indicator
723|99f541|            if direction == .horizontal {
724|fc75ec|                VStack(spacing: 2) {
725|2c9234|                    ForEach(0..<3, id: \.self) { _ in
726|70798b|                        Circle()
727|55136d|                            .fill(isDragging ? Color.accentColor : Color.secondary)
728|0bef2b|                            .frame(width: 3, height: 3)
729|c9717a|                    }
730|4e2d32|                }
731|f5a6eb|            } else {
732|d1bdd3|                HStack(spacing: 2) {
733|2c9234|                    ForEach(0..<3, id: \.self) { _ in
734|70798b|                        Circle()
735|55136d|                            .fill(isDragging ? Color.accentColor : Color.secondary)
736|0bef2b|                            .frame(width: 3, height: 3)
737|c9717a|                    }
738|4e2d32|                }
739|a7dc16|            }
740|5f3077|        }
741|4b779c|        .frame(
742|9a2b5c|            width: direction == .horizontal ? 6 : nil,
743|67c188|            height: direction == .vertical ? 6 : nil
744|3143a4|        )
745|55e29b|        .contentShape(Rectangle())
746|9d6124|        .gesture(
747|b4327e|            DragGesture()
748|10bb46|                .updating($dragOffset) { value, state, _ in
749|fa21e0|                    let delta = direction == .horizontal ? value.translation.width : value.translation.height
750|a83186|                    state = delta
751|4e2d32|                }
752|bc75fc|                .onChanged { value in
753|9391c4|                    isDragging = true
754|fa21e0|                    let delta = direction == .horizontal ? value.translation.width : value.translation.height
755|716613|                    onDrag(delta)
756|4e2d32|                }
757|6b43cc|                .onEnded { _ in
758|dda585|                    isDragging = false
759|4e2d32|                }
760|3143a4|        )
761|ca4aa4|        .onHover { hovering in
762|d52bbe|            if hovering {
763|b94855|                #if targetEnvironment(macCatalyst)
764|922e76|                NSCursor.resizeLeftRight.push()
765|1b83de|                #endif
766|f5a6eb|            } else {
767|b94855|                #if targetEnvironment(macCatalyst)
768|d026ea|                NSCursor.pop()
769|1b83de|                #endif
770|a7dc16|            }
771|5f3077|        }
772|27e597|    }

370|d44d42|        let command = terminal.draftCommand.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
371|23b059|        guard !command.isEmpty else { return }

373|b88a67|        terminal.draftCommand = ""
374|27e597|    }

377|bc3211|struct TerminalLineView: View {

380|b4687f|    
381|504e43|    var body: some View {

387|fd4df0|                .foregroundColor(colorForType(line.type))
388|7916de|                .textSelection(.enabled)
389|5f3077|        }
390|27e597|    }
391|b4687f|    
392|0b8dbf|    func colorForType(_ type: LineType) -> Color {
393|ba7bd8|        switch type {

396|6a926f|        case .error: return Color.red // Could use theme error color if available
397|3ec47f|        case .system: return themeManager.currentTheme.comment

399|5f3077|        }
400|27e597|    }

403|07464a|// MARK: - Terminal Workspace Manager
404|adc83b|
405|66e0a4|struct TerminalTab: Identifiable, Equatable {
406|91b0e8|    let id: UUID
407|e9f3bb|    var panes: [TerminalManager]
408|85b7a1|    var activePaneId: UUID
409|adc83b|
410|f9cc01|    init(panes: [TerminalManager]) {
411|19590e|        self.id = UUID()
412|50e9ea|        self.panes = panes
413|dae951|        self.activePaneId = panes.first?.id ?? UUID()
414|27e597|    }
415|adc83b|
416|969b6b|    var title: String {
417|869852|        panes.first?.title ?? "Terminal"
418|27e597|    }
419|adc83b|
420|a90d36|    static func == (lhs: TerminalTab, rhs: TerminalTab) -> Bool {
421|d0886d|        lhs.id == rhs.id
