423|b31277|}
424|adc83b|
425|fb5c90|class TerminalWorkspace: ObservableObject {
426|bef14f|    static let shared = TerminalWorkspace()
427|adc83b|
428|65ba2d|    @Published var tabs: [TerminalTab] = []
429|e129c3|    @Published var activeTabId: UUID?
430|adc83b|
431|75cc04|    var activeTabIndex: Int? {
432|1af0c1|        guard let id = activeTabId else { return nil }
433|461110|        return tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id })
434|27e597|    }
435|adc83b|
436|fd50a2|    var activeTab: TerminalTab? {
437|9011cf|        guard let idx = activeTabIndex else { return nil }
438|3fc8ba|        return tabs[idx]
439|27e597|    }
440|adc83b|
441|2a046a|    var activePane: TerminalManager? {
442|749017|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return nil }
443|e503c0|        return tab.panes.first(where: { $0.id == tab.activePaneId }) ?? tab.panes.first
444|27e597|    }
445|adc83b|
446|359b1b|    init() {
447|a198e7|        addTab() // start with one
448|27e597|    }
449|adc83b|
450|ff5787|    func addTab() {
451|d110cf|        let term = TerminalManager()
452|79d501|        term.title = "Terminal \(tabs.count + 1)"
453|208e89|        let tab = TerminalTab(panes: [term])
454|a630ed|        tabs.append(tab)
455|4370c7|        activeTabId = tab.id
456|27e597|    }
457|adc83b|
458|32d0a2|    func closeTab(id: UUID) {
459|a1d7f5|        guard let idx = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
460|dbcf27|        for pane in tabs[idx].panes {
461|dd970f|            pane.disconnect()
462|5f3077|        }
463|bf3ad9|        tabs.remove(at: idx)
464|7a2997|        if activeTabId == id {
465|04b8bb|            activeTabId = tabs.last?.id
466|5f3077|        }
467|27e597|    }
468|adc83b|
469|7f1ee2|    func setActivePane(_ paneId: UUID, in tabId: UUID) {
470|82eb46|        guard let tabIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tabId }) else { return }
471|9992f8|        tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId = paneId
472|27e597|    }
473|adc83b|
474|1ed657|    func toggleSplitActiveTab() {
475|77cde5|        guard let tabId = activeTabId else { return }
476|4956f0|        guard let idx = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tabId }) else { return }
477|adc83b|
478|ae622d|        if tabs[idx].panes.count <= 1 {
479|3f3758|            // Split: add a second pane (max 2 panes for now)
480|47c4fb|            let newPane = TerminalManager()
481|923da3|            newPane.title = "Terminal \(tabs.count).2"
482|692bfb|            tabs[idx].panes.append(newPane)
483|e67696|            tabs[idx].activePaneId = newPane.id
484|b31999|        } else {
485|1a3c65|            // Unsplit: remove all panes except the first
486|6dddf5|            let extraPanes = tabs[idx].panes.dropFirst()
487|669ba4|            for pane in extraPanes {
488|31982c|                pane.disconnect()
489|a7dc16|            }
490|941223|            tabs[idx].panes = Array(tabs[idx].panes.prefix(1))
491|cad079|            tabs[idx].activePaneId = tabs[idx].panes.first?.id ?? tabs[idx].activePaneId
492|5f3077|        }
493|27e597|    }
494|adc83b|
495|e5ad11|    func killActive() {
496|77cde5|        guard let tabId = activeTabId else { return }
497|82eb46|        guard let tabIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tabId }) else { return }
498|adc83b|
499|3861ec|        let paneId = tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId
500|3771af|        if tabs[tabIndex].panes.count > 1 {
501|ad5b37|            // If split, kill the active pane only.
502|bf8135|            if let paneIndex = tabs[tabIndex].panes.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == paneId }) {
503|5a8bea|                tabs[tabIndex].panes[paneIndex].disconnect()
504|fed5a3|                tabs[tabIndex].panes.remove(at: paneIndex)
505|a7dc16|            }
506|aa4b79|            tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId = tabs[tabIndex].panes.first?.id ?? tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId
507|adc83b|
508|7f8f51|            if tabs[tabIndex].panes.isEmpty {
509|58d66b|                closeTab(id: tabId)
510|a7dc16|            }
511|b31999|        } else {
512|cb6a91|            // If not split, kill the tab.
513|d69312|            closeTab(id: tabId)
514|5f3077|        }
515|27e597|    }
516|b31277|}

518|d5db6b|// MARK: - Terminal Manager
519|adc83b|
520|74d1c1|class TerminalManager: ObservableObject, Identifiable {
521|c90f8e|    let id = UUID()
522|af0aed|    @Published var title: String = "Terminal"
523|b4687f|    
524|31ec09|    @Published var output: [TerminalLine] = [
525|ae746a|        TerminalLine(text: "VSCode iPadOS Terminal v2.0", type: .system),
526|eeeb13|        TerminalLine(text: "Type 'help' for commands or connect via SSH (SwiftNIO).", type: .system),
527|76151f|        TerminalLine(text: "", type: .output)
528|f7d573|    ]
529|99716f|    @Published var isConnected = false
530|be0506|    @Published var isConnecting = false
531|554c2f|    @Published var connectionStatus = "Not connected"
532|2da343|    @Published var promptString = "$ "
533|2f9e71|    @Published var draftCommand: String = ""
534|b4687f|    
535|f16c3b|    private var sshManager: SSHManager?
536|d89225|    private var currentConfig: SSHConnectionConfig?
537|42c98c|    private var commandHistory: [String] = []
538|09e3b8|    private var historyIndex = 0
539|b4687f|    
540|5416f6|    func clear() {
541|2e1932|        output = []
542|27e597|    }
543|b4687f|    
544|8e9bc2|    func connect(to config: SSHConnectionConfig) {
545|3e57c9|        currentConfig = config
546|80c418|        isConnecting = true
547|e18aca|        connectionStatus = "Connecting to \(config.host)..."
548|bf4100|        title = "\(config.username)@\(config.host)"
549|d6ed84|        
550|218001|        appendOutput("Connecting to \(config.username)@\(config.host):\(config.port)...", type: .system)
551|2097e9|        appendOutput("Using SwiftNIO SSH (real SSH protocol)", type: .system)
552|d6ed84|        
553|c078b7|        sshManager = SSHManager()
554|7b5b43|        sshManager?.delegate = self
555|6b69aa|        sshManager?.connect(config: config) { [weak self] result in
556|06e424|            switch result {
557|2b2fda|            case .success:
558|7dee8d|                // Connection successful - delegate will handle UI update
559|652c30|                SSHConnectionStore.shared.updateLastUsed(config)
560|652929|            case .failure(let error):
561|ac2295|                self?.appendOutput("Connection failed: \(error.localizedDescription)", type: .error)
562|542a9d|                self?.isConnecting = false
563|370632|                self?.connectionStatus = "Connection failed"
564|a7dc16|            }
565|5f3077|        }
566|27e597|    }
567|b4687f|    
568|ade9c8|    // Legacy connect method for backward compatibility
569|8f35de|    func connect(to connection: SSHConnection) {
570|d8217a|        let authMethod: SSHConnectionConfig.SSHAuthMethod
571|cfcdef|        if let privateKey = connection.privateKey, !privateKey.isEmpty {
572|abe8fb|            authMethod = .privateKey(key: privateKey, passphrase: nil)
573|b31999|        } else {
574|81319d|            authMethod = .password(connection.password ?? "")
575|5f3077|        }
576|d6ed84|        
577|650977|        let config = SSHConnectionConfig(
578|811daa|            name: "\(connection.username)@\(connection.host)",
579|e3c9b1|            host: connection.host,
580|aababa|            port: connection.port,
581|253e2b|            username: connection.username,
582|f03d4f|            authMethod: authMethod
583|3143a4|        )
584|f55808|        connect(to: config)
585|27e597|    }
586|b4687f|    
587|55975b|    func disconnect() {
588|9da246|        sshManager?.disconnect()
589|e2702b|        sshManager = nil
590|83c6c9|        isConnected = false
591|cafdf0|        isConnecting = false
592|b898f0|        connectionStatus = "Disconnected"
593|cc0336|        promptString = "$ "
594|0ceeb0|        title = "Terminal (Disconnected)"
595|967440|        appendOutput("Disconnected from server.", type: .system)
596|27e597|    }
597|b4687f|    
598|4d3524|    func executeCommand(_ command: String) {
599|e8b2cd|        commandHistory.append(command)
600|049ad5|        historyIndex = commandHistory.count
601|d6ed84|        
602|605618|        if isConnected {
603|09f0e3|            // Don't echo command - server will echo it back
604|c99217|            sshManager?.send(command: command)
605|b31999|        } else {
606|f11ced|            appendOutput(promptString + command, type: .command)
607|3e9bf8|            processLocalCommand(command)
608|5f3077|        }
609|27e597|    }
610|b4687f|    
611|b9a892|    func sendInterrupt() {
612|605618|        if isConnected {
613|14e2bf|            sshManager?.sendInterrupt()
614|5f3077|        }
615|4b7ebc|        appendOutput("^C", type: .system)
616|27e597|    }
617|b4687f|    
618|85260e|    func sendTab() {
619|605618|        if isConnected {
620|6140fc|            sshManager?.sendTab()
621|5f3077|        }
622|27e597|    }
623|b4687f|    
624|a9ab0c|    func sendEscape() {
625|c78a4c|        sshManager?.sendEscape()
626|27e597|    }
627|b4687f|    
628|ff60c1|    func previousCommand() -> String? {
629|110e6c|        guard !commandHistory.isEmpty else { return nil }
630|e58dae|        historyIndex = max(0, historyIndex - 1)
631|349c34|        return commandHistory[historyIndex]
632|27e597|    }
633|b4687f|    
634|776e44|    func nextCommand() -> String? {
635|110e6c|        guard !commandHistory.isEmpty else { return nil }
636|cfcee6|        historyIndex = min(commandHistory.count, historyIndex + 1)
637|bd9a28|        if historyIndex >= commandHistory.count {
638|273b25|            return ""
639|5f3077|        }
640|349c34|        return commandHistory[historyIndex]
641|27e597|    }
642|b4687f|    
643|9a721f|    private func processLocalCommand(_ command: String) {
644|499317|        let parts = command.split(separator: " ", maxSplits: 1)
645|40788b|        guard let cmd = parts.first?.lowercased() else { return }
646|d6ed84|        
647|c5be0d|        switch cmd {
648|84ac7a|        case "help":
649|e25ab4|            appendOutput("""
650|742a6a|            Local Commands:
651|378490|              help              - Show this help
652|25afb7|              clear             - Clear terminal
653|007b75|              echo <text>       - Echo text
654|5edcc4|              date              - Show current date
655|6ea41d|              whoami            - Show current user
656|36311a|              history           - Show command history
657|9f0baf|              ssh               - Show SSH connection info
658|3070d1|            
659|144f70|            Connect via SSH using the network button in toolbar.
660|4a6995|            Real SSH protocol powered by SwiftNIO SSH.
661|33cb96|            """, type: .output)
662|3070d1|            
663|8d75cb|        case "clear":
664|55c3ab|            clear()
665|3070d1|            
666|629cd7|        case "echo":
667|1b5be1|            let text = parts.count > 1 ? String(parts[1]) : ""
668|b00dd0|            appendOutput(text, type: .output)
669|3070d1|            
670|f72b70|        case "date":
671|4c1e8a|            appendOutput(Date().description, type: .output)
672|3070d1|            
673|492542|        case "whoami":
674|c97efc|            appendOutput("ipad-user", type: .output)
675|3070d1|            
676|06f2cd|        case "history":
677|36fd0c|            for (index, cmd) in commandHistory.enumerated() {
678|c3e90e|                appendOutput("  \(index + 1)  \(cmd)", type: .output)
679|a7dc16|            }
680|3070d1|            
681|2f6c43|        case "ssh":
682|e25ab4|            appendOutput("""
683|558576|            SSH Status: \(isConnected ? "Connected" : "Not connected")
684|9f3dfd|            Implementation: SwiftNIO SSH (apple/swift-nio-ssh)
685|14e2c7|            Features: Password auth, Key auth, PTY support, Shell sessions
686|33cb96|            """, type: .output)
687|3070d1|            
688|520b7d|        default:
689|da445e|            appendOutput("\(cmd): command not found (local mode)", type: .error)
690|5f3077|        }
691|27e597|    }
692|b4687f|    
693|99d6fc|    func appendOutput(_ text: String, type: LineType, isANSI: Bool = false) {
694|0706d6|        DispatchQueue.main.async {
695|c63a2a|            // Split multi-line output into separate lines
696|f7effa|            let lines = text.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
697|1a16f7|            for line in lines {
698|301e4e|                if !line.isEmpty || lines.count == 1 {
699|3609d8|                    self.output.append(TerminalLine(text: line, type: type, isANSI: isANSI || line.contains("\u{1B}")))
700|4e2d32|                }
701|a7dc16|            }
702|5f3077|        }
703|27e597|    }
704|b31277|}

706|feff35|// MARK: - SSH Manager Delegate
707|9ef1f5|extension TerminalManager: SSHManagerDelegate {
708|2d04fb|    func sshManagerDidConnect(_ manager: SSHManager) {
709|0706d6|        DispatchQueue.main.async {
710|44a0c9|            self.isConnected = true
711|fa9956|            self.isConnecting = false
712|8d3b4d|            self.connectionStatus = "Connected"
713|94a3a3|            self.promptString = "" // Shell will provide prompt
714|8cab6d|            self.appendOutput("Connected successfully via SwiftNIO SSH!", type: .system)
715|5f3077|        }
716|27e597|    }
717|b4687f|    
718|826b4e|    func sshManagerDidDisconnect(_ manager: SSHManager, error: Error?) {
719|0706d6|        DispatchQueue.main.async {
720|2c082f|            self.isConnected = false
721|fa9956|            self.isConnecting = false
722|507061|            self.connectionStatus = "Disconnected"
723|ae9c8a|            self.promptString = "$ "
724|b2967c|            if let error = error {
725|1956ab|                self.appendOutput("Connection lost: \(error.localizedDescription)", type: .error)
726|a7dc16|            }
727|5f3077|        }
728|27e597|    }
729|b4687f|    
730|759518|    func sshManager(_ manager: SSHManager, didReceiveOutput text: String) {
731|c062ad|        appendOutput(text, type: .output)
732|27e597|    }
733|b4687f|    
734|7abe87|    func sshManager(_ manager: SSHManager, didReceiveError text: String) {
735|bc0a54|        appendOutput(text, type: .error)
736|27e597|    }

739|ceb8fb|// MARK: - SSH Connection View (Enhanced with Saved Connections)
740|adc83b|
741|65943c|struct SSHConnectionView: View {
742|e2d1ab|    @ObservedObject var terminal: TerminalManager
743|cf723e|    @Binding var isPresented: Bool
744|2ecc22|    @ObservedObject private var connectionStore = SSHConnectionStore.shared
745|6f45dc|    @ObservedObject private var themeManager = ThemeManager.shared
746|b4687f|    
747|b8684b|    @State private var connectionName = ""
748|5ed459|    @State private var host = ""
749|f64726|    @State private var port = "22"
750|097685|    @State private var username = ""
751|a254ba|    @State private var password = ""
752|2a95a2|    @State private var useKey = false
753|4d4789|    @State private var privateKey = ""
754|f55d77|    @State private var keyPassphrase = ""
755|de6192|    @State private var saveConnection = true
756|fdb628|    @State private var showSavedConnections = true
757|4a282f|    @State private var errorMessage: String?
758|b4687f|    
759|504e43|    var body: some View {
760|0c7ea9|        NavigationView {
761|aeeb16|            Form {
762|4327c5|                // Saved Connections Section
763|95dae6|                if !connectionStore.savedConnections.isEmpty {
764|ce9170|                    Section(header: Text("Saved Connections")) {
765|54df11|                        ForEach(connectionStore.savedConnections) { config in
766|2eb65b|                            Button(action: { connectToSaved(config) }) {
767|ccf016|                                HStack {
768|8d0337|                                    VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
769|be8aca|                                        Text(config.name)
770|ca6ecf|                                            .font(.headline)
771|7611ac|                                            .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.editorForeground)
772|bd86b4|                                        Text("\(config.username)@\(config.host):\(config.port)")
773|e4e921|                                            .font(.caption)
774|5651c5|                                            .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.comment)
775|8ab74d|                                    }
776|c7a564|                                    Spacer()
777|5c5389|                                    if case .privateKey = config.authMethod {
778|285c83|                                        Image(systemName: "key.fill")
779|e32c61|                                            .foregroundColor(.orange)
780|719c18|                                    } else {
781|6bade9|                                        Image(systemName: "lock.fill")
782|a8af62|                                            .foregroundColor(.blue)
783|8ab74d|                                    }
784|f83e05|                                }
785|89d40a|                            }
786|45088b|                            .swipeActions(edge: .trailing, allowsFullSwipe: true) {
787|296f57|                                Button(role: .destructive) {
788|b0605e|                                    connectionStore.delete(config)
789|d22f20|                                } label: {
790|f673e9|                                    Label("Delete", systemImage: "trash")
791|f83e05|                                }
792|89d40a|                            }
793|392b35|                        }
794|c9717a|                    }
795|4e2d32|                }
796|216278|                
797|7c2846|                // New Connection Section
798|6be1b3|                Section(header: Text("New Connection")) {
799|f655fc|                    TextField("Connection Name (optional)", text: $connectionName)
800|f2ff5f|                        .autocapitalization(.none)

803|f2ff5f|                        .autocapitalization(.none)
804|2afd93|                        .disableAutocorrection(true)

809|dd2193|

812|2afd93|                        .disableAutocorrection(true)
813|4e2d32|                }
814|216278|

819|c9717a|                    }
820|7a2e25|                    .pickerStyle(.segmented)
821|dd2193|                    
822|af9aa6|                    if useKey {
823|3f28ac|                        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 8) {
824|55af90|                            Text("Private Key (PEM format)")
825|5ff98f|                                .font(.caption)
826|e1b9ba|                                .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.comment)
827|e4abf2|                            
828|ce9f51|                            TextEditor(text: $privateKey)

830|987f16|                                .frame(height: 120)
831|9d784e|                                .overlay(

834|58a90d|                                )

836|279b71|                            SecureField("Key Passphrase (if encrypted)", text: $keyPassphrase)
837|392b35|                        }
838|540066|                    } else {

840|c9717a|                    }
841|4e2d32|                }
842|216278|

845|4e2d32|                }
846|216278|

850|7a5370|                            .foregroundColor(.red)
851|459f67|                            .font(.caption)
852|c9717a|                    }
853|4e2d32|                }
854|216278|                
855|65412a|                Section {
856|bb75c2|                    Button(action: connect) {
857|679877|                        HStack {
858|581e8e|                            Spacer()
859|c059d7|                            if terminal.isConnecting {

887|06d184|    private func connect() {
888|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
889|d6ed84|        
890|d8217a|        let authMethod: SSHConnectionConfig.SSHAuthMethod
891|516cf1|        if useKey {
892|1daa0f|            guard !privateKey.isEmpty else {

896|3aabb2|            authMethod = .privateKey(key: privateKey, passphrase: keyPassphrase.isEmpty ? nil : keyPassphrase)
897|b31999|        } else {

899|288d37|                errorMessage = "Please enter your password"
900|53ab34|                return
901|a7dc16|            }
902|99f80b|            authMethod = .password(password)
903|5f3077|        }
904|d6ed84|        
905|2a5113|        let name = connectionName.isEmpty ? "\(username)@\(host)" : connectionName
906|d6ed84|        
907|650977|        let config = SSHConnectionConfig(
908|b71427|            name: name,
909|77bedd|            host: host,
910|39ad81|            port: Int(port) ?? 22,
911|21cc1a|            username: username,
912|f03d4f|            authMethod: authMethod
913|3143a4|        )
914|d6ed84|

918|d6ed84|        
919|e3d025|        terminal.connect(to: config)
920|3a71db|        isPresented = false
921|27e597|    }

949|619a86|struct ANSIText: View {
950|e25e12|    let text: String
951|6f45dc|    @ObservedObject private var themeManager = ThemeManager.shared
952|b4687f|    
953|23e59f|    init(_ text: String) {
954|226b10|        self.text = text
955|27e597|    }
956|b4687f|    
957|504e43|    var body: some View {
958|32997f|        Text(stripANSI(text))
959|89a887|            .font(.system(.body, design: .monospaced))
960|2a2402|            .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.editorForeground)
961|3d9c12|            .textSelection(.enabled)
962|27e597|    }
963|b4687f|    
964|91a22d|    private func stripANSI(_ text: String) -> String {
965|e3c761|        let pattern = "\u{1B}\\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]"
966|d23a93|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else { return text }
967|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
968|de5100|        return regex.stringByReplacingMatches(in: text, range: range, withTemplate: "")
969|27e597|    }
970|b31277|}
971|adc83b|
972|40a886|// MARK: - SSH Client Implementation
973|a0a15d|// Real SSH implementation is now in Services/SSHManager.swift
974|c7f1b2|// Uses SwiftNIO SSH (apple/swift-nio-ssh) for proper SSH protocol support
975|f205ed|// Features:
976|6b5ad9|// - Password authentication
977|c690e6|// - SSH key authentication (Ed25519, ECDSA)
978|5bb526|// - PTY allocation for interactive shells
979|7b8e6d|// - Proper channel management
980|756da0|// - Terminal resize support

369|5b4bc4|    private func executeCommand() {
370|d44d42|        let command = terminal.draftCommand.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
371|23b059|        guard !command.isEmpty else { return }
372|4e7dd7|        terminal.executeCommand(command)
373|b88a67|        terminal.draftCommand = ""
374|27e597|    }

377|bc3211|struct TerminalLineView: View {

380|b4687f|    
381|504e43|    var body: some View {

386|3c6488|                .font(.system(.body, design: .monospaced))
387|fd4df0|                .foregroundColor(colorForType(line.type))
388|7916de|                .textSelection(.enabled)
389|5f3077|        }
390|27e597|    }
391|b4687f|    
392|0b8dbf|    func colorForType(_ type: LineType) -> Color {

396|6a926f|        case .error: return Color.red // Could use theme error color if available

399|5f3077|        }
400|27e597|    }

403|07464a|// MARK: - Terminal Workspace Manager
404|adc83b|
405|66e0a4|struct TerminalTab: Identifiable, Equatable {
406|91b0e8|    let id: UUID
407|e9f3bb|    var panes: [TerminalManager]
408|85b7a1|    var activePaneId: UUID
409|adc83b|
410|f9cc01|    init(panes: [TerminalManager]) {
411|19590e|        self.id = UUID()
412|50e9ea|        self.panes = panes
413|dae951|        self.activePaneId = panes.first?.id ?? UUID()
414|27e597|    }
415|adc83b|
416|969b6b|    var title: String {
417|869852|        panes.first?.title ?? "Terminal"
418|27e597|    }
419|adc83b|

423|b31277|}
424|adc83b|
425|fb5c90|class TerminalWorkspace: ObservableObject {
426|bef14f|    static let shared = TerminalWorkspace()
427|adc83b|
428|65ba2d|    @Published var tabs: [TerminalTab] = []
429|e129c3|    @Published var activeTabId: UUID?
430|adc83b|
431|75cc04|    var activeTabIndex: Int? {
432|1af0c1|        guard let id = activeTabId else { return nil }
433|461110|        return tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id })
434|27e597|    }
435|adc83b|
436|fd50a2|    var activeTab: TerminalTab? {
437|9011cf|        guard let idx = activeTabIndex else { return nil }
438|3fc8ba|        return tabs[idx]
439|27e597|    }
440|adc83b|
441|2a046a|    var activePane: TerminalManager? {
442|749017|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return nil }
443|e503c0|        return tab.panes.first(where: { $0.id == tab.activePaneId }) ?? tab.panes.first
444|27e597|    }
445|adc83b|
446|359b1b|    init() {
447|a198e7|        addTab() // start with one
448|27e597|    }
449|adc83b|
450|ff5787|    func addTab() {
451|d110cf|        let term = TerminalManager()
452|79d501|        term.title = "Terminal \(tabs.count + 1)"
453|208e89|        let tab = TerminalTab(panes: [term])
454|a630ed|        tabs.append(tab)
455|4370c7|        activeTabId = tab.id
456|27e597|    }
457|adc83b|
458|32d0a2|    func closeTab(id: UUID) {
459|a1d7f5|        guard let idx = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
460|dbcf27|        for pane in tabs[idx].panes {
461|dd970f|            pane.disconnect()
462|5f3077|        }
463|bf3ad9|        tabs.remove(at: idx)
464|7a2997|        if activeTabId == id {
465|04b8bb|            activeTabId = tabs.last?.id
466|5f3077|        }
467|27e597|    }
468|adc83b|
469|7f1ee2|    func setActivePane(_ paneId: UUID, in tabId: UUID) {
470|82eb46|        guard let tabIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tabId }) else { return }
471|9992f8|        tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId = paneId
472|27e597|    }
473|adc83b|
474|1ed657|    func toggleSplitActiveTab() {
475|77cde5|        guard let tabId = activeTabId else { return }
476|4956f0|        guard let idx = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tabId }) else { return }
477|adc83b|
478|ae622d|        if tabs[idx].panes.count <= 1 {
479|3f3758|            // Split: add a second pane (max 2 panes for now)
480|47c4fb|            let newPane = TerminalManager()
481|923da3|            newPane.title = "Terminal \(tabs.count).2"
482|692bfb|            tabs[idx].panes.append(newPane)
483|e67696|            tabs[idx].activePaneId = newPane.id
484|b31999|        } else {
485|1a3c65|            // Unsplit: remove all panes except the first
486|6dddf5|            let extraPanes = tabs[idx].panes.dropFirst()
487|669ba4|            for pane in extraPanes {
488|31982c|                pane.disconnect()
489|a7dc16|            }
490|941223|            tabs[idx].panes = Array(tabs[idx].panes.prefix(1))
491|cad079|            tabs[idx].activePaneId = tabs[idx].panes.first?.id ?? tabs[idx].activePaneId
492|5f3077|        }
493|27e597|    }
494|adc83b|
495|e5ad11|    func killActive() {
496|77cde5|        guard let tabId = activeTabId else { return }
497|82eb46|        guard let tabIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tabId }) else { return }
498|adc83b|
499|3861ec|        let paneId = tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId
500|3771af|        if tabs[tabIndex].panes.count > 1 {
501|ad5b37|            // If split, kill the active pane only.
502|bf8135|            if let paneIndex = tabs[tabIndex].panes.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == paneId }) {
503|5a8bea|                tabs[tabIndex].panes[paneIndex].disconnect()
504|fed5a3|                tabs[tabIndex].panes.remove(at: paneIndex)
505|a7dc16|            }
506|aa4b79|            tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId = tabs[tabIndex].panes.first?.id ?? tabs[tabIndex].activePaneId
507|adc83b|
508|7f8f51|            if tabs[tabIndex].panes.isEmpty {
509|58d66b|                closeTab(id: tabId)
510|a7dc16|            }
511|b31999|        } else {
512|cb6a91|            // If not split, kill the tab.
513|d69312|            closeTab(id: tabId)
514|5f3077|        }
515|27e597|    }
516|b31277|}

518|d5db6b|// MARK: - Terminal Manager
519|adc83b|
520|74d1c1|class TerminalManager: ObservableObject, Identifiable {
521|c90f8e|    let id = UUID()
522|af0aed|    @Published var title: String = "Terminal"
523|b4687f|    
524|31ec09|    @Published var output: [TerminalLine] = [
525|ae746a|        TerminalLine(text: "VSCode iPadOS Terminal v2.0", type: .system),
526|eeeb13|        TerminalLine(text: "Type 'help' for commands or connect via SSH (SwiftNIO).", type: .system),
527|76151f|        TerminalLine(text: "", type: .output)
528|f7d573|    ]
529|99716f|    @Published var isConnected = false
530|be0506|    @Published var isConnecting = false
531|554c2f|    @Published var connectionStatus = "Not connected"
532|2da343|    @Published var promptString = "$ "
533|2f9e71|    @Published var draftCommand: String = ""
534|b4687f|    
535|f16c3b|    private var sshManager: SSHManager?
536|d89225|    private var currentConfig: SSHConnectionConfig?
537|42c98c|    private var commandHistory: [String] = []
538|09e3b8|    private var historyIndex = 0
539|b4687f|    
540|5416f6|    func clear() {
541|2e1932|        output = []
542|27e597|    }
543|b4687f|    
544|8e9bc2|    func connect(to config: SSHConnectionConfig) {
545|3e57c9|        currentConfig = config
546|80c418|        isConnecting = true
547|e18aca|        connectionStatus = "Connecting to \(config.host)..."
548|bf4100|        title = "\(config.username)@\(config.host)"
549|d6ed84|        
550|218001|        appendOutput("Connecting to \(config.username)@\(config.host):\(config.port)...", type: .system)
551|2097e9|        appendOutput("Using SwiftNIO SSH (real SSH protocol)", type: .system)
552|d6ed84|        
553|c078b7|        sshManager = SSHManager()
554|7b5b43|        sshManager?.delegate = self
555|6b69aa|        sshManager?.connect(config: config) { [weak self] result in
556|06e424|            switch result {
557|2b2fda|            case .success:
558|7dee8d|                // Connection successful - delegate will handle UI update
559|652c30|                SSHConnectionStore.shared.updateLastUsed(config)
560|652929|            case .failure(let error):
561|ac2295|                self?.appendOutput("Connection failed: \(error.localizedDescription)", type: .error)
562|542a9d|                self?.isConnecting = false
563|370632|                self?.connectionStatus = "Connection failed"
564|a7dc16|            }
565|5f3077|        }
566|27e597|    }
567|b4687f|    
568|ade9c8|    // Legacy connect method for backward compatibility
569|8f35de|    func connect(to connection: SSHConnection) {
570|d8217a|        let authMethod: SSHConnectionConfig.SSHAuthMethod
571|cfcdef|        if let privateKey = connection.privateKey, !privateKey.isEmpty {
572|abe8fb|            authMethod = .privateKey(key: privateKey, passphrase: nil)
573|b31999|        } else {
574|81319d|            authMethod = .password(connection.password ?? "")
575|5f3077|        }
576|d6ed84|        
577|650977|        let config = SSHConnectionConfig(
578|811daa|            name: "\(connection.username)@\(connection.host)",
579|e3c9b1|            host: connection.host,
580|aababa|            port: connection.port,
581|253e2b|            username: connection.username,
582|f03d4f|            authMethod: authMethod
583|3143a4|        )
584|f55808|        connect(to: config)
585|27e597|    }
586|b4687f|    
587|55975b|    func disconnect() {
588|9da246|        sshManager?.disconnect()
589|e2702b|        sshManager = nil
590|83c6c9|        isConnected = false
591|cafdf0|        isConnecting = false
592|b898f0|        connectionStatus = "Disconnected"
593|cc0336|        promptString = "$ "
594|0ceeb0|        title = "Terminal (Disconnected)"
595|967440|        appendOutput("Disconnected from server.", type: .system)
596|27e597|    }
597|b4687f|    
598|4d3524|    func executeCommand(_ command: String) {
599|e8b2cd|        commandHistory.append(command)
600|049ad5|        historyIndex = commandHistory.count
601|d6ed84|        
602|605618|        if isConnected {
603|09f0e3|            // Don't echo command - server will echo it back
604|c99217|            sshManager?.send(command: command)
605|b31999|        } else {
606|f11ced|            appendOutput(promptString + command, type: .command)
607|3e9bf8|            processLocalCommand(command)
608|5f3077|        }
609|27e597|    }
610|b4687f|    
611|b9a892|    func sendInterrupt() {
612|605618|        if isConnected {
613|14e2bf|            sshManager?.sendInterrupt()
614|5f3077|        }
615|4b7ebc|        appendOutput("^C", type: .system)
616|27e597|    }
617|b4687f|    
618|85260e|    func sendTab() {
619|605618|        if isConnected {
620|6140fc|            sshManager?.sendTab()
621|5f3077|        }
622|27e597|    }
623|b4687f|    
624|a9ab0c|    func sendEscape() {
625|c78a4c|        sshManager?.sendEscape()
626|27e597|    }
627|b4687f|    
628|ff60c1|    func previousCommand() -> String? {
629|110e6c|        guard !commandHistory.isEmpty else { return nil }
630|e58dae|        historyIndex = max(0, historyIndex - 1)
631|349c34|        return commandHistory[historyIndex]
632|27e597|    }
633|b4687f|    
634|776e44|    func nextCommand() -> String? {
635|110e6c|        guard !commandHistory.isEmpty else { return nil }
636|cfcee6|        historyIndex = min(commandHistory.count, historyIndex + 1)
637|bd9a28|        if historyIndex >= commandHistory.count {
638|273b25|            return ""
639|5f3077|        }
640|349c34|        return commandHistory[historyIndex]
641|27e597|    }
642|b4687f|    
643|9a721f|    private func processLocalCommand(_ command: String) {
644|499317|        let parts = command.split(separator: " ", maxSplits: 1)
645|40788b|        guard let cmd = parts.first?.lowercased() else { return }
646|d6ed84|        
647|c5be0d|        switch cmd {
648|84ac7a|        case "help":
649|e25ab4|            appendOutput("""
650|742a6a|            Local Commands:
651|378490|              help              - Show this help
652|25afb7|              clear             - Clear terminal
653|007b75|              echo <text>       - Echo text
654|5edcc4|              date              - Show current date
655|6ea41d|              whoami            - Show current user
656|36311a|              history           - Show command history
657|9f0baf|              ssh               - Show SSH connection info
658|3070d1|            
659|144f70|            Connect via SSH using the network button in toolbar.
660|4a6995|            Real SSH protocol powered by SwiftNIO SSH.
661|33cb96|            """, type: .output)
662|3070d1|            
663|8d75cb|        case "clear":
664|55c3ab|            clear()
665|3070d1|            
666|629cd7|        case "echo":
667|1b5be1|            let text = parts.count > 1 ? String(parts[1]) : ""
668|b00dd0|            appendOutput(text, type: .output)
669|3070d1|            
670|f72b70|        case "date":
671|4c1e8a|            appendOutput(Date().description, type: .output)
672|3070d1|            
673|492542|        case "whoami":
674|c97efc|            appendOutput("ipad-user", type: .output)
675|3070d1|            
676|06f2cd|        case "history":
677|36fd0c|            for (index, cmd) in commandHistory.enumerated() {
678|c3e90e|                appendOutput("  \(index + 1)  \(cmd)", type: .output)
679|a7dc16|            }
680|3070d1|            
681|2f6c43|        case "ssh":
682|e25ab4|            appendOutput("""
683|558576|            SSH Status: \(isConnected ? "Connected" : "Not connected")
684|9f3dfd|            Implementation: SwiftNIO SSH (apple/swift-nio-ssh)
685|14e2c7|            Features: Password auth, Key auth, PTY support, Shell sessions
686|33cb96|            """, type: .output)
687|3070d1|            
688|520b7d|        default:
689|da445e|            appendOutput("\(cmd): command not found (local mode)", type: .error)
690|5f3077|        }
691|27e597|    }
692|b4687f|    
693|99d6fc|    func appendOutput(_ text: String, type: LineType, isANSI: Bool = false) {
694|0706d6|        DispatchQueue.main.async {
695|c63a2a|            // Split multi-line output into separate lines
696|f7effa|            let lines = text.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
697|1a16f7|            for line in lines {
698|301e4e|                if !line.isEmpty || lines.count == 1 {
699|3609d8|                    self.output.append(TerminalLine(text: line, type: type, isANSI: isANSI || line.contains("\u{1B}")))
700|4e2d32|                }
701|a7dc16|            }
702|5f3077|        }
703|27e597|    }
704|b31277|}

706|feff35|// MARK: - SSH Manager Delegate
707|9ef1f5|extension TerminalManager: SSHManagerDelegate {
708|2d04fb|    func sshManagerDidConnect(_ manager: SSHManager) {
709|0706d6|        DispatchQueue.main.async {
710|44a0c9|            self.isConnected = true
711|fa9956|            self.isConnecting = false
712|8d3b4d|            self.connectionStatus = "Connected"
713|94a3a3|            self.promptString = "" // Shell will provide prompt
714|8cab6d|            self.appendOutput("Connected successfully via SwiftNIO SSH!", type: .system)
715|5f3077|        }
716|27e597|    }
717|b4687f|    
718|826b4e|    func sshManagerDidDisconnect(_ manager: SSHManager, error: Error?) {
719|0706d6|        DispatchQueue.main.async {
720|2c082f|            self.isConnected = false
721|fa9956|            self.isConnecting = false
722|507061|            self.connectionStatus = "Disconnected"
723|ae9c8a|            self.promptString = "$ "
724|b2967c|            if let error = error {
725|1956ab|                self.appendOutput("Connection lost: \(error.localizedDescription)", type: .error)
726|a7dc16|            }
727|5f3077|        }
728|27e597|    }
729|b4687f|    
730|759518|    func sshManager(_ manager: SSHManager, didReceiveOutput text: String) {
731|c062ad|        appendOutput(text, type: .output)
732|27e597|    }
733|b4687f|    
734|7abe87|    func sshManager(_ manager: SSHManager, didReceiveError text: String) {
735|bc0a54|        appendOutput(text, type: .error)
736|27e597|    }
737|b31277|}

739|ceb8fb|// MARK: - SSH Connection View (Enhanced with Saved Connections)
740|adc83b|
741|65943c|struct SSHConnectionView: View {
742|e2d1ab|    @ObservedObject var terminal: TerminalManager
743|cf723e|    @Binding var isPresented: Bool
744|2ecc22|    @ObservedObject private var connectionStore = SSHConnectionStore.shared
745|6f45dc|    @ObservedObject private var themeManager = ThemeManager.shared
746|b4687f|    
747|b8684b|    @State private var connectionName = ""
748|5ed459|    @State private var host = ""
749|f64726|    @State private var port = "22"
750|097685|    @State private var username = ""
751|a254ba|    @State private var password = ""
752|2a95a2|    @State private var useKey = false
753|4d4789|    @State private var privateKey = ""
754|f55d77|    @State private var keyPassphrase = ""
755|de6192|    @State private var saveConnection = true
756|fdb628|    @State private var showSavedConnections = true
757|4a282f|    @State private var errorMessage: String?
758|b4687f|    
759|504e43|    var body: some View {
760|0c7ea9|        NavigationView {
761|aeeb16|            Form {
762|4327c5|                // Saved Connections Section
763|95dae6|                if !connectionStore.savedConnections.isEmpty {
764|ce9170|                    Section(header: Text("Saved Connections")) {
765|54df11|                        ForEach(connectionStore.savedConnections) { config in
766|2eb65b|                            Button(action: { connectToSaved(config) }) {
767|ccf016|                                HStack {
768|8d0337|                                    VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
769|be8aca|                                        Text(config.name)
770|ca6ecf|                                            .font(.headline)
771|7611ac|                                            .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.editorForeground)
772|bd86b4|                                        Text("\(config.username)@\(config.host):\(config.port)")
773|e4e921|                                            .font(.caption)
774|5651c5|                                            .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.comment)
775|8ab74d|                                    }
776|c7a564|                                    Spacer()
777|5c5389|                                    if case .privateKey = config.authMethod {
778|285c83|                                        Image(systemName: "key.fill")
779|e32c61|                                            .foregroundColor(.orange)
780|719c18|                                    } else {
781|6bade9|                                        Image(systemName: "lock.fill")
782|a8af62|                                            .foregroundColor(.blue)
783|8ab74d|                                    }
784|f83e05|                                }
785|89d40a|                            }
786|45088b|                            .swipeActions(edge: .trailing, allowsFullSwipe: true) {
787|296f57|                                Button(role: .destructive) {
788|b0605e|                                    connectionStore.delete(config)
789|d22f20|                                } label: {
790|f673e9|                                    Label("Delete", systemImage: "trash")
791|f83e05|                                }
792|89d40a|                            }
793|392b35|                        }
794|c9717a|                    }
795|4e2d32|                }
796|216278|                
797|7c2846|                // New Connection Section
798|6be1b3|                Section(header: Text("New Connection")) {
799|f655fc|                    TextField("Connection Name (optional)", text: $connectionName)
800|f2ff5f|                        .autocapitalization(.none)
801|dd2193|                    
802|ad1bae|                    TextField("Host", text: $host)
803|f2ff5f|                        .autocapitalization(.none)
804|2afd93|                        .disableAutocorrection(true)
805|9193a5|                        .keyboardType(.URL)
806|dd2193|                    
807|bd17e9|                    TextField("Port", text: $port)
808|f90d9b|                        .keyboardType(.numberPad)
809|dd2193|                    
810|93ebd5|                    TextField("Username", text: $username)
811|f2ff5f|                        .autocapitalization(.none)
812|2afd93|                        .disableAutocorrection(true)
813|4e2d32|                }
814|216278|

819|c9717a|                    }
820|7a2e25|                    .pickerStyle(.segmented)
821|dd2193|                    
822|af9aa6|                    if useKey {

824|55af90|                            Text("Private Key (PEM format)")
825|5ff98f|                                .font(.caption)
826|e1b9ba|                                .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.comment)
827|e4abf2|                            
828|ce9f51|                            TextEditor(text: $privateKey)
829|a131a0|                                .font(.system(.caption, design: .monospaced))
830|987f16|                                .frame(height: 120)
831|9d784e|                                .overlay(
832|da9c0c|                                    RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 8)

834|58a90d|                                )

836|279b71|                            SecureField("Key Passphrase (if encrypted)", text: $keyPassphrase)
837|392b35|                        }
838|540066|                    } else {

840|c9717a|                    }
841|4e2d32|                }
842|216278|

845|4e2d32|                }
846|216278|

949|619a86|struct ANSIText: View {
950|e25e12|    let text: String
951|6f45dc|    @ObservedObject private var themeManager = ThemeManager.shared
952|b4687f|    
953|23e59f|    init(_ text: String) {
954|226b10|        self.text = text
955|27e597|    }
956|b4687f|    
957|504e43|    var body: some View {
958|32997f|        Text(stripANSI(text))
959|89a887|            .font(.system(.body, design: .monospaced))
960|2a2402|            .foregroundColor(themeManager.currentTheme.editorForeground)
961|3d9c12|            .textSelection(.enabled)
962|27e597|    }
963|b4687f|    
964|91a22d|    private func stripANSI(_ text: String) -> String {
965|e3c761|        let pattern = "\u{1B}\\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]"
966|d23a93|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else { return text }
967|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
968|de5100|        return regex.stringByReplacingMatches(in: text, range: range, withTemplate: "")
969|27e597|    }
970|b31277|}
971|adc83b|
972|40a886|// MARK: - SSH Client Implementation
973|a0a15d|// Real SSH implementation is now in Services/SSHManager.swift
974|c7f1b2|// Uses SwiftNIO SSH (apple/swift-nio-ssh) for proper SSH protocol support
975|f205ed|// Features:
976|6b5ad9|// - Password authentication
977|c690e6|// - SSH key authentication (Ed25519, ECDSA)
978|5bb526|// - PTY allocation for interactive shells
979|7b8e6d|// - Proper channel management
980|756da0|// - Terminal resize support

34|5f447c|        // Create a small, stable set of files that are safe to open.
35|460d36|        let fm = FileManager.default

37|5bf775|            .appendingPathComponent("VSCodeiPadOS-UITests", isDirectory: true)

44|e4ad8a|                try? contents.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
45|a7dc16|            }
46|f185c6|            return url

51|adc83b|

53|f8cfd4|            QuickOpenItem(name: "UITest-A.txt", path: "", url: fileA, isOpen: false, language: CodeLanguage(from: "txt")),

102|5f3077|        }

80|522862|    /// Creates SwiftUI AttributedString from ANSI attributes
81|4957d9|    private func ansiAttributedText(attributes: [NSRange: [NSAttributedString.Key: Any]]) -> some View {
82|1416d6|        var result = AttributedString(line.text)
83|d6ed84|        
84|3cbfd2|        for (range, attrs) in attributes {
85|8d2b53|            guard let swiftRange = Range(range, in: line.text) else { continue }
86|24741e|            let attrRange = AttributedString.Index(swiftRange.lowerBound, within: result)!..<AttributedString.Index(swiftRange.upperBound, within: result)!
87|3070d1|            
88|f5654b|            var container = AttributeContainer()
89|3070d1|            
90|2109ce|            if let color = attrs[.foregroundColor] as? Color {
91|d87e29|                container.foregroundColor = color
92|a7dc16|            }
93|3fa898|            if let bgColor = attrs[.backgroundColor] as? Color {
94|0a1c11|                container.backgroundColor = bgColor
95|a7dc16|            }
96|8778cb|            if let font = attrs[.font] as? Font {
97|5fa111|                container.font = font
98|a7dc16|            }
99|3070d1|            
100|a35a27|            result[attrRange].setAttributes(container)
101|5f3077|        }
102|d6ed84|        
103|39cb71|        return Text(result)
104|8d4029|            .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
105|3a4b18|            .lineLimit(wordWrap ? nil : 1)
106|27e597|    }

124|adc83b|

132|613a45|    private let fileURL: URL

143|a9cbbb|    @State private var blameByLine: [Int: GitBlameLine] = [:]

145|fb99ae|    public init(
146|26bd01|        fileURL: URL,
147|eeb341|        visibleLineRange: Range<Int>,
148|24de46|        lineHeight: CGFloat,

150|c0fe43|        selectedLine: Int? = nil,
151|c45746|        refreshToken: AnyHashable = 0,
152|adff75|        configuration: Configuration = .init(),

165|a2c94e|    public var body: some View {
166|250bf4|        HStack(spacing: 0) {
167|7e68b3|            if configuration.showsDiffIndicators {
168|d4e5d8|                diffGutter
169|09ce20|                    .frame(width: configuration.gutterWidth)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|adc83b|
172|3c96c0|            if configuration.showsInlineBlame {
173|316edd|                inlineBlameColumn
174|a7dc16|            }
175|5f3077|        }
176|622408|        // Reload when:
177|453b6c|        // - file changes
178|1cd8ae|        // - refreshToken changes (host signals content/git refresh)
179|661d58|        .task(id: fileURL) {
180|a01b72|            await reloadAll(force: true)
181|5f3077|        }
182|898172|        .task(id: refreshToken) {
183|a01b72|            await reloadAll(force: true)
184|5f3077|        }
185|27e597|    }
186|adc83b|
187|3b223e|    private var diffGutter: some View {
188|8eb6a2|        GeometryReader { _ in
189|f47dba|            Canvas { context, size in
190|f2e3c7|                guard !visibleLineRange.isEmpty else { return }
191|adc83b|
192|1d1279|                let w = size.width
193|6cfee9|                let corner = configuration.gutterCornerRadius
194|adc83b|
195|c4be89|                for line in visibleLineRange {
196|1a6571|                    if let kind = changesByLine[line] {
197|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
198|398690|                        let rect = CGRect(x: 0, y: y, width: w, height: max(1, lineHeight))
199|3e9bba|                        let path = Path(roundedRect: rect, cornerRadius: corner)
200|d14140|                        context.fill(path, with: .color(color(for: kind)))
201|c9717a|                    }
202|adc83b|
203|d80c45|                    // Deleted markers are drawn as triangles at the boundary.
204|d77c52|                    if deletedMarkers.contains(line) {
205|7acfe4|                        let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(line - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
206|f6ef50|                        var p = Path()
207|9c8d93|                        p.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y))
208|6c103f|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: w, y: y + (lineHeight * 0.5)))
209|4b3b60|                        p.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y + lineHeight))
210|eef458|                        p.closeSubpath()
211|c248e0|                        context.fill(p, with: .color(configuration.deletedColor))
212|c9717a|                    }
213|4e2d32|                }
214|a7dc16|            }
215|5f3077|        }
216|160ee5|        .accessibilityLabel("Git diff gutter")
217|27e597|    }
218|adc83b|
219|674c96|    private var inlineBlameColumn: some View {
220|6cfec8|        ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
221|1bb412|            if let selectedLine,
222|42e193|               let blame = blameByLine[selectedLine],
223|c9b8d8|               visibleLineRange.contains(selectedLine) {
224|3b4316|                let y = contentTopInset + CGFloat(selectedLine - visibleLineRange.lowerBound) * lineHeight
225|adc83b|
226|c9d472|                inlineBlameLabel(for: blame)
227|dcef2f|                    .frame(maxWidth: configuration.inlineBlameMaxWidth, alignment: .leading)
228|6cd76a|                    .offset(x: configuration.inlineBlameLeadingPadding, y: y)
229|9459d4|                    .allowsHitTesting(false)
230|a7dc16|            }
231|5f3077|        }
232|4b367a|        .padding(.trailing, configuration.inlineBlameTrailingPadding)
233|cb4047|        .accessibilityLabel("Inline git blame")
234|27e597|    }
235|adc83b|
236|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
237|df7a5a|    private func inlineBlameLabel(for blame: GitBlameLine) -> some View {
238|c585c3|        let commitShort = String(blame.commit.prefix(8))
239|932efb|        let author = blame.author.isEmpty ? "Unknown" : blame.author
240|0dcb9b|        let summary = blame.summary
241|adc83b|
242|6cccbe|        Text("\(author) \(commitShort) — \(summary)")
243|d9ac71|            .font(configuration.inlineBlameFont)
244|2101a6|            .foregroundStyle(configuration.inlineBlameTextColor)
245|96ccb2|            .lineLimit(1)

267|71cc09|            do {
268|fca72e|                let diff = try await dataSource.diff(fileURL, force)

272|fa601b|                for c in diff {
273|c2ffec|                    switch c.kind {
274|824c69|                    case .deleted:

278|c9717a|                    }
279|4e2d32|                }

283|91b9a2|            } catch {

286|a7dc16|            }

288|adc83b|

294|91b9a2|            } catch {
295|262f69|                self.blameByLine = [:]
296|a7dc16|            }
297|5f3077|        }
298|27e597|    }

301|ca292c|// MARK: - Minimal Git wrappers (CLI-backed)
302|adc83b|
303|3fdc54|private enum GitError: Error, LocalizedError {
304|ad379b|    case notARepository
305|cc3a27|    case commandFailed(String)
306|adc83b|
307|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
308|2e6d08|        switch self {
309|d6bd44|        case .notARepository:
310|c737e7|            return "Not a git repository"
311|84e7f9|        case .commandFailed(let msg):
312|97e6c2|            return "Git command failed: \(msg)"
313|5f3077|        }
314|27e597|    }
315|b31277|}
316|adc83b|
317|e83eda|private struct GitShell {
318|36bf91|    static func runGit(args: [String], in workingDirectory: URL) async throws -> String {
319|fb15d6|        #if os(macOS) || targetEnvironment(macCatalyst) || os(Linux)
320|c9b222|        return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { cont in
321|13023b|            let process = Process()
322|9dce62|            process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/usr/bin/env")
323|6980d1|            process.arguments = ["git"] + args
324|349037|            process.currentDirectoryURL = workingDirectory
325|adc83b|
326|440eab|            let outPipe = Pipe()
327|7e6031|            let errPipe = Pipe()
328|a6bd70|            process.standardOutput = outPipe
329|203afe|            process.standardError = errPipe
330|adc83b|
331|71cc09|            do {
332|eee8fb|                try process.run()
333|91b9a2|            } catch {
334|1d8745|                cont.resume(throwing: GitError.commandFailed("Unable to launch git"))
335|53ab34|                return
336|a7dc16|            }
337|adc83b|
338|2d3dad|            process.terminationHandler = { p in
339|ac2e77|                let outData = outPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
340|b22e9b|                let errData = errPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile()
341|adc83b|
342|b7139c|                let out = String(data: outData, encoding: .utf8) ?? ""
343|3079dc|                let err = String(data: errData, encoding: .utf8) ?? ""
344|adc83b|
345|4e1e82|                if p.terminationStatus == 0 {
346|a411dd|                    cont.resume(returning: out)
347|fdd0e2|                } else {
348|1759a5|                    let msg = err.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
349|4befeb|                    cont.resume(throwing: GitError.commandFailed(msg.isEmpty ? out : msg))
350|4e2d32|                }
351|a7dc16|            }
352|5f3077|        }
353|f6012e|        #else
354|459a57|        throw GitError.commandFailed("Git execution is not available on this platform")
355|6a3e13|        #endif
356|27e597|    }
357|adc83b|
358|ce4ef6|    static func repoRoot(containing fileURL: URL) async throws -> URL {
359|912523|        let dir = fileURL.deletingLastPathComponent()
360|1a9799|        let out = try await runGit(args: ["-C", dir.path, "rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"], in: dir)
361|fe3a8f|        let rootPath = out.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
362|58de76|        if rootPath.isEmpty { throw GitError.notARepository }
363|564829|        return URL(fileURLWithPath: rootPath)
364|27e597|    }
365|b31277|}
366|adc83b|
367|88bc2f|// MARK: - Diff
368|adc83b|
369|3ed794|private actor GitDiffService {
370|e143c5|    static let shared = GitDiffService()
371|adc83b|
372|d55783|    private var cache: [String: [GitLineChange]] = [:] // key: repoRoot + fileRelPath
373|adc83b|
374|348ef2|    func invalidate(forFile fileURL: URL) async {
375|4da690|        do {
376|a7d18f|            let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
377|c274c2|            let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
378|37ccff|            let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
379|5c07e2|            cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
380|853889|        } catch {
381|0ef52b|            // ignore
382|5f3077|        }
383|27e597|    }
384|adc83b|
385|5ad013|    func lineChanges(forFile fileURL: URL) async throws -> [GitLineChange] {
386|84184f|        let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
387|7cb904|        let relPath = Self.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
388|471cce|        let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
389|adc83b|
390|04a632|        if let cached = cache[key] { return cached }
391|adc83b|
392|18475b|        // Unified=0 makes hunks contain only the changed lines, simplifying mapping.
393|471a19|        let diff = try await GitShell.runGit(
394|0211d7|            args: ["-C", repoRoot.path, "diff", "--unified=0", "--no-color", "--", relPath],
395|2f85ba|            in: repoRoot
396|3143a4|        )
397|adc83b|
398|cb6bb6|        let parsed = Self.parseUnifiedZeroDiff(diff)
399|fd7b4b|        cache[key] = parsed
400|4686f7|        return parsed
401|27e597|    }
402|adc83b|
403|7f38bd|    fileprivate static func relativePath(_ fileURL: URL, _ repoRoot: URL) -> String {
404|d34cf8|        let filePath = fileURL.standardizedFileURL.path
405|d236cb|        let rootPath = repoRoot.standardizedFileURL.path
406|87d341|        if filePath.hasPrefix(rootPath + "/") {
407|c8ae11|            return String(filePath.dropFirst(rootPath.count + 1))
408|5f3077|        }
409|231fb2|        return fileURL.lastPathComponent
410|27e597|    }
411|adc83b|
412|4ab2d0|    /// Parse output from: `git diff --unified=0 --no-color -- <file>`.
413|2cbc84|    ///
414|043652|    /// Heuristic classification per hunk:
415|e6cab5|    /// - oldCount==0,newCount>0 -> .added on new range
416|830185|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount>0 -> .modified on new range
417|d827b0|    /// - oldCount>0,newCount==0 -> .deleted marker at newStart
418|e30ee3|    private static func parseUnifiedZeroDiff(_ text: String) -> [GitLineChange] {
419|0c442a|        var results: [GitLineChange] = []
420|adc83b|
421|5283b2|        // Example hunk header (unified=0):
422|61ad0c|        // @@ -12,2 +12,3 @@
423|960d91|        // or @@ -12 +12 @@
424|53c1fb|        for raw in text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
425|338332|            let line = String(raw)
426|566e9f|            guard line.hasPrefix("@@"), let h = parseHunkHeader(line) else { continue }
427|adc83b|
428|ce5131|            if h.oldCount == 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
429|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
430|c93a02|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .added))
431|4e2d32|                }
432|688fe3|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount > 0 {
433|5447be|                for n in 0..<h.newCount {
434|9de390|                    results.append(.init(line: h.newStart + n, kind: .modified))
435|4e2d32|                }
436|b8c2f6|            } else if h.oldCount > 0 && h.newCount == 0 {
437|d2860f|                results.append(.init(line: max(1, h.newStart), kind: .deleted))
438|a7dc16|            }
439|5f3077|        }
440|adc83b|
441|877b21|        // De-dupe (prefer modified over added if collision).
442|d9be21|        var byLine: [Int: GitLineChangeKind] = [:]
443|9c02f9|        var deleted: Set<Int> = []
444|6ab11d|        for r in results {
445|b275dd|            switch r.kind {
446|e08d5d|            case .deleted:
447|22dea6|                deleted.insert(r.line)
448|0ad1c2|            case .added:
449|2faf5e|                if byLine[r.line] == nil { byLine[r.line] = .added }
450|909e67|            case .modified:
451|35bde7|                byLine[r.line] = .modified
452|a7dc16|            }
453|5f3077|        }
454|adc83b|
455|cbba29|        var merged: [GitLineChange] = []
456|8455c8|        for (line, kind) in byLine { merged.append(.init(line: line, kind: kind)) }
457|303285|        for d in deleted { merged.append(.init(line: d, kind: .deleted)) }
458|adc83b|
459|2c2d8a|        return merged.sorted { $0.line < $1.line }
460|27e597|    }
461|adc83b|
462|04b6a6|    private struct Hunk {
463|703f57|        var oldStart: Int
464|9021d9|        var oldCount: Int
465|5918d9|        var newStart: Int
466|c74eb3|        var newCount: Int
467|27e597|    }
468|adc83b|
469|c5499e|    private static func parseHunkHeader(_ header: String) -> Hunk? {
470|ba73ec|        // Header format: @@ -oldStart,oldCount +newStart,newCount @@ ...
471|7417bc|        // Counts may be omitted: -12 +12
472|ecf5bf|        guard let rangeStart = header.range(of: "@@") else { return nil }
473|7c0e7f|        guard let rangeEnd = header.range(of: "@@", options: [], range: rangeStart.upperBound..<header.endIndex) else { return nil }
474|8445bb|        let body = header[rangeStart.upperBound..<rangeEnd.lowerBound].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
475|adc83b|
476|d7518c|        let parts = body.split(separator: " ")
477|246d66|        guard parts.count >= 2 else { return nil }
478|adc83b|
479|305ea0|        func parsePart(_ s: Substring, prefix: Character) -> (Int, Int)? {
480|358d18|            guard s.first == prefix else { return nil }
481|f55934|            let rest = s.dropFirst()
482|66d2d2|            if let comma = rest.firstIndex(of: ",") {
483|8b33f9|                let a = rest[..<comma]
484|95dc6a|                let b = rest[rest.index(after: comma)...]
485|17c68e|                guard let start = Int(a), let count = Int(b) else { return nil }
486|08311d|                return (start, count)
487|f5a6eb|            } else {
488|104757|                guard let start = Int(rest) else { return nil }
489|b303d1|                return (start, 1)
490|a7dc16|            }
491|5f3077|        }
492|adc83b|
493|c2352c|        guard let old = parsePart(parts[0], prefix: "-") else { return nil }
494|868552|        guard let new = parsePart(parts[1], prefix: "+") else { return nil }
495|1713af|        return Hunk(oldStart: old.0, oldCount: old.1, newStart: new.0, newCount: new.1)
496|27e597|    }
497|b31277|}
498|adc83b|
499|a7cfe8|// MARK: - Blame
500|adc83b|
501|e87ea1|private actor GitBlameService {
502|0260b4|    static let shared = GitBlameService()
503|adc83b|
504|1e6b1d|    private var cache: [String: [GitBlameLine]] = [:] // key: repoRoot + fileRelPath
505|adc83b|
506|348ef2|    func invalidate(forFile fileURL: URL) async {
507|4da690|        do {
508|a7d18f|            let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
509|cefda3|            let relPath = GitDiffService.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
510|37ccff|            let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
511|5c07e2|            cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
512|853889|        } catch {
513|0ef52b|            // ignore
514|5f3077|        }
515|27e597|    }
516|adc83b|
517|102596|    func blame(forFile fileURL: URL) async throws -> [GitBlameLine] {
518|84184f|        let repoRoot = try await GitShell.repoRoot(containing: fileURL)
519|be393e|        let relPath = GitDiffService.relativePath(fileURL, repoRoot)
520|471cce|        let key = repoRoot.path + "::" + relPath
521|adc83b|
522|04a632|        if let cached = cache[key] { return cached }
523|adc83b|
524|5df987|        let out = try await GitShell.runGit(
525|e1fef9|            args: ["-C", repoRoot.path, "blame", "--line-porcelain", "--", relPath],
526|2f85ba|            in: repoRoot
527|3143a4|        )
528|adc83b|
529|eb299c|        let parsed = Self.parseLinePorcelain(out)
530|fd7b4b|        cache[key] = parsed
531|4686f7|        return parsed
532|27e597|    }
533|adc83b|
534|5b8e3d|    private static func parseLinePorcelain(_ text: String) -> [GitBlameLine] {
535|df70a3|        // Format (porcelain):
536|d0babc|        // <sha> <origLine> <finalLine> <numLines>
537|fd523f|        // author <name>
538|407206|        // author-time <unix>
539|6d5fc5|        // summary <text>
540|ee16bf|        // ...
541|312b42|        // \t<source line>
542|47e69c|        // (then additional \t lines if <numLines> > 1)
543|adc83b|
544|ea5373|        var results: [GitBlameLine] = []
545|adc83b|
546|08428a|        var currentCommit: String = ""
547|6a21c1|        var currentAuthor: String = ""
548|edf098|        var currentAuthorTime: Date?
549|a1305c|        var currentSummary: String = ""
550|adc83b|
551|8b0ddd|        var pendingFinalLine: Int?
552|afb9b4|        var pendingRemaining: Int = 0
553|adc83b|
554|79246a|        func isHexString(_ s: Substring) -> Bool {
555|9e5fb7|            !s.isEmpty && s.allSatisfy { $0.isHexDigit }
556|5f3077|        }
557|adc83b|
558|1b00b6|        func emitOneLineIfPossible() {
559|0a458d|            guard pendingRemaining > 0,
560|99e082|                  let ln = pendingFinalLine,
561|56bbe2|                  !currentCommit.isEmpty else { return }
562|adc83b|
563|fd4da5|            results.append(
564|097c0e|                GitBlameLine(
565|6f7c36|                    line: ln,
566|26bf7c|                    commit: currentCommit,
567|3662a1|                    author: currentAuthor,
568|50c5da|                    authorTime: currentAuthorTime,
569|dd93dd|                    summary: currentSummary
570|6f642e|                )
571|43d041|            )
572|adc83b|
573|0b9ee3|            pendingFinalLine = ln + 1
574|c7cebe|            pendingRemaining -= 1
575|adc83b|
576|c83759|            if pendingRemaining == 0 {
577|f88042|                pendingFinalLine = nil
578|eba976|                currentCommit = ""
579|0d42dc|                currentAuthor = ""
580|0715f9|                currentAuthorTime = nil
581|33c8d7|                currentSummary = ""
582|a7dc16|            }
583|5f3077|        }
584|adc83b|
585|53c1fb|        for raw in text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false) {
586|338332|            let line = String(raw)
587|adc83b|
588|251111|            if line.hasPrefix("\t") {
589|001c3e|                emitOneLineIfPossible()
590|1df510|                continue
591|a7dc16|            }
592|adc83b|
593|6aa6c7|            // Header line:
594|44d4c8|            // <sha> <origLine> <finalLine> <numLines>
595|ac0a66|            // (some variants may omit <numLines>; treat as 1)
596|cbc8d9|            let parts = line.split(separator: " ")
597|5ce5e6|            if parts.count >= 3,
598|8abcbe|               isHexString(parts[0]),
599|f49573|               Int(parts[1]) != nil,
600|f170d7|               let final = Int(parts[2]) {
601|f1b98a|                currentCommit = String(parts[0])
602|ab622d|                pendingFinalLine = final
603|189881|                pendingRemaining = (parts.count >= 4 ? Int(parts[3]) : nil) ?? 1
604|1df510|                continue
605|a7dc16|            }
606|adc83b|
607|77e2a1|            if line.hasPrefix("author ") {
608|d4a57a|                currentAuthor = String(line.dropFirst("author ".count))
609|6a62c8|            } else if line.hasPrefix("author-time ") {
610|4416ac|                let ts = String(line.dropFirst("author-time ".count))
611|39954c|                if let t = TimeInterval(ts) {
612|d16dcd|                    currentAuthorTime = Date(timeIntervalSince1970: t)
613|4e2d32|                }
614|f4e3fa|            } else if line.hasPrefix("summary ") {
615|a63d16|                currentSummary = String(line.dropFirst("summary ".count))
616|a7dc16|            }
617|5f3077|        }
618|adc83b|
619|e40d81|        return results.sorted { $0.line < $1.line }
620|27e597|    }
621|b31277|}
622|adc83b|

61|27e597|    }
62|b4687f|    
63|3e588a|    private func loadContent() {
64|cb87f9|        // Extract context: 5 lines before, definition, 5 lines after
65|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
66|43159b|        guard !lines.isEmpty else {
67|02e9b0|            attributedContent = NSAttributedString(string: "// Empty file")
68|bef5d6|            return
69|5f3077|        }
70|d6ed84|        
71|69e4fd|        // Clamp targetLine to valid range first to prevent inverted bounds
72|4aab10|        let safeTargetLine = min(max(0, targetLine), lines.count - 1)
73|a55883|        let startLine = max(0, safeTargetLine - 5)
74|7f5161|        let endLine = min(lines.count - 1, safeTargetLine + 5)
75|d6ed84|        
76|65df53|        // Safety check: ensure valid range (startLine <= endLine)
77|29c2b5|        guard startLine <= endLine else {
78|b64281|            attributedContent = NSAttributedString(string: "// Line out of range")
79|bef5d6|            return
80|5f3077|        }
81|d6ed84|        
82|b71f09|        let contextLines = lines[startLine...endLine]
83|5477c1|        let contextString = contextLines.joined(separator: "\n")
84|d6ed84|        
85|eff2fc|        // Highlight
86|865eb0|        let highlighter = VSCodeSyntaxHighlighter(theme: ThemeManager.shared.currentTheme)
87|f7ffd6|        attributedContent = highlighter.highlight(contextString, filename: targetFile)
88|27e597|    }
89|b31277|}
90|adc83b|
91|32f12e|// Extension to support specific border sides
92|cbdbb5|extension View {
93|962d7b|    func border(width: CGFloat, edges: [Edge], color: Color) -> some View {
94|ad2e00|        overlay(EdgeBorder(width: width, edges: edges).foregroundColor(color))
95|27e597|    }
96|b31277|}
97|adc83b|
98|acc513|struct EdgeBorder: Shape {
99|8bfe59|    var width: CGFloat
100|a1903d|    var edges: [Edge]
101|adc83b|
102|aba5af|    func path(in rect: CGRect) -> Path {
103|4cfee1|        var path = Path()
104|7312e1|        for edge in edges {
105|d704c2|            var x: CGFloat { edge == .trailing ? rect.width - width : 0 }
106|942655|            var y: CGFloat { edge == .bottom ? rect.height - width : 0 }
107|ef3ff0|            var w: CGFloat { edge == .leading || edge == .trailing ? width : rect.width }
108|4b861a|            var h: CGFloat { edge == .top || edge == .bottom ? width : rect.height }
109|046431|            path.addRect(CGRect(x: x, y: y, width: w, height: h))
110|5f3077|        }
111|2a6f12|        return path
112|27e597|    }
113|b31277|}

255|19c0f6|                    .onChanged { value in

2|e45c97|//  VSCodeiPadOS
3|8d0643|//
4|279cbf|//  Created by AI Assistant
5|80f124|//  Improved Tab Bar View
6|8d0643|//
7|adc83b|
8|d755ba|import SwiftUI
9|adc83b|
10|a39808|struct TabBarView: View {
11|703487|    @Binding var tabs: [Tab]
12|633591|    @Binding var activeTabId: UUID?
13|0caee8|    @ObservedObject var themeManager: ThemeManager
14|adc83b|
15|0a03db|    // Drag and drop support
16|5fe914|    @State private var draggedTab: Tab? = nil
17|adc83b|
18|504e43|    var body: some View {
19|98ab70|        ScrollView(.horizontal, showsIndicators: false) {
20|1cad38|            ScrollViewReader { scrollProxy in
21|e6ac69|                HStack(spacing: 1) {
22|b51753|                    ForEach(tabs) { tab in
23|8b5c35|                        TabItemView(
24|39daf8|                            tab: tab,
25|73c2c1|                            isActive: activeTabId == tab.id,
26|090ab9|                            themeManager: themeManager,
27|44c175|                            onClose: { closeTab(tab) },
28|0dbd5e|                            onActivate: { activateTab(tab) },
29|4a532c|                            onPin: { togglePin(tab) },
30|9ffda4|                            onCloseOthers: { closeOthers(except: tab) },
31|809d2a|                            onCloseRight: { closeTabsToRight(of: tab) }
32|63214b|                        )
33|a69473|                        .id(tab.id)
34|dcebe2|                        .draggableToNewWindow(tab: tab, onDrag: {
35|9497de|                            self.draggedTab = tab
36|dbade7|                            return NSItemProvider(object: tab.id.uuidString as NSString)
37|af8377|                        })
38|cdedf7|                        .onDrop(of: [.text], delegate: TabDropDelegate(item: tab, tabs: $tabs, draggedItem: $draggedTab))
39|c9717a|                    }
40|4e2d32|                }
41|0b58d5|                .padding(.leading, 1)
42|51a1e9|                .onChange(of: activeTabId) { newId in
43|5c7f60|                    if let id = newId {
44|14c43c|                        withAnimation {
45|ad5cbd|                            scrollProxy.scrollTo(id, anchor: .center)
46|392b35|                        }
47|c9717a|                    }
48|4e2d32|                }
49|a7dc16|            }
50|5f3077|        }
51|6e3d58|        .background(themeManager.currentTheme.tabBarBackground)
52|1fa8c9|        .frame(height: 35)
53|27e597|    }
54|adc83b|
55|f35525|    private func closeTab(_ tab: Tab) {
56|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
57|dc033d|            tabs.remove(at: index)
58|adc83b|
59|c6ba74|            // If we closed the active tab, activate another one
60|7fb881|            if activeTabId == tab.id {
61|fce7de|                if tabs.isEmpty {
62|8cf647|                    activeTabId = nil
63|fdd0e2|                } else {
64|d77f53|                    // Try to activate the tab to the right, or the last one if we closed the last one
65|51dd50|                    let newIndex = min(index, tabs.count - 1)
66|1dc7de|                    activeTabId = tabs[newIndex].id
67|4e2d32|                }
68|a7dc16|            }
69|5f3077|        }
70|27e597|    }
71|adc83b|
72|2c4bc2|    private func activateTab(_ tab: Tab) {
73|4370c7|        activeTabId = tab.id
74|27e597|    }
75|adc83b|
76|0ee0ae|    private func togglePin(_ tab: Tab) {
77|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
78|68edaf|            tabs[index].isPinned.toggle()
79|44e8fd|            tabs[index].isPreview = false
80|5f3077|        }
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|a18b96|    private func closeOthers(except tab: Tab) {
84|bb9a07|        tabs = tabs.filter { $0.id == tab.id || $0.isPinned }
85|695c78|        if activeTabId != tab.id {
86|2f7846|            activeTabId = tab.id
87|5f3077|        }
88|27e597|    }
89|adc83b|
90|fa8b74|    private func closeTabsToRight(of tab: Tab) {
91|d14e45|        if let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == tab.id }) {
92|729830|            // Keep tabs up to index, plus pinned tabs that might be to the right (though pinned tabs should be on left)
93|9966a5|            let tabsToKeep = tabs.prefix(through: index)
94|74e089|            let remainingTabs = tabs.suffix(from: index + 1).filter { $0.isPinned }
95|7549b0|            tabs = Array(tabsToKeep) + Array(remainingTabs)
96|5f3077|        }
97|27e597|    }
98|b31277|}
99|adc83b|
100|6de871|struct TabItemView: View {
101|4dc199|    let tab: Tab
102|65ebe2|    let isActive: Bool
103|0caee8|    @ObservedObject var themeManager: ThemeManager
104|32d223|    let onClose: () -> Void
105|4dbc74|    let onActivate: () -> Void
106|6b4a69|    let onPin: () -> Void
107|8bd50e|    let onCloseOthers: () -> Void
108|695bc2|    let onCloseRight: () -> Void
109|adc83b|
110|6d2ac2|    @State private var isHovering = false
111|adc83b|
112|504e43|    var body: some View {
113|e1c66d|        HStack(spacing: 6) {
114|d44ae4|            // File icon

188|6b7af0|struct TabDropDelegate: DropDelegate {
189|b60411|    let item: Tab
190|703487|    @Binding var tabs: [Tab]
191|3fcf36|    @Binding var draggedItem: Tab?
192|b4687f|    
193|00181c|    func performDrop(info: DropInfo) -> Bool {
194|483695|        draggedItem = nil
195|4add8d|        return true
196|27e597|    }
197|b4687f|    
198|d60902|    func dropEntered(info: DropInfo) {
199|1bfbb6|        guard let draggedItem = draggedItem,
200|002bc1|              draggedItem.id != item.id,
201|08a456|              let fromIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == draggedItem.id }),
202|4e0f6c|              let toIndex = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == item.id }) else { return }
203|d6ed84|        
204|408502|        withAnimation {
205|97fe34|            tabs.move(fromOffsets: IndexSet(integer: fromIndex), toOffset: toIndex > fromIndex ? toIndex + 1 : toIndex)
206|5f3077|        }
207|27e597|    }

216|896df0|        if #available(iOS 16.0, *) {

225|8136c0|// MARK: - Draggable To New Window Modifier
226|adc83b|
227|cbdbb5|extension View {
228|87ac85|    func draggableToNewWindow(tab: Tab, onDrag: @escaping () -> NSItemProvider) -> some View {
229|576cdd|        #if os(iOS) || os(visionOS)
230|35716a|        return self.onDrag {
231|112f72|            // Create a provider that supports both tab reordering and window creation
232|97cc72|            let provider = onDrag()
233|3070d1|            
234|344f40|            // Register additional data for window creation on iPadOS
235|16670b|            if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(tab) {
236|455993|                provider.registerDataRepresentation(forTypeIdentifier: "com.vscodeipados.tab", visibility: .all) { completion in
237|b13ba7|                    completion(data, nil)
238|024b84|                    return nil
239|4e2d32|                }
240|a7dc16|            }
241|3070d1|            
242|33162e|            return provider
243|5f3077|        }
244|f6012e|        #else
245|8092f8|        return self.onDrag(onDrag)
246|6a3e13|        #endif
247|27e597|    }
248|b31277|}

223|b4687f|    
224|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
225|7fd8ce|        if !isDirectory {
226|c07322|            content.onDrag {

229|b31999|        } else {
230|d1acbf|            content
231|5f3077|        }
232|27e597|    }

239|576323|        self.onDrag {
240|556a92|            NSItemProvider(object: fileURL.path as NSString)

242|27e597|    }
