13|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
14|a33870|    @ObservedObject var fileNavigator: FileSystemNavigator
15|adc83b|
16|d901da|    @State private var searchText = ""
17|6c323c|    @State private var selectedIndex = 0
18|c96b14|    @FocusState private var isSearchFocused: Bool
19|52f121|    @State private var recentFiles: [QuickOpenItem] = []
20|adc83b|
21|f59ed3|    // Deterministic items for XCUITests (driven by launch argument: "-uiTesting")
22|ca1e76|    @State private var uiTestItems: [QuickOpenItem] = QuickOpenView.makeUITestItemsIfNeeded()
23|adc83b|
24|ad8ede|    private static var isUITesting: Bool {
25|21f3a5|        ProcessInfo.processInfo.arguments.contains("-uiTesting")
26|27e597|    }
27|adc83b|
28|0ef2ae|    private static func makeUITestItemsIfNeeded() -> [QuickOpenItem] {
29|eae1e7|        guard isUITesting else { return [] }
30|8e542b|        return makeUITestItems()
31|27e597|    }
32|adc83b|
33|671c58|    private static func makeUITestItems() -> [QuickOpenItem] {
34|5f447c|        // Create a small, stable set of files that are safe to open.
35|460d36|        let fm = FileManager.default
36|270623|        let baseDir = URL(fileURLWithPath: NSTemporaryDirectory(), isDirectory: true)
37|5bf775|            .appendingPathComponent("VSCodeiPadOS-UITests", isDirectory: true)
38|adc83b|
39|0a79fb|        try? fm.createDirectory(at: baseDir, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
40|adc83b|
41|af3c9f|        func ensureFile(_ name: String, contents: String) -> URL {
42|7ea142|            let url = baseDir.appendingPathComponent(name)
43|89b05b|            if !fm.fileExists(atPath: url.path) {
44|e4ad8a|                try? contents.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
45|a7dc16|            }
46|f185c6|            return url
47|5f3077|        }
48|adc83b|
49|79aa8e|        let fileA = ensureFile("UITest-A.txt", contents: "A")
50|546667|        let fileB = ensureFile("UITest-B.txt", contents: "B")
51|adc83b|
52|be059a|        return [
53|f8cfd4|            QuickOpenItem(name: "UITest-A.txt", path: "", url: fileA, isOpen: false, language: CodeLanguage(from: "txt")),
54|4e7b3e|            QuickOpenItem(name: "UITest-B.txt", path: "", url: fileB, isOpen: false, language: CodeLanguage(from: "txt"))
55|220505|        ]
56|27e597|    }
57|adc83b|
58|1ca737|    private var allFiles: [QuickOpenItem] {
59|6eb9be|        if Self.isUITesting {
60|c8bb21|            return uiTestItems
61|5f3077|        }
62|adc83b|
63|bacef6|        var items: [QuickOpenItem] = []
64|adc83b|
65|feb2fc|        // Add open tabs as recent files
66|9e03c8|        for tab in editorCore.tabs {
67|e5eada|            items.append(QuickOpenItem(
68|79263e|                name: tab.fileName,
69|6ff6d6|                path: tab.url?.deletingLastPathComponent().path ?? "",
70|321b29|                url: tab.url,
71|8f7366|                isOpen: true,
72|2acbeb|                language: tab.language
73|30ec32|            ))
74|5f3077|        }
75|adc83b|
76|68f641|        // Add files from file navigator
77|c5d7db|        if let tree = fileNavigator.fileTree {
78|49e10e|            collectFiles(from: tree, items: &items, basePath: "")
79|5f3077|        }
80|adc83b|
81|1d239a|        return items
82|27e597|    }
83|adc83b|
84|33c19a|    private func collectFiles(from node: FileTreeNode, items: inout [QuickOpenItem], basePath: String) {
85|6e7ff6|        let currentPath = basePath.isEmpty ? node.name : "\(basePath)/\(node.name)"
86|adc83b|
87|c98b08|        if !node.isDirectory {
88|c6c38f|            // Skip if already in tabs
89|d6cef7|            if !editorCore.tabs.contains(where: { $0.url == node.url }) {
90|919809|                items.append(QuickOpenItem(
91|efd098|                    name: node.name,
92|d63e10|                    path: basePath,
93|fba36c|                    url: node.url,
94|003454|                    isOpen: false,
95|e67d81|                    language: CodeLanguage(from: node.fileExtension)
96|2188d8|                ))
97|a7dc16|            }
98|5f3077|        }
99|adc83b|
100|13b8cd|        for child in node.children {
101|bdd416|            collectFiles(from: child, items: &items, basePath: currentPath)
102|5f3077|        }
103|27e597|    }
104|adc83b|
105|4607f1|    private var filteredFiles: [QuickOpenItem] {
106|93055c|        if searchText.isEmpty {
107|89fbb2|            // Show open files first, then recent
108|064b28|            return allFiles.sorted { a, b in
109|c12ff4|                if a.isOpen && !b.isOpen { return true }
110|4e9d5a|                if !a.isOpen && b.isOpen { return false }
111|daa15c|                return a.name < b.name
112|a7dc16|            }
113|5f3077|        }
114|adc83b|
115|4095c2|        return allFiles
116|b4fa77|            .compactMap { item -> (QuickOpenItem, Int)? in
117|30f548|                // Score against filename and path
118|3d5797|                let nameScore = FuzzyMatcher.score(query: searchText, target: item.name) ?? 0
119|dd9057|                let pathScore = (FuzzyMatcher.score(query: searchText, target: item.fullPath) ?? 0) / 2
120|129579|                let totalScore = max(nameScore, pathScore)
121|adc83b|
122|7f3f4e|                guard totalScore > 0 else { return nil }
123|64a318|                return (item, totalScore)
124|a7dc16|            }
125|4a2f11|            .sorted { $0.1 > $1.1 }
126|ffcc79|            .map { $0.0 }
127|27e597|    }
128|adc83b|
129|debdc2|    private func dismiss() {
130|6ea26a|        editorCore.showQuickOpen = false
131|27e597|    }
132|adc83b|
133|99ba12|    private func openFile(_ item: QuickOpenItem) {
134|102b02|        if let url = item.url {
135|1ddb0b|            editorCore.openFile(from: url)
136|b31999|        } else {

138|925235|            if let tab = editorCore.tabs.first(where: { $0.fileName == item.name }) {
139|166be5|                editorCore.selectTab(id: tab.id)
140|a7dc16|            }
141|5f3077|        }
142|0c24b3|        dismiss()
143|27e597|    }

375|35256d|private struct QuickOpenKeyboardModifier: ViewModifier {

379|adc83b|
380|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
381|5ddca0|        if #available(iOS 17.0, *) {
382|d1acbf|            content
383|6c31b1|                .onKeyPress(.upArrow) {
384|cc0327|                    if selectedIndex > 0 { selectedIndex -= 1 }

386|4e2d32|                }
387|40e788|                .onKeyPress(.downArrow) {

389|bd4d3d|                    return .handled
390|4e2d32|                }
391|ad6c81|                .onKeyPress(.escape) {
392|dc9423|                    onEscape()
393|bd4d3d|                    return .handled
394|4e2d32|                }
395|b31999|        } else {
396|d1acbf|            content
397|5f3077|        }
398|27e597|    }

65|8a5223|        if recentCommands.count > maxRecent {

82|af0ecd|// MARK: - Fuzzy Search
83|adc83b|
84|9fce4f|struct FuzzyMatcher {
85|ae76bd|    static func score(query: String, target: String) -> Int? {
86|34cef6|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return 1000 }
87|d6ed84|        
88|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
89|18ea38|        let targetLower = target.lowercased()
90|d6ed84|        
91|c33784|        // Exact match gets highest score
92|bea5c7|        if targetLower == queryLower { return 10000 }
93|d6ed84|        
94|bffced|        // Contains full query
95|8cd767|        if targetLower.contains(queryLower) {
96|1063f5|            // Bonus for starting with query
97|d0876a|            if targetLower.hasPrefix(queryLower) {
98|2e989d|                return 5000 + (1000 - target.count)
99|a7dc16|            }
100|c9ab09|            return 3000 + (1000 - target.count)
101|5f3077|        }
102|d6ed84|        
103|83786c|        // Fuzzy character matching
104|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
105|7f11d4|        var targetIndex = targetLower.startIndex
106|268b95|        var score = 0
107|5dc28e|        var consecutiveBonus = 0
108|1d718f|        var lastMatchIndex: String.Index? = nil
109|d6ed84|        
110|308cfe|        while queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && targetIndex < targetLower.endIndex {
111|c13bec|            if queryLower[queryIndex] == targetLower[targetIndex] {
112|145bbf|                score += 100 + consecutiveBonus
113|216278|                
114|d6ef12|                // Bonus for consecutive matches
115|9f661a|                if let lastIdx = lastMatchIndex,
116|83874f|                   targetLower.index(after: lastIdx) == targetIndex {
117|9c7108|                    consecutiveBonus += 50
118|fdd0e2|                } else {
119|51d442|                    consecutiveBonus = 0
120|4e2d32|                }
121|216278|                
122|c7d2d9|                // Bonus for matching at word boundaries
123|3c44b0|                if targetIndex == targetLower.startIndex ||
124|75c499|                   !targetLower[targetLower.index(before: targetIndex)].isLetter {
125|78d351|                    score += 75
126|4e2d32|                }
127|216278|                
128|b7133b|                lastMatchIndex = targetIndex
129|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
130|a7dc16|            }
131|916731|            targetIndex = targetLower.index(after: targetIndex)
132|5f3077|        }
133|d6ed84|        
134|989e1f|        // All query characters must be found
135|0160b5|        guard queryIndex == queryLower.endIndex else { return nil }
136|d6ed84|        
137|c07521|        return score
138|27e597|    }
139|b4687f|    
140|ace7c9|    static func highlight(query: String, in text: String) -> [(String, Bool)] {
141|81813c|        guard !query.isEmpty else { return [(text, false)] }
142|d6ed84|        
143|b880d0|        var result: [(String, Bool)] = []
144|aa4292|        let queryLower = query.lowercased()
145|a14f23|        let textLower = text.lowercased()
146|d6ed84|        
147|65f313|        var queryIndex = queryLower.startIndex
148|a07ffc|        var currentSegment = ""
149|d3c359|        var isMatch = false
150|d6ed84|        
151|4083e9|        for (i, char) in text.enumerated() {
152|212094|            let textIndex = textLower.index(textLower.startIndex, offsetBy: i)
153|3070d1|            
154|3f747d|            if queryIndex < queryLower.endIndex && 
155|f8248a|               textLower[textIndex] == queryLower[queryIndex] {
156|eecabe|                if !isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
157|78ec19|                    result.append((currentSegment, false))
158|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
159|4e2d32|                }
160|a00101|                isMatch = true
161|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
162|ea161d|                queryIndex = queryLower.index(after: queryIndex)
163|f5a6eb|            } else {
164|fbac5d|                if isMatch && !currentSegment.isEmpty {
165|15ba04|                    result.append((currentSegment, true))
166|cc1904|                    currentSegment = ""
167|4e2d32|                }
168|d1cc2f|                isMatch = false
169|b31654|                currentSegment.append(char)
170|a7dc16|            }
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|5d8d48|        if !currentSegment.isEmpty {
174|eb146d|            result.append((currentSegment, isMatch))
175|5f3077|        }
176|d6ed84|        
177|67ed82|        return result
178|27e597|    }
179|b31277|}

45|4ce584|    case delete(String)
46|b31277|}
47|adc83b|
48|af9510|struct DiffBuilder {
49|0138df|    static func build(fileName: String, status: String, old: String, new: String) -> DiffFile {
50|9e82fa|        let oldLines = splitLines(old)
51|9a046b|        let newLines = splitLines(new)
52|a6deec|        let edits = diffEdits(oldLines, newLines)
53|adc83b|
54|c85a82|        var lines: [DiffLine] = []
55|612c87|        lines.reserveCapacity(edits.count)
56|adc83b|
57|b50bf9|        var oldLineNumber = 1
58|37aaae|        var newLineNumber = 1
59|adc83b|
60|2fed6c|        for edit in edits {
61|8274e4|            switch edit {
62|cc6091|            case let .equal(text):
63|7c5c47|                lines.append(.init(type: .context, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
64|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
65|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
66|adc83b|
67|0de55e|            case let .delete(text):
68|a9bb46|                lines.append(.init(type: .deletion, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: nil))
69|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
70|adc83b|
71|bd8701|            case let .insert(text):
72|cbbb20|                lines.append(.init(type: .addition, content: text, oldLineNumber: nil, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
73|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
74|a7dc16|            }
75|5f3077|        }
76|adc83b|
77|fe8215|        let header = "@@ -1,\(oldLines.count) +1,\(newLines.count) @@"
78|35ffb5|        let hunk = DiffHunk(header: header, lines: lines)
79|6f56c0|        return DiffFile(fileName: fileName, status: status, hunks: [hunk])
80|27e597|    }
81|adc83b|
82|72adbf|    private static func splitLines(_ text: String) -> [String] {
83|9ab348|        var lines = text.components(separatedBy: "\n")
84|b3b18c|        // Drop trailing empty line if file ends with newline.
85|12deaf|        if lines.last == "" {
86|73b25f|            lines.removeLast()
87|5f3077|        }
88|6a8c8e|        return lines
89|27e597|    }
90|adc83b|
91|d861dc|    private static func diffEdits(_ old: [String], _ new: [String]) -> [_DiffEdit] {
92|2ef737|        let n = old.count
93|962d3a|        let m = new.count
94|adc83b|
95|19e396|        if n == 0 { return new.map { .insert($0) } }
96|659f38|        if m == 0 { return old.map { .delete($0) } }
97|adc83b|
98|6d0c13|        // LCS DP (simple + deterministic). Replace with Myers later if needed.
99|249089|        var dp = Array(repeating: Array(repeating: 0, count: m + 1), count: n + 1)
100|da873b|        for i in 1...n {
101|e1eb8d|            for j in 1...m {
102|daa469|                if old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
103|59b54f|                    dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
104|fdd0e2|                } else {
105|ada1d6|                    dp[i][j] = max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1])
106|4e2d32|                }
107|a7dc16|            }
108|5f3077|        }
109|adc83b|
110|c7d097|        var edits: [_DiffEdit] = []
111|30fde6|        edits.reserveCapacity(n + m)
112|adc83b|
113|8f426a|        var i = n
114|2e5d36|        var j = m
115|f21817|        while i > 0 || j > 0 {
116|ff88b1|            if i > 0, j > 0, old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
117|3a4cb2|                edits.append(.equal(old[i - 1]))
118|0a3170|                i -= 1
119|038038|                j -= 1
120|314055|            } else if j > 0, i == 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j] {
121|d7bd75|                edits.append(.insert(new[j - 1]))
122|038038|                j -= 1
123|cbb05a|            } else if i > 0 {
124|218975|                edits.append(.delete(old[i - 1]))
125|0a3170|                i -= 1
126|a7dc16|            }
127|5f3077|        }
128|adc83b|
129|f49266|        return edits.reversed()
130|27e597|    }

42|1476f2|private enum _DiffEdit {

44|d5a877|    case insert(String)
45|4ce584|    case delete(String)
46|b31277|}
47|adc83b|
48|af9510|struct DiffBuilder {
49|0138df|    static func build(fileName: String, status: String, old: String, new: String) -> DiffFile {
50|9e82fa|        let oldLines = splitLines(old)
51|9a046b|        let newLines = splitLines(new)
52|a6deec|        let edits = diffEdits(oldLines, newLines)
53|adc83b|
54|c85a82|        var lines: [DiffLine] = []
55|612c87|        lines.reserveCapacity(edits.count)
56|adc83b|
57|b50bf9|        var oldLineNumber = 1
58|37aaae|        var newLineNumber = 1
59|adc83b|
60|2fed6c|        for edit in edits {
61|8274e4|            switch edit {
62|cc6091|            case let .equal(text):
63|7c5c47|                lines.append(.init(type: .context, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
64|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
65|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
66|adc83b|
67|0de55e|            case let .delete(text):
68|a9bb46|                lines.append(.init(type: .deletion, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: nil))
69|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
70|adc83b|
71|bd8701|            case let .insert(text):
72|cbbb20|                lines.append(.init(type: .addition, content: text, oldLineNumber: nil, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
73|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
74|a7dc16|            }
75|5f3077|        }
76|adc83b|
77|fe8215|        let header = "@@ -1,\(oldLines.count) +1,\(newLines.count) @@"
78|35ffb5|        let hunk = DiffHunk(header: header, lines: lines)
79|6f56c0|        return DiffFile(fileName: fileName, status: status, hunks: [hunk])
80|27e597|    }
81|adc83b|
82|72adbf|    private static func splitLines(_ text: String) -> [String] {
83|9ab348|        var lines = text.components(separatedBy: "\n")
84|b3b18c|        // Drop trailing empty line if file ends with newline.
85|12deaf|        if lines.last == "" {
86|73b25f|            lines.removeLast()
87|5f3077|        }
88|6a8c8e|        return lines
89|27e597|    }
90|adc83b|
91|d861dc|    private static func diffEdits(_ old: [String], _ new: [String]) -> [_DiffEdit] {
92|2ef737|        let n = old.count
93|962d3a|        let m = new.count
94|adc83b|
95|19e396|        if n == 0 { return new.map { .insert($0) } }
96|659f38|        if m == 0 { return old.map { .delete($0) } }
97|adc83b|
98|6d0c13|        // LCS DP (simple + deterministic). Replace with Myers later if needed.
99|249089|        var dp = Array(repeating: Array(repeating: 0, count: m + 1), count: n + 1)
100|da873b|        for i in 1...n {
101|e1eb8d|            for j in 1...m {
102|daa469|                if old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
103|59b54f|                    dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
104|fdd0e2|                } else {
105|ada1d6|                    dp[i][j] = max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1])
106|4e2d32|                }
107|a7dc16|            }
108|5f3077|        }
109|adc83b|
110|c7d097|        var edits: [_DiffEdit] = []
111|30fde6|        edits.reserveCapacity(n + m)
112|adc83b|
113|8f426a|        var i = n
114|2e5d36|        var j = m
115|f21817|        while i > 0 || j > 0 {
116|ff88b1|            if i > 0, j > 0, old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
117|3a4cb2|                edits.append(.equal(old[i - 1]))
118|0a3170|                i -= 1
119|038038|                j -= 1
120|314055|            } else if j > 0, i == 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j] {
121|d7bd75|                edits.append(.insert(new[j - 1]))
122|038038|                j -= 1
123|cbb05a|            } else if i > 0 {
124|218975|                edits.append(.delete(old[i - 1]))
125|0a3170|                i -= 1
126|a7dc16|            }
127|5f3077|        }
128|adc83b|
129|f49266|        return edits.reversed()
130|27e597|    }

40|1b6ea6|// MARK: - Diff Builder (working copy vs HEAD)
41|adc83b|
42|1476f2|private enum _DiffEdit {
43|70b9c9|    case equal(String)
44|d5a877|    case insert(String)
45|4ce584|    case delete(String)
46|b31277|}
47|adc83b|
48|af9510|struct DiffBuilder {
49|0138df|    static func build(fileName: String, status: String, old: String, new: String) -> DiffFile {
50|9e82fa|        let oldLines = splitLines(old)
51|9a046b|        let newLines = splitLines(new)
52|a6deec|        let edits = diffEdits(oldLines, newLines)
53|adc83b|
54|c85a82|        var lines: [DiffLine] = []
55|612c87|        lines.reserveCapacity(edits.count)
56|adc83b|
57|b50bf9|        var oldLineNumber = 1
58|37aaae|        var newLineNumber = 1
59|adc83b|
60|2fed6c|        for edit in edits {
61|8274e4|            switch edit {
62|cc6091|            case let .equal(text):
63|7c5c47|                lines.append(.init(type: .context, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
64|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
65|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
66|adc83b|
67|0de55e|            case let .delete(text):
68|a9bb46|                lines.append(.init(type: .deletion, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: nil))
69|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
70|adc83b|
71|bd8701|            case let .insert(text):
72|cbbb20|                lines.append(.init(type: .addition, content: text, oldLineNumber: nil, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
73|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
74|a7dc16|            }
75|5f3077|        }
76|adc83b|
77|fe8215|        let header = "@@ -1,\(oldLines.count) +1,\(newLines.count) @@"
78|35ffb5|        let hunk = DiffHunk(header: header, lines: lines)
79|6f56c0|        return DiffFile(fileName: fileName, status: status, hunks: [hunk])
80|27e597|    }
81|adc83b|
82|72adbf|    private static func splitLines(_ text: String) -> [String] {
83|9ab348|        var lines = text.components(separatedBy: "\n")
84|b3b18c|        // Drop trailing empty line if file ends with newline.
85|12deaf|        if lines.last == "" {
86|73b25f|            lines.removeLast()
87|5f3077|        }
88|6a8c8e|        return lines
89|27e597|    }
90|adc83b|
91|d861dc|    private static func diffEdits(_ old: [String], _ new: [String]) -> [_DiffEdit] {
92|2ef737|        let n = old.count
93|962d3a|        let m = new.count
94|adc83b|
95|19e396|        if n == 0 { return new.map { .insert($0) } }
96|659f38|        if m == 0 { return old.map { .delete($0) } }
97|adc83b|
98|6d0c13|        // LCS DP (simple + deterministic). Replace with Myers later if needed.
99|249089|        var dp = Array(repeating: Array(repeating: 0, count: m + 1), count: n + 1)
100|da873b|        for i in 1...n {
101|e1eb8d|            for j in 1...m {
102|daa469|                if old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
103|59b54f|                    dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
104|fdd0e2|                } else {
105|ada1d6|                    dp[i][j] = max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1])
106|4e2d32|                }
107|a7dc16|            }
108|5f3077|        }
109|adc83b|
110|c7d097|        var edits: [_DiffEdit] = []
111|30fde6|        edits.reserveCapacity(n + m)
112|adc83b|
113|8f426a|        var i = n
114|2e5d36|        var j = m
115|f21817|        while i > 0 || j > 0 {
116|ff88b1|            if i > 0, j > 0, old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
117|3a4cb2|                edits.append(.equal(old[i - 1]))
118|0a3170|                i -= 1
119|038038|                j -= 1
120|314055|            } else if j > 0, i == 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j] {
121|d7bd75|                edits.append(.insert(new[j - 1]))
122|038038|                j -= 1
123|cbb05a|            } else if i > 0 {
124|218975|                edits.append(.delete(old[i - 1]))
125|0a3170|                i -= 1
126|a7dc16|            }
127|5f3077|        }
128|adc83b|
129|f49266|        return edits.reversed()
130|27e597|    }
131|b31277|}

167|4db305|    private var header: some View {

89|3347f4|        case .swift:
90|0a66c4|            return parseSwiftSymbols(from: content)

100|d361c0|    // MARK: - Swift Parser
101|b4687f|    
102|aeac0d|    private static func parseSwiftSymbols(from content: String) -> [CodeSymbol] {
103|08506f|        var symbols: [CodeSymbol] = []
104|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
105|d6ed84|        
106|bc1385|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, type: SymbolType)] = [
107|fc8340|            // Functions
108|c10247|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?func\s+(\w+)"#, .function),
109|8fed15|            // Classes
110|420729|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(final )?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class),
111|2f60d1|            // Structs
112|f75c05|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?struct\s+(\w+)"#, .struct),
113|af4603|            // Enums
114|1468c0|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?enum\s+(\w+)"#, .enum),
115|2fc5af|            // Protocols
116|48e586|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?protocol\s+(\w+)"#, .protocol),
117|f5d37b|            // Properties
118|dc53a3|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(static |class )?(var|let)\s+(\w+)"#, .property),
119|235e1d|            // Init
120|7630ef|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(required |convenience )?init"#, .constructor),
121|220505|        ]
122|d6ed84|        
123|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
124|3a36dc|            for (pattern, type) in patterns {
125|66048b|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
126|0483e7|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)) {
127|dd2193|                    
128|277cff|                    var name: String
129|dd2193|                    
130|973af5|                    // Extract the name based on type
131|95923a|                    if type == .constructor {
132|932c3b|                        name = "init"
133|6f3cd6|                        // Try to get parameters
134|2dcc0c|                        if let parenRange = line.range(of: "(") {
135|f790c1|                            let afterParen = String(line[parenRange.lowerBound...])
136|5f45d4|                            if let closeRange = afterParen.range(of: ")") {
137|3abd65|                                let params = String(afterParen[afterParen.index(after: afterParen.startIndex)..<closeRange.lowerBound])
138|95cae0|                                if !params.isEmpty {
139|c5f767|                                    name = "init(\(params.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)))"
140|f83e05|                                }
141|89d40a|                            }
142|392b35|                        }
143|540066|                    } else {
144|da86c9|                        // Get the last capture group which should be the name
145|769896|                        let lastGroupIndex = match.numberOfRanges - 1
146|170684|                        if lastGroupIndex > 0,
147|e5e5c3|                           let range = Range(match.range(at: lastGroupIndex), in: line) {
148|155a4b|                            name = String(line[range])
149|65e2f4|                        } else {
150|84d6cb|                            continue
151|392b35|                        }
152|c9717a|                    }
153|dd2193|                    
154|62536b|                    symbols.append(CodeSymbol(
155|e8eb2a|                        name: name,
156|dd7229|                        type: type,
157|35d8e4|                        line: lineIndex + 1,
158|6aead8|                        column: 1,
159|56d74d|                        detail: nil,
160|4b2c23|                        containerName: nil
161|c89922|                    ))
162|8dcb2c|                    break
163|4e2d32|                }
164|a7dc16|            }
165|5f3077|        }
166|d6ed84|        
167|1e442a|        return symbols
168|27e597|    }
169|b4687f|    
170|519c9e|    // MARK: - JavaScript/TypeScript Parser
171|b4687f|    
172|ab4b8c|    private static func parseJSSymbols(from content: String) -> [CodeSymbol] {
173|08506f|        var symbols: [CodeSymbol] = []
174|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
175|d6ed84|        
176|bc1385|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, type: SymbolType)] = [
177|fc8340|            // Functions
178|6686a3|            (#"^\s*(export )?(async )?function\s+(\w+)"#, .function),
179|90b7a5|            // Arrow functions assigned to const/let
180|46538c|            (#"^\s*(export )?(const|let|var)\s+(\w+)\s*=\s*(async )?\(.*\)\s*=>"#, .function),
181|8fed15|            // Classes
182|b5230a|            (#"^\s*(export )?(default )?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class),
183|48ca72|            // Interfaces (TypeScript)
184|8f0c51|            (#"^\s*(export )?interface\s+(\w+)"#, .interface),
185|45f8e1|            // Types (TypeScript)
186|df9f56|            (#"^\s*(export )?type\s+(\w+)"#, .type),
187|3a9a71|            // Enums (TypeScript)
188|5b99c6|            (#"^\s*(export )?enum\s+(\w+)"#, .enum),
189|6dc670|            // Const/Let/Var
190|6edc9a|            (#"^\s*(export )?(const|let|var)\s+(\w+)\s*="#, .variable),
191|5adad0|            // Methods in class
192|dfbfee|            (#"^\s*(static )?(async )?(\w+)\s*\(.*\)\s*\{"#, .method),
193|220505|        ]
194|d6ed84|        
195|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
196|3a36dc|            for (pattern, type) in patterns {
197|66048b|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
198|0483e7|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)) {
199|dd2193|                    
200|6af780|                    let lastGroupIndex = match.numberOfRanges - 1
201|a2f8cd|                    guard lastGroupIndex > 0,
202|b5e457|                          let range = Range(match.range(at: lastGroupIndex), in: line) else { continue }
203|dd2193|                    
204|134a37|                    let name = String(line[range])
205|dd2193|                    
206|c06721|                    // Skip common keywords
207|98c79c|                    guard !["if", "else", "for", "while", "switch", "catch", "return"].contains(name) else { continue }
208|dd2193|                    
209|62536b|                    symbols.append(CodeSymbol(
210|e8eb2a|                        name: name,
211|dd7229|                        type: type,
212|35d8e4|                        line: lineIndex + 1,
213|6aead8|                        column: 1,
214|56d74d|                        detail: nil,
215|4b2c23|                        containerName: nil
216|c89922|                    ))
217|8dcb2c|                    break
218|4e2d32|                }
219|a7dc16|            }
220|5f3077|        }
221|d6ed84|        
222|1e442a|        return symbols
223|27e597|    }
224|b4687f|    
225|ea94ef|    // MARK: - Python Parser
226|b4687f|    
227|04c6a6|    private static func parsePythonSymbols(from content: String) -> [CodeSymbol] {
228|08506f|        var symbols: [CodeSymbol] = []
229|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
230|d6ed84|        
231|bc1385|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, type: SymbolType)] = [
232|8fed15|            // Classes
233|f67eee|            (#"^class\s+(\w+)"#, .class),
234|99e881|            // Functions/Methods
235|a3fc2f|            (#"^\s*def\s+(\w+)"#, .function),
236|82cb28|            // Async functions
237|990137|            (#"^\s*async\s+def\s+(\w+)"#, .function),

246|874b10|                          let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) else { continue }

249|03b292|                    let symbolType: SymbolType = line.hasPrefix("    ") || line.hasPrefix("\t") ? .method : type
250|dd2193|                    
251|62536b|                    symbols.append(CodeSymbol(

27|adc83b|

36|30092e|    case inline
37|9f8f32|    case sideBySide
38|b31277|}

41|adc83b|
42|1476f2|private enum _DiffEdit {
43|70b9c9|    case equal(String)
44|d5a877|    case insert(String)
45|4ce584|    case delete(String)
46|b31277|}
47|adc83b|
48|af9510|struct DiffBuilder {
49|0138df|    static func build(fileName: String, status: String, old: String, new: String) -> DiffFile {
50|9e82fa|        let oldLines = splitLines(old)
51|9a046b|        let newLines = splitLines(new)
52|a6deec|        let edits = diffEdits(oldLines, newLines)
53|adc83b|
54|c85a82|        var lines: [DiffLine] = []
55|612c87|        lines.reserveCapacity(edits.count)
56|adc83b|
57|b50bf9|        var oldLineNumber = 1
58|37aaae|        var newLineNumber = 1
59|adc83b|
60|2fed6c|        for edit in edits {
61|8274e4|            switch edit {
62|cc6091|            case let .equal(text):
63|7c5c47|                lines.append(.init(type: .context, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
64|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
65|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
66|adc83b|
67|0de55e|            case let .delete(text):
68|a9bb46|                lines.append(.init(type: .deletion, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: nil))
69|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
70|adc83b|
71|bd8701|            case let .insert(text):
72|cbbb20|                lines.append(.init(type: .addition, content: text, oldLineNumber: nil, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
73|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
74|a7dc16|            }
75|5f3077|        }
76|adc83b|
77|fe8215|        let header = "@@ -1,\(oldLines.count) +1,\(newLines.count) @@"
78|35ffb5|        let hunk = DiffHunk(header: header, lines: lines)
79|6f56c0|        return DiffFile(fileName: fileName, status: status, hunks: [hunk])
80|27e597|    }

82|72adbf|    private static func splitLines(_ text: String) -> [String] {
83|9ab348|        var lines = text.components(separatedBy: "\n")
84|b3b18c|        // Drop trailing empty line if file ends with newline.
85|12deaf|        if lines.last == "" {
86|73b25f|            lines.removeLast()
87|5f3077|        }
88|6a8c8e|        return lines
89|27e597|    }
90|adc83b|
91|d861dc|    private static func diffEdits(_ old: [String], _ new: [String]) -> [_DiffEdit] {
92|2ef737|        let n = old.count
93|962d3a|        let m = new.count
94|adc83b|
95|19e396|        if n == 0 { return new.map { .insert($0) } }
96|659f38|        if m == 0 { return old.map { .delete($0) } }
97|adc83b|
98|6d0c13|        // LCS DP (simple + deterministic). Replace with Myers later if needed.
99|249089|        var dp = Array(repeating: Array(repeating: 0, count: m + 1), count: n + 1)
100|da873b|        for i in 1...n {
101|e1eb8d|            for j in 1...m {
102|daa469|                if old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
103|59b54f|                    dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
104|fdd0e2|                } else {
105|ada1d6|                    dp[i][j] = max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1])
106|4e2d32|                }
107|a7dc16|            }
108|5f3077|        }
109|adc83b|
110|c7d097|        var edits: [_DiffEdit] = []
111|30fde6|        edits.reserveCapacity(n + m)
112|adc83b|
113|8f426a|        var i = n
114|2e5d36|        var j = m
115|f21817|        while i > 0 || j > 0 {
116|ff88b1|            if i > 0, j > 0, old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
117|3a4cb2|                edits.append(.equal(old[i - 1]))
118|0a3170|                i -= 1
119|038038|                j -= 1
120|314055|            } else if j > 0, i == 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j] {
121|d7bd75|                edits.append(.insert(new[j - 1]))
122|038038|                j -= 1
123|cbb05a|            } else if i > 0 {
124|218975|                edits.append(.delete(old[i - 1]))
125|0a3170|                i -= 1
126|a7dc16|            }
127|5f3077|        }
128|adc83b|
129|f49266|        return edits.reversed()
130|27e597|    }

78|0596a7|        host.view.backgroundColor = .clear
79|a81475|        controller.addChild(host)
80|285c40|        controller.view.addSubview(host.view)
81|e88a8e|        host.view.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
82|c31f08|        NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
83|4f3c57|            host.view.topAnchor.constraint(equalTo: controller.view.topAnchor),
84|0bc6fc|            host.view.bottomAnchor.constraint(equalTo: controller.view.bottomAnchor),
85|fff93c|            host.view.leadingAnchor.constraint(equalTo: controller.view.leadingAnchor),
86|c81d03|            host.view.trailingAnchor.constraint(equalTo: controller.view.trailingAnchor),
87|082e2d|        ])
88|604700|        host.didMove(toParent: controller)
89|1375d7|        return controller
90|27e597|    }

44|d5a877|    case insert(String)
45|4ce584|    case delete(String)

47|adc83b|
48|af9510|struct DiffBuilder {
49|0138df|    static func build(fileName: String, status: String, old: String, new: String) -> DiffFile {
50|9e82fa|        let oldLines = splitLines(old)
51|9a046b|        let newLines = splitLines(new)
52|a6deec|        let edits = diffEdits(oldLines, newLines)
53|adc83b|
54|c85a82|        var lines: [DiffLine] = []
55|612c87|        lines.reserveCapacity(edits.count)
56|adc83b|
57|b50bf9|        var oldLineNumber = 1
58|37aaae|        var newLineNumber = 1
59|adc83b|
60|2fed6c|        for edit in edits {
61|8274e4|            switch edit {
62|cc6091|            case let .equal(text):
63|7c5c47|                lines.append(.init(type: .context, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
64|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
65|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
66|adc83b|
67|0de55e|            case let .delete(text):
68|a9bb46|                lines.append(.init(type: .deletion, content: text, oldLineNumber: oldLineNumber, newLineNumber: nil))
69|34dd37|                oldLineNumber += 1
70|adc83b|
71|bd8701|            case let .insert(text):
72|cbbb20|                lines.append(.init(type: .addition, content: text, oldLineNumber: nil, newLineNumber: newLineNumber))
73|d0995e|                newLineNumber += 1
74|a7dc16|            }
75|5f3077|        }
76|adc83b|
77|fe8215|        let header = "@@ -1,\(oldLines.count) +1,\(newLines.count) @@"
78|35ffb5|        let hunk = DiffHunk(header: header, lines: lines)
79|6f56c0|        return DiffFile(fileName: fileName, status: status, hunks: [hunk])
80|27e597|    }
81|adc83b|
82|72adbf|    private static func splitLines(_ text: String) -> [String] {
83|9ab348|        var lines = text.components(separatedBy: "\n")
84|b3b18c|        // Drop trailing empty line if file ends with newline.
85|12deaf|        if lines.last == "" {
86|73b25f|            lines.removeLast()
87|5f3077|        }
88|6a8c8e|        return lines
89|27e597|    }
90|adc83b|
91|d861dc|    private static func diffEdits(_ old: [String], _ new: [String]) -> [_DiffEdit] {
92|2ef737|        let n = old.count
93|962d3a|        let m = new.count
94|adc83b|
95|19e396|        if n == 0 { return new.map { .insert($0) } }
96|659f38|        if m == 0 { return old.map { .delete($0) } }
97|adc83b|
98|6d0c13|        // LCS DP (simple + deterministic). Replace with Myers later if needed.
99|249089|        var dp = Array(repeating: Array(repeating: 0, count: m + 1), count: n + 1)
100|da873b|        for i in 1...n {
101|e1eb8d|            for j in 1...m {
102|daa469|                if old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
103|59b54f|                    dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j - 1] + 1
104|fdd0e2|                } else {
105|ada1d6|                    dp[i][j] = max(dp[i - 1][j], dp[i][j - 1])
106|4e2d32|                }
107|a7dc16|            }
108|5f3077|        }
109|adc83b|
110|c7d097|        var edits: [_DiffEdit] = []
111|30fde6|        edits.reserveCapacity(n + m)
112|adc83b|
113|8f426a|        var i = n
114|2e5d36|        var j = m
115|f21817|        while i > 0 || j > 0 {
116|ff88b1|            if i > 0, j > 0, old[i - 1] == new[j - 1] {
117|3a4cb2|                edits.append(.equal(old[i - 1]))
118|0a3170|                i -= 1
119|038038|                j -= 1
120|314055|            } else if j > 0, i == 0 || dp[i][j - 1] >= dp[i - 1][j] {
121|d7bd75|                edits.append(.insert(new[j - 1]))
122|038038|                j -= 1
123|cbb05a|            } else if i > 0 {
124|218975|                edits.append(.delete(old[i - 1]))
125|0a3170|                i -= 1
126|a7dc16|            }
127|5f3077|        }
128|adc83b|
129|f49266|        return edits.reversed()
130|27e597|    }

212|a7dc16|            }
213|83a489|            .navigationBarTitleDisplayMode(.inline)

218|a7dc16|            }
219|5f3077|        }
220|28cfc0|        .task {
221|634bf3|            isLoading = true

223|612c3f|            isLoading = false

404|27623f|    private var filteredCommands: [Command] {
405|93055c|        if searchText.isEmpty {

413|4e2d32|                }
414|c4a108|            let others = allCommands.filter { !recentNames.contains($0.name) }

416|5f3077|        }

585|a7dc16|            }
586|3070d1|            
587|2e665a|            // Category badge

589|439860|                .font(.system(size: 10, weight: .medium))

591|801496|                .padding(.horizontal, 6)

596|6f642e|                )
597|3070d1|

601|a7dc16|            }
602|5f3077|        }

605|413d6d|        .background(

685|021242|    let onUp: () -> Void
686|81b54b|    let onDown: () -> Void
687|984088|    let onEscape: () -> Void
688|b4687f|    
689|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder
690|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
691|5ddca0|        if #available(iOS 17.0, *) {
692|d1acbf|            content
693|08cff7|                .onKeyPress(.upArrow) { onUp(); return .handled }
694|415326|                .onKeyPress(.downArrow) { onDown(); return .handled }
695|48ee00|                .onKeyPress(.escape) { onEscape(); return .handled }
696|b31999|        } else {
697|d1acbf|            content
698|5f3077|        }
699|27e597|    }

150|418a88|// iOS 17+ key press support
151|5dbdc6|private struct KeyPressModifier: ViewModifier {
152|021242|    let onUp: () -> Void
153|81b54b|    let onDown: () -> Void
154|984088|    let onEscape: () -> Void
155|b4687f|    
156|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
157|5ddca0|        if #available(iOS 17.0, *) {
158|d1acbf|            content
159|08cff7|                .onKeyPress(.upArrow) { onUp(); return .handled }

267|ac2364|    // MARK: - Generic Parser

269|506b9e|    private static func parseGenericSymbols(from content: String) -> [CodeSymbol] {
270|08506f|        var symbols: [CodeSymbol] = []
271|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
272|d6ed84|        
273|ab674a|        // Generic patterns for common constructs
274|bc1385|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, type: SymbolType)] = [
275|183778|            (#"function\s+(\w+)"#, .function),
276|106d69|            (#"class\s+(\w+)"#, .class),
277|f4933b|            (#"def\s+(\w+)"#, .function),
278|220505|        ]
279|d6ed84|        
280|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
281|3a36dc|            for (pattern, type) in patterns {
282|66048b|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
283|c85f5e|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
284|e9775f|                   match.numberOfRanges > 1,
285|8e593e|                   let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
286|dd2193|                    
287|62536b|                    symbols.append(CodeSymbol(
288|04f47b|                        name: String(line[range]),
289|dd7229|                        type: type,
290|35d8e4|                        line: lineIndex + 1,
291|6aead8|                        column: 1,
292|56d74d|                        detail: nil,
293|4b2c23|                        containerName: nil
294|c89922|                    ))
295|8dcb2c|                    break
296|4e2d32|                }
297|a7dc16|            }
298|5f3077|        }
299|d6ed84|        
300|1e442a|        return symbols
301|27e597|    }

151|5dbdc6|private struct KeyPressModifier: ViewModifier {
152|021242|    let onUp: () -> Void
153|81b54b|    let onDown: () -> Void
154|984088|    let onEscape: () -> Void
155|b4687f|    
156|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
157|5ddca0|        if #available(iOS 17.0, *) {
158|d1acbf|            content
159|08cff7|                .onKeyPress(.upArrow) { onUp(); return .handled }
160|415326|                .onKeyPress(.downArrow) { onDown(); return .handled }
161|48ee00|                .onKeyPress(.escape) { onEscape(); return .handled }
162|b31999|        } else {
163|d1acbf|            content
164|5f3077|        }
165|27e597|    }

192|63214b|                        )
193|adc83b|
194|ebd32a|                    if !snippet.description.isEmpty {
195|cef896|                        Text(snippet.description)

198|2fcb5e|                            .lineLimit(1)
199|c9717a|                    }
200|4e2d32|                }
201|a7dc16|            }

222|b31999|        } else {

226|e6b375|                    Text(part.0)
227|fc096a|                        .font(.system(size: 13, weight: part.1 ? .bold : .regular))
228|ee54d3|                        .foregroundColor(isSelected ? .white : (part.1 ? .accentColor : .primary))
229|4e2d32|                }
230|a7dc16|            }
231|5f3077|        }
232|27e597|    }

236|adc83b|
237|d72239|private extension Array {
238|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
239|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil

89|04c9fb|enum ProgrammingLanguage: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
90|8d3f56|    case python = "Python"
91|90fe68|    case node = "Node.js"
92|6ba47a|    case go = "Go"
93|4db319|    case rust = "Rust"
94|a48bec|    case ruby = "Ruby"
95|b4892a|    case php = "PHP"
96|3db315|    case wasm = "WebAssembly"
97|da37f6|    case other = "Other"
98|b4687f|    
99|a5faf2|    var id: String { rawValue }
100|b4687f|    
101|4108d4|    var icon: String {
102|2e6d08|        switch self {
103|e07272|        case .python: return "🐍"
104|9c5f5e|        case .node: return "🟢"
105|690075|        case .go: return "🔵"
106|d7e45b|        case .rust: return "🦀"
107|93e904|        case .ruby: return "💎"
108|487745|        case .php: return "🐘"
109|7a3ca3|        case .wasm: return "⚡"
110|49b55c|        case .other: return "📄"
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }
113|b4687f|    
114|147dd7|    /// Detect language from file extension
115|cd92b0|    static func detect(from filePath: String?) -> ProgrammingLanguage {
116|7ea696|        guard let path = filePath else { return .other }
117|8c62fe|        let ext = (path as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
118|f60e4e|        switch ext {
119|75152b|        case "py": return .python
120|712ba2|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs": return .node
121|edae84|        case "go": return .go
122|714d49|        case "rs": return .rust
123|56dccc|        case "rb": return .ruby
124|e8bfcf|        case "php": return .php
125|63cc2e|        case "wasm": return .wasm
126|73aebd|        default: return .other
127|5f3077|        }
128|27e597|    }

199|6f109c|    // MARK: - Presets
200|b4687f|    
201|2f3894|    func savePreset() {
202|9dd7a4|        let trimmedName = presetNameText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
203|0abc1b|        guard !trimmedName.isEmpty else {
204|7f9953|            alertMessage = "Please enter a preset name"
205|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
206|bef5d6|            return
207|5f3077|        }
208|d6ed84|        
209|90d7b5|        var preset = currentConfig
210|4587af|        preset.name = trimmedName
211|39a950|        preset.id = UUID()
212|d6ed84|        
213|824228|        // Remove existing preset with same name
214|e241d5|        savedPresets.removeAll { $0.name == trimmedName }
215|03ebeb|        savedPresets.append(preset)
216|d6ed84|        
217|4a9a42|        savePresetsToStorage()

219|ac53c7|        alertMessage = "Preset '\(trimmedName)' saved successfully"
220|3b5718|        showSaveAlert = true
221|27e597|    }
222|b4687f|

236|bb0e88|        savedPresets[index].name = newName

240|b4687f|    
241|f0ec8e|    private func savePresetsToStorage() {
242|4bdf32|        if let encoded = try? JSONEncoder().encode(savedPresets) {
243|2ae326|            UserDefaults.standard.set(encoded, forKey: presetsKey)
244|5f3077|        }

246|b4687f|    
247|5d72a5|    private func loadPresets() {
248|592a55|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: presetsKey),
249|f01575|              let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([RunConfiguration].self, from: data) else {
250|bef5d6|            return
251|5f3077|        }
252|bc658e|        savedPresets = decoded
253|27e597|    }

255|ff5187|    // MARK: - Execution
256|b4687f|    
257|669c0c|    func execute(withFile filePath: String?) async {
258|487c0c|        isExecuting = true
259|3ed98c|        executionOutput = ""
260|d6ed84|        
261|86d6f2|        // Check if this is a WASM file - use on-device WASMRunner
262|0c6d38|        if currentConfig.languageOptions.language == .wasm,
263|b97e87|           let path = filePath,
264|b26fe0|           path.hasSuffix(".wasm") {
265|0e6548|            await executeWASM(filePath: path)
266|bef5d6|            return
267|5f3077|        }
268|d6ed84|        
269|cc901c|        // For other languages, use remote runner
270|98010e|        guard let remoteRunner = remoteRunner else {
271|487b21|            alertMessage = "RemoteRunner not configured"
272|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
273|9d45fd|            isExecuting = false
274|bef5d6|            return
275|5f3077|        }
276|d6ed84|        
277|4da690|        do {
278|a721bb|            let result = try await remoteRunner.execute(
279|615b91|                filePath: filePath,
280|e9391c|                configuration: currentConfig
281|43d041|            )
282|46e029|            executionOutput = result.output
283|19e930|            if !result.success {
284|00362d|                alertMessage = "Execution failed with exit code \(result.exitCode)"
285|55a1a5|                showSaveAlert = true
286|a7dc16|            }
287|853889|        } catch {
288|a9e320|            alertMessage = "Execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
289|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
293|27e597|    }
294|b4687f|    
295|409f6c|    /// Execute a WebAssembly file using on-device WASMRunner
296|b2ec05|    private func executeWASM(filePath: String) async {
297|69a69f|        let startTime = Date()
298|05fc0c|        executionOutput = "⚡ Starting WebAssembly execution...\n"
299|189fb0|        executionOutput += "📁 File: \(filePath)\n"
300|e7d721|        executionOutput += "🔧 Function: \(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)\n\n"
301|d6ed84|        
302|4da690|        do {
303|ca6aa6|            // Create configuration
304|57c9d7|            var config = WASMConfiguration.default
305|5b0da2|            config.enableDebugLogging = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmDebugLogging
306|c1f0a7|            config.wasiMode = currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI ? .stub : .disabled
307|3070d1|            
308|f02e53|            // Create runner
309|7c8265|            let runner = try WASMRunner(configuration: config)
310|3070d1|            
311|623e02|            // Load the WASM file
312|9dcf0f|            let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: filePath)
313|2fc6f1|            try await runner.load(from: url)
314|fdf1f0|            executionOutput += "✅ Module loaded successfully\n"
315|3070d1|            
316|b03134|            // Configure WASI if enabled
317|e2975c|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmEnableWASI {
318|0194ab|                try await runner.configureWASI()
319|5b1f1f|                executionOutput += "✅ WASI configured\n"
320|a7dc16|            }
321|3070d1|            
322|75cc8b|            // Parse arguments
323|e2ffa7|            let args: [Any] = parseWASMArgs(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmArgs)
324|3070d1|            
325|118fae|            // Execute the function
326|a53fb5|            executionOutput += "\n🚀 Executing function '\(currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction)'...\n"
327|d5b437|            let result = try await runner.execute(
328|fd93ff|                function: currentConfig.languageOptions.wasmFunction,
329|382dc0|                args: args
330|43d041|            )
331|3070d1|            
332|0b5e62|            let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
333|dc3c53|            executionOutput += "\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
334|85e7ec|            executionOutput += "📤 Result: \(result)\n"
335|a720fd|            executionOutput += "⏱️ Duration: \(String(format: "%.3f", duration))s\n"
336|97c33a|            executionOutput += "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
337|3070d1|            
338|6973db|            // Clean up
339|061a0b|            await runner.unload()
340|3070d1|            
341|cae8a1|        } catch let error as WASMError {
342|3ca9bb|            executionOutput += "\n❌ WASM Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
343|e75a26|            alertMessage = error.localizedDescription
344|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
345|853889|        } catch {
346|011f38|            executionOutput += "\n❌ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)\n"
347|09e90f|            alertMessage = "WASM execution error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
348|e558d8|            showSaveAlert = true
349|5f3077|        }
350|d6ed84|        
351|7b828d|        isExecuting = false
352|27e597|    }
353|b4687f|    
354|1ba8a7|    /// Parse WASM arguments from string (comma-separated, supports integers and floats)
355|8e8ea2|    private func parseWASMArgs(_ argsString: String) -> [Any] {
356|cffb48|        guard !argsString.isEmpty else { return [] }
357|d6ed84|        
358|919440|        return argsString.split(separator: ",").compactMap { arg -> Any? in
359|5b2e21|            let trimmed = arg.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
360|97b32d|            if let intVal = Int(trimmed) {
361|65cd77|                return intVal
362|63c384|            } else if let doubleVal = Double(trimmed) {
363|0f5bfd|                return doubleVal
364|a7dc16|            }
365|868c3a|            return trimmed
366|5f3077|        }
367|27e597|    }

372|4d127c|        currentConfig.updatedAt = Date()
373|27e597|    }
374|b4687f|    
375|13bcc2|    func buildCommandString(filePath: String?) -> String {
376|eaee3d|        var parts: [String] = []
377|d6ed84|        
378|d9063a|        // Language-specific prefix
379|012d46|        switch currentConfig.languageOptions.language {
380|9fa55d|        case .python:
381|2d2edd|            var pythonArgs: [String] = []
382|26860a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonUnbuffered {
383|c5cc9c|                pythonArgs.append("-u")
384|a7dc16|            }
385|e4a684|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonOptimize {
386|e088fc|                pythonArgs.append("-O")
387|a7dc16|            }
388|8d1a6a|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.pythonModuleMode {
389|b7f8c4|                pythonArgs.append("-m")
390|a7dc16|            }
391|907ae0|            parts.append("python \(pythonArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
392|3070d1|            
393|c4c850|        case .node:
394|20bc1e|            var nodeArgs: [String] = []
395|37aab8|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspect {
396|e6cdf1|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect")
397|a7dc16|            }
398|c45acc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeInspectBrk {
399|b9a7b6|                nodeArgs.append("--inspect-brk")
400|a7dc16|            }
401|672c36|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeExperimentalModules {
402|4f8496|                nodeArgs.append("--experimental-modules")
403|a7dc16|            }
404|6536bc|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.nodeNoWarnings {
405|4efe63|                nodeArgs.append("--no-warnings")
406|a7dc16|            }
407|0b4b76|            parts.append("node \(nodeArgs.joined(separator: " "))".trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces))
408|3070d1|            
409|7df5c6|        case .go:
410|4b7f98|            var goArgs: [String] = ["run"]
411|24ac13|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.goRaceDetector {
412|4fcd0f|                goArgs.append("-race")
413|a7dc16|            }
414|5d1fd2|            parts.append("go \(goArgs.joined(separator: " "))")
415|3070d1|            
416|66ab30|        case .rust:
417|e5b50f|            var cargoArgs: [String] = ["run"]
418|4d6db7|            if currentConfig.languageOptions.rustRelease {
419|90aeeb|                cargoArgs.append("--release")
420|a7dc16|            }

135|b4687f|    
136|50903b|    // Binary file extensions to exclude
137|f1d796|    private let binaryExtensions = [".jpg", ".jpeg", ".png", ".gif", ".bmp", ".ico", ".pdf", ".zip", ".tar", ".gz", ".mp3", ".mp4", ".avi", ".mov", ".exe", ".dll", ".so", ".dylib", ".app", ".ipa", ".ipa", ".dmg", ".pkg", ".deb", ".rpm", ".img", ".iso", ".bin", ".dat", ".db", ".sqlite", ".sqlite3", ".ttf", ".otf", ".woff", ".woff2", ".eot"]

147|f96259|    /// Returns the filtered, sorted, and limited results
148|f32b09|    var processedResults: [FileSearchResult] {
149|1a5bc0|        var filtered = rawResults

151|0a214d|        // 1. Filter by binary files
152|99c850|        if excludeBinaryFiles {
153|9b3c53|            filtered = filtered.filter { result in
154|74a475|                let ext = (result.fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
155|979d9d|                return !binaryExtensions.contains(where: { $0.lowercased().hasSuffix(ext) })
156|a7dc16|            }
157|5f3077|        }
158|d6ed84|        
159|23706c|        // 2. Filter by selected extensions
160|8f0448|        if !selectedExtensions.isEmpty {
161|9b3c53|            filtered = filtered.filter { result in
162|74a475|                let ext = (result.fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
163|db0fb9|                return selectedExtensions.contains { $0.lowercased().dropFirst() == ext }
164|a7dc16|            }
165|5f3077|        }
166|d6ed84|        
167|e35546|        // 3. Sort results
168|b5c3d5|        filtered = filtered.sorted { lhs, rhs in
169|cc07ab|            switch sortOption {
170|2eb58c|            case .fileName:

745|e5a893|    // MARK: - Lifecycle
746|b4687f|    
747|413a48|    private func setupDebouncedSearch() {
748|ba1ced|        // Note: Debounced search is handled via onChange modifier and debouncedSearch() function
749|27e597|    }
750|b4687f|    
751|101550|    // MARK: - Debounced Search
752|b4687f|    
753|6320bf|    private func debouncedSearch(immediate: Bool = false) {
754|5ed5cb|        debounceCancellable?.cancel()
755|d6ed84|        
756|26b670|        if immediate {
757|47ed6c|            performDebouncedSearch(query: searchText)
758|b31999|        } else {
759|dcccb0|            setupDebouncedSearch()
760|5f3077|        }
761|27e597|    }
762|b4687f|    
763|1d3cf0|    private func performDebouncedSearch(query: String) {
764|798fdb|        searchTask?.cancel()
765|d6ed84|        
766|e78100|        guard query.count >= 2 else { return }
767|d6ed84|        
768|86191b|        let options = SearchManager.SearchOptions(
769|212967|            isCaseSensitive: matchCase,
770|d0fada|            isWholeWord: matchWholeWord,
771|31ed2c|            isRegex: useRegex
772|3143a4|        )
773|d6ed84|        
774|bed986|        let includeGlobs = filesToInclude
775|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
776|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
777|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
778|d6ed84|        
779|ce8d1a|        let excludeGlobs = filesToExclude
780|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
781|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
782|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
783|d6ed84|        
784|78ed4e|        let searchQuery = SearchManager.SearchQuery(
785|5f3d5e|            text: query,
786|62f7ee|            options: options,
787|ca52d5|            includeGlobs: includeGlobs,
788|f1536d|            excludeGlobs: excludeGlobs
789|3143a4|        )
790|d6ed84|        
791|6b2788|        searchTask = Task { [weak searchManager] in
792|597ee6|            guard let manager = searchManager else { return }
793|08ebed|            guard !Task.isCancelled else { return }
794|2e2a14|            manager.search(in: rootURL, query: searchQuery)
795|5f3077|        }
796|27e597|    }

808|05dba2|    private func performSearch() {
809|cc6ca2|        debouncedSearch(immediate: true)
810|27e597|    }
811|b4687f|    
812|eb174a|    private func performReplace() {
813|a606b5|        guard !searchText.isEmpty && !replaceText.isEmpty else { return }
814|d6ed84|        
815|86191b|        let options = SearchManager.SearchOptions(
816|212967|            isCaseSensitive: matchCase,
817|d0fada|            isWholeWord: matchWholeWord,
818|31ed2c|            isRegex: useRegex
819|3143a4|        )
820|d6ed84|        
821|bed986|        let includeGlobs = filesToInclude
822|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
823|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
824|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
825|d6ed84|        
826|ce8d1a|        let excludeGlobs = filesToExclude
827|646476|            .split(separator: ",")
828|6c985e|            .map { $0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) }
829|c71ead|            .filter { !$0.isEmpty }
830|d6ed84|        
831|87daa1|        let query = SearchManager.SearchQuery(
832|29db41|            text: searchText,
833|62f7ee|            options: options,
834|ca52d5|            includeGlobs: includeGlobs,
835|f1536d|            excludeGlobs: excludeGlobs
836|3143a4|        )
837|d6ed84|        
838|0f1953|        Task {
839|71cc09|            do {
840|c52263|                let result = try await searchManager.replace(in: rootURL, query: query, replacement: replaceText)
841|71387f|                print("Replace completed: \(result.replacements) replacements in \(result.filesTouched) files")
842|91b9a2|            } catch {
843|e1dc9b|                print("Replace failed: \(error.localizedDescription)")
844|a7dc16|            }
845|5f3077|        }
846|27e597|    }
847|b4687f|    
848|e51120|    private func onAppear() {
849|e87b15|        setupDebouncedSearch()
850|27e597|    }
851|b4687f|    
852|f3013f|    private func onDisappear() {
853|5ed5cb|        debounceCancellable?.cancel()
854|798fdb|        searchTask?.cancel()
855|27e597|    }

857|198b7e|    // Convert SearchManager results to view model
858|55f41c|    private var convertedResults: [FileSearchResult] {
859|c61d86|        searchManager.results.map { fileMatch in
860|cc8682|            let fileName = URL(fileURLWithPath: fileMatch.filePath).lastPathComponent
861|77c8a3|            let matches = fileMatch.matches.map { match in
862|579a9f|                SearchResultLine(
863|d54ce0|                    lineNumber: match.location.line,
864|7b3773|                    text: match.preview,
865|d070d1|                    matches: []
866|6f642e|                )
867|a7dc16|            }
868|6bb23c|            return FileSearchResult(
869|6b113d|                fileName: fileName,
870|0add96|                path: fileMatch.filePath,
871|f12fc3|                matches: matches,
872|e7c6af|                isExpanded: true
873|43d041|            )
874|5f3077|        }
875|27e597|    }
876|b4687f|    
877|44b993|    private var rawResults: [FileSearchResult] {
878|e135b0|        convertedResults
879|27e597|    }

931|8271a8|        .onReceive(NotificationCenter.default.publisher(for: .expandAllSearchResults)) { _ in

936|ab06c2|    @ViewBuilder

956|b8ae15|        currentPath = path
957|34e57c|        pathHistory.append(path)

959|b4687f|    
960|2ce246|    private func goBack() {
961|8c663c|        guard pathHistory.count > 1 else { return }

964|27e597|    }

234|a9cccc|struct ResizeHandle: View {
235|c243e0|    @Binding var width: CGFloat
236|9d7b13|    @State private var isDragging = false
237|b4687f|    
238|504e43|    var body: some View {
239|250bf4|        HStack(spacing: 0) {
240|1e6289|            Spacer()
241|d6f3f4|            ZStack {
242|5c3e5e|                // Invisible larger hit area
243|ff13e9|                Rectangle()
244|f76328|                    .fill(Color.clear)
245|badb74|                    .frame(width: 10)
246|216278|                
247|2b16f6|                // Visible separator line
248|ff13e9|                Rectangle()
249|ea08df|                    .fill(isDragging ? Color.accentColor : Color(UIColor.separator))
250|70d177|                    .frame(width: 1)
251|a7dc16|            }
252|68d57d|            .contentShape(Rectangle())
253|55f9fc|            .gesture(
254|a6de91|                DragGesture()
255|19c0f6|                    .onChanged { value in
256|2c66bc|                        isDragging = true
257|89909c|                        let newWidth = width + value.translation.width
258|379d17|                        // Clamp width (Min 170, Max 600)
259|ba6621|                        if newWidth >= 170 && newWidth <= 600 {
260|e83ad8|                            width = newWidth
261|392b35|                        }
262|c9717a|                    }
263|2eb32e|                    .onEnded { _ in
264|41e900|                        isDragging = false
265|c9717a|                    }
266|43d041|            )
267|5f3077|        }
268|27e597|    }

1|d755ba|import SwiftUI
2|9ed0a9|import UIKit
3|adc83b|
4|8625a3|/// Renders inline ghost text suggestions with fade animations and multi-line support.
5|63c993|///
6|9961f5|/// This view displays AI-generated code suggestions as semi-transparent gray text
7|659a92|/// positioned at the cursor location. Users can accept suggestions with the Tab key.
8|63c993|///
9|047800|/// Features:
10|6ab1d5|/// - Ghost text overlay with proper positioning based on cursor location
11|aa10a5|/// - Multi-line suggestion support with line breaks
12|47ca9a|/// - Fade in/out animations for smooth appearance/disappearance
13|9ecb02|/// - "Tab to accept" indicator
14|eecd24|/// - Integration with InlineSuggestionManager via @EnvironmentObject
15|eb8869|/// - Proper handling of partial accept state
16|0e9ac4|struct InlineSuggestionView: View {
17|9eb060|    /// The code content being edited (needed for positioning calculations)
18|ecd9df|    let code: String
19|b4687f|    
20|fee5f6|    /// Language for syntax context (affects styling)
21|a420bb|    let language: CodeLanguage
22|b4687f|    
23|b94da3|    /// Current scroll position (line index) of the editor
24|7d4a7e|    let scrollPosition: Int
25|b4687f|    
26|b1806f|    /// Height of each line in the editor
27|96ac71|    let lineHeight: CGFloat
28|b4687f|    
29|bad761|    /// Font size used in the editor
30|82ae06|    let fontSize: CGFloat
31|b4687f|    
32|ab37f6|    /// Width reserved for the gutter (line numbers)
33|3e269f|    var gutterWidth: CGFloat = 60
34|b4687f|    
35|05b53b|    /// Insets used by the underlying UITextView
36|a34599|    var textInsets: UIEdgeInsets = UIEdgeInsets(top: 8, left: 8, bottom: 8, right: 8)
37|b4687f|    
38|4e2f94|    /// Width reserved at the right edge (e.g. minimap)
39|3d8943|    var rightReservedWidth: CGFloat = 0
40|b4687f|    
41|32ad9b|    /// How many spaces a tab visually represents
42|c77e62|    var tabSize: Int = 4
43|b4687f|    
44|b90d71|    /// Animation duration for fade in/out
45|d225e9|    var animationDuration: Double = 0.15
46|b4687f|    
47|d37954|    /// The manager that provides suggestion state
48|c8b408|    @EnvironmentObject var suggestionManager: InlineSuggestionManager
49|b4687f|    
50|a37850|    /// Controls the visibility animation state
51|b15786|    @State private var isVisible: Bool = false
52|b4687f|    
53|8a129e|    /// The ghost text to display (filtered to show only unaccepted portion)
54|a9e4ad|    private var ghostText: String {
55|ff8344|        suggestionManager.ghostText
56|27e597|    }
57|b4687f|    
58|d8da6f|    /// Whether there is an active suggestion to display
59|8a8fef|    private var hasSuggestion: Bool {
60|e0d48c|        !ghostText.isEmpty
61|27e597|    }
62|b4687f|    
63|a98738|    /// The cursor position for rendering
64|e5936e|    private var cursorPosition: InlineSuggestionManager.CursorPosition {
65|236633|        suggestionManager.cursorPosition
66|27e597|    }
67|b4687f|    
68|504e43|    var body: some View {
69|151fd5|        GeometryReader { geo in
70|8fd116|            ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
71|528b3f|                if isVisible && hasSuggestion {
72|10063f|                    suggestionContent(geometry: geo)
73|4e2d32|                }
74|a7dc16|            }
75|71aef5|            .frame(
76|e2cf1d|                width: max(0, geo.size.width - rightReservedWidth),
77|1b3c9d|                height: geo.size.height,
78|eab5e5|                alignment: .topLeading
79|43d041|            )
80|f9ebd1|            .clipped()
81|5f3077|        }
82|3fbfd2|        .allowsHitTesting(false)
83|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
84|cb50e4|            updateVisibility()
85|5f3077|        }
86|457c1c|        .onChange(of: ghostText) { _ in
87|cb50e4|            updateVisibility()
88|5f3077|        }
89|4fba4f|        .onChange(of: suggestionManager.currentSuggestion) { _ in
90|cb50e4|            updateVisibility()
91|5f3077|        }
92|27e597|    }
93|b4687f|    
94|85919d|    /// Renders the suggestion content with positioning and styling
95|c26dee|    private func suggestionContent(geometry geo: GeometryProxy) -> some View {
96|ed920c|        let font = UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: fontSize, weight: .regular)
97|43ebbd|        let charWidth = (" " as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
98|59feda|        let fontLineHeight = font.lineHeight
99|ea096d|        let baselineAdjustment = max(0, (lineHeight - fontLineHeight) / 2)
100|d6ed84|        
101|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
102|d6ed84|        
103|80b58a|        // Calculate the starting position
104|6934f5|        let startX: CGFloat
105|e9ff05|        let startY: CGFloat
106|d6ed84|        
107|b5802a|        // Get the current line text up to cursor position
108|730f7f|        let currentLineIndex = min(cursorPosition.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
109|35c41a|        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
110|d6ed84|        
111|93ba2b|        // Calculate visual column for current position
112|77a4fb|        let visualColumn = visualColumn(in: currentLine, utf16Column: cursorPosition.column, tabSize: tabSize)
113|d6ed84|        
114|4983a9|        // Calculate starting X position (gutter + insets + character offset)
115|d1c5d0|        startX = gutterWidth + textInsets.left + (CGFloat(visualColumn) * charWidth)
116|d6ed84|        
117|7897cf|        // Calculate starting Y position (adjusted for scroll)
118|0814d0|        let visibleLineIndex = currentLineIndex - scrollPosition
119|f19a68|        startY = textInsets.top + baselineAdjustment + (CGFloat(visibleLineIndex) * lineHeight)
120|d6ed84|        
121|350fae|        // Split ghost text into lines
122|4772c4|        let ghostLines = ghostText.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
123|d6ed84|        
124|a785f0|        return ZStack(alignment: .topLeading) {
125|ae9297|            // Render each line of the suggestion
126|8e84ef|            ForEach(Array(ghostLines.enumerated()), id: \.offset) { index, line in
127|88574d|                // For multi-line suggestions, only the first line starts at cursor X
128|cb3269|                // Subsequent lines start from the left margin
129|fe243b|                let xOffset: CGFloat = index == 0 ? startX : gutterWidth + textInsets.left
130|dfc569|                let yOffset: CGFloat = startY + (CGFloat(index) * lineHeight)
131|216278|                
132|82e751|                // For lines after the first, include a visual indicator that it's a continuation
133|5d3e01|                let displayText = line
134|216278|                
135|07bf08|                Text(displayText)
136|79caf1|                    .font(.system(size: fontSize, design: .monospaced))
137|2d7e53|                    .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.6))
138|fadc71|                    .offset(x: xOffset, y: yOffset)
139|97a348|                    .lineLimit(1)
140|b95b7a|                    .fixedSize(horizontal: true, vertical: false)
141|a7dc16|            }
142|3070d1|            
143|fc71cc|            // Tab to accept indicator
144|5d10de|            tabIndicatorView(
145|a65881|                startX: startX,
146|63dc7c|                startY: startY,
147|2eda94|                ghostLines: ghostLines,
148|5aff54|                charWidth: charWidth,
149|2baa3b|                font: font
150|43d041|            )
151|5f3077|        }
152|42bd11|        .transition(
153|707be8|            .asymmetric(
154|0f8270|                insertion: .opacity.animation(.easeIn(duration: animationDuration)),
155|c2f996|                removal: .opacity.animation(.easeOut(duration: animationDuration))
156|43d041|            )
157|3143a4|        )
158|27e597|    }
159|b4687f|    
160|639f13|    /// Renders the "Tab to accept" indicator
161|ab8496|    private func tabIndicatorView(
162|53e652|        startX: CGFloat,
163|e0c064|        startY: CGFloat,
164|ff4216|        ghostLines: [String],
165|c15f5d|        charWidth: CGFloat,
166|8a49b8|        font: UIFont
167|0df0fe|    ) -> some View {
168|1da678|        // Calculate indicator position (below the suggestion or at the end of single line)
169|00151c|        let indicatorY: CGFloat
170|4a35f6|        let indicatorX: CGFloat
171|d6ed84|        
172|dfe58b|        if ghostLines.count > 1 {
173|75b141|            // For multi-line, show indicator at the end of last line
174|b4dd1a|            let lastLine = ghostLines.last ?? ""
175|027c9f|            let lastLineWidth = (lastLine as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
176|5724eb|            indicatorX = startX + lastLineWidth
177|d0348b|            indicatorY = startY + (CGFloat(ghostLines.count - 1) * lineHeight)
178|b31999|        } else {
179|13a025|            // For single line, show indicator at the end of the text
180|fc6f06|            let lineWidth = (ghostText as NSString).size(withAttributes: [.font: font]).width
181|a4c799|            indicatorX = startX + lineWidth + 8 // Small gap after text
182|f294cf|            indicatorY = startY
183|5f3077|        }
184|d6ed84|        
185|3c25cc|        return HStack(spacing: 4) {
186|0977b8|            Image(systemName: "arrow.right.to.line")
187|c37787|                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7))
188|3070d1|            
189|88d9d1|            Text("Tab")
190|105baa|                .font(.system(size: fontSize * 0.7, weight: .medium))
191|5f3077|        }
192|a358b9|        .foregroundColor(Color.gray.opacity(0.5))
193|7e0317|        .padding(.horizontal, 4)
194|44474c|        .padding(.vertical, 2)
195|413d6d|        .background(
196|ec701b|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 3)
197|d1a6ab|                .fill(Color.gray.opacity(0.1))
198|3143a4|        )
199|ac6737|        .offset(x: indicatorX, y: indicatorY + (lineHeight - font.lineHeight) / 2)
200|5ec87d|        .opacity(0.7)
201|27e597|    }
202|b4687f|    
203|5275c0|    /// Updates the visibility state with animation
204|7703e0|    private func updateVisibility() {
205|b4acfd|        let shouldBeVisible = hasSuggestion && isCursorVisible()
206|d6ed84|        
207|78528f|        if shouldBeVisible != isVisible {
208|c78858|            withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: animationDuration)) {
209|42f9b7|                isVisible = shouldBeVisible
210|a7dc16|            }
211|5f3077|        }
212|27e597|    }
213|b4687f|    
214|547c79|    /// Checks if the cursor is currently visible in the viewport
215|5ce962|    private func isCursorVisible() -> Bool {
216|af7315|        let cursorLine = cursorPosition.line
217|b81434|        // Allow some margin for visibility (show if within viewport ± a few lines)
218|e9f34d|        let visibleRange = scrollPosition...(scrollPosition + 50) // Assuming ~50 visible lines
219|8fb6a3|        return visibleRange.contains(cursorLine)
220|27e597|    }
221|b4687f|    
222|76299b|    /// Calculates the visual column position accounting for tabs
223|211bd1|    private func visualColumn(in line: String, utf16Column: Int, tabSize: Int) -> Int {
224|397197|        let ns = line as NSString
225|0e6566|        let clamped = max(0, min(utf16Column, ns.length))
226|0b70a2|        let prefix = ns.substring(with: NSRange(location: 0, length: clamped))
227|d6ed84|        
228|a43b73|        var col = 0
229|955e8b|        for ch in prefix {
230|a3b6fb|            if ch == "\t" {
231|08173b|                col += tabSize
232|f5a6eb|            } else {
233|52486d|                col += 1
234|a7dc16|            }
235|5f3077|        }
236|a6794f|        return col
237|27e597|    }
238|b31277|}

45|392b35|                        }

61|392b35|                        }
62|c9717a|                    }

65|1ec0a9|                .onChange(of: aiManager.currentSession.messages.count) { _ in
66|66288d|                    withAnimation {

68|157a06|                            proxy.scrollTo(lastId, anchor: .bottom)
69|392b35|                        }
70|c9717a|                    }

72|a7dc16|            }

88|529375|        .sheet(isPresented: $showSettings) {

98|b4687f|    
99|592e73|    private func sendMessage() {
100|29cfe7|        guard !userInput.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty else { return }
101|23281a|        let message = userInput
102|2c52ee|        userInput = ""
103|d6ed84|        
104|cca69c|        // Get current file context if available
105|c4379f|        let context = editorCore.activeTab?.content
106|d6ed84|        
107|0f1953|        Task {
108|764bf9|            await aiManager.sendMessage(message, context: context)
109|5f3077|        }
110|27e597|    }
111|b4687f|    
112|11d95d|    private func insertCode(_ code: String) {
113|022f18|        if let index = editorCore.activeTabIndex {
114|bb18b1|            // Insert at cursor position
115|310945|            let content = editorCore.tabs[index].content
116|8653a9|            let lines = content.components(separatedBy: "\n")
117|70652b|            let cursorLine = min(editorCore.cursorPosition.line, lines.count)
118|3070d1|            
119|2c5f9b|            // Build new content with code inserted at cursor line
120|b19b63|            var newLines = lines
121|58288c|            let insertionCode = "\n" + code + "\n"
122|035c3c|            if cursorLine < newLines.count {
123|29fc27|                newLines.insert(insertionCode, at: cursorLine + 1)
124|f5a6eb|            } else {
125|496eb5|                newLines.append(insertionCode)
126|a7dc16|            }
127|0d015f|            editorCore.tabs[index].content = newLines.joined(separator: "\n")
128|3070d1|            
129|557acf|            // Post notification for visual feedback
130|3a4e78|            NotificationCenter.default.post(name: NSNotification.Name("CodeInserted"), object: nil, userInfo: ["code": code])
131|777659|            print("[AI] Inserted \(code.count) chars at line \(cursorLine)")
132|b31999|        } else {
133|71c9d8|            // No active tab - create a new one with the code
134|aaee7b|            let ext = detectExtension(from: code)
135|eaa819|            editorCore.addTab(fileName: "Generated.\(ext)", content: code)
136|5f3077|        }
137|27e597|    }
138|b4687f|    
139|06f09b|    private func detectExtension(from code: String) -> String {
140|e5bac6|        let trimmed = code.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).lowercased()
141|eceec2|        if trimmed.contains("import swift") || trimmed.contains("func ") || trimmed.contains("struct ") || trimmed.contains("class ") { return "swift" }
142|a5b0b3|        if trimmed.contains("function ") || trimmed.contains("const ") || trimmed.contains("let ") || trimmed.contains("=>") { return "js" }
143|3f1d4c|        if trimmed.contains("def ") || trimmed.contains("import ") || trimmed.contains("print(") { return "py" }
144|cab224|        if trimmed.contains("<html") || trimmed.contains("<div") { return "html" }
145|53ac85|        if trimmed.contains("#include") { return "c" }
146|e8305f|        return "swift"
147|27e597|    }
148|b31277|}

228|6f642e|                )
