233|8237e3|                    .font(.caption)

236|216278|

239|a7dc16|            }

247|32fe2d|// MARK: - Message Content View
248|adc83b|
249|c7402c|struct MessageContentView: View {
250|02a6c7|    let content: String
251|eb2702|    let codeBlocks: [CodeBlock]
252|e711c8|    let onInsertCode: (String) -> Void
253|b4687f|    
254|504e43|    var body: some View {
255|98d0f7|        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 8) {
256|935108|            // Parse and render content
257|96f10b|            let parts = parseContent(content)
258|3070d1|            
259|889a5c|            ForEach(parts.indices, id: \.self) { index in
260|9d488d|                let part = parts[index]
261|d3aba4|                if part.isCode {
262|451f99|                    CodeBlockView(language: part.language, code: part.content, onInsert: onInsertCode)
263|fdd0e2|                } else {
264|5f04cb|                    Text(part.content)
265|e4008e|                        .font(.system(size: 14))
266|790e50|                        .textSelection(.enabled)
267|4e2d32|                }
268|a7dc16|            }
269|5f3077|        }
270|27e597|    }
271|b4687f|    
272|8c1cce|    private func parseContent(_ text: String) -> [ContentPart] {
273|915e2d|        var parts: [ContentPart] = []
274|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
275|d6ed84|        
276|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
277|5221ad|            return [ContentPart(content: text, isCode: false, language: "")]
278|5f3077|        }
279|d6ed84|        
280|8c163f|        var lastEnd = text.startIndex
281|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
282|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
283|d6ed84|        
284|847e6d|        for match in matches {
285|bc58ec|            // Add text before code block
286|fc75b8|            if let beforeRange = Range(NSRange(location: NSRange(lastEnd..., in: text).location, length: match.range.location - NSRange(lastEnd..., in: text).location), in: text) {
287|b19128|                let beforeText = String(text[beforeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
288|be85a5|                if !beforeText.isEmpty {
289|10b8c8|                    parts.append(ContentPart(content: beforeText, isCode: false, language: ""))
290|4e2d32|                }
291|a7dc16|            }
292|3070d1|            
293|c01bf7|            // Add code block
294|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
295|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
296|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
297|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
298|366bd2|                parts.append(ContentPart(content: code, isCode: true, language: language))
299|a7dc16|            }
300|3070d1|            
301|07e513|            if let matchRange = Range(match.range, in: text) {
302|79e022|                lastEnd = matchRange.upperBound
303|a7dc16|            }
304|5f3077|        }
305|d6ed84|        
306|ee8011|        // Add remaining text
307|95c6e9|        let remainingText = String(text[lastEnd...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
308|c13d2a|        if !remainingText.isEmpty {
309|0dfb10|            parts.append(ContentPart(content: remainingText, isCode: false, language: ""))
310|5f3077|        }
311|d6ed84|        
312|eeb7c4|        if parts.isEmpty {
313|3f5d79|            parts.append(ContentPart(content: text, isCode: false, language: ""))
314|5f3077|        }
315|d6ed84|        
316|59530e|        return parts
317|27e597|    }
318|b31277|}
319|adc83b|
320|df36b9|struct ContentPart {
321|02a6c7|    let content: String
322|aba289|    let isCode: Bool
323|6c4306|    let language: String
324|b31277|}

392|b4747d|struct QuickActionsBar: View {

394|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
395|b4687f|    
396|504e43|    var body: some View {

402|c9717a|                    }
403|4e2d32|                }
404|216278|

406|895fad|                    performAction { code, lang in
407|72c825|                        await aiManager.fixCode(code, language: lang)
408|c9717a|                    }
409|4e2d32|                }
410|216278|

412|895fad|                    performAction { code, lang in
413|d56c46|                        await aiManager.generateTests(code, language: lang)
414|c9717a|                    }
415|4e2d32|                }
416|216278|                
417|318b8f|                QuickActionButton(icon: "arrow.triangle.2.circlepath", title: "Refactor") {
418|895fad|                    performAction { code, lang in
419|e3c1ef|                        await aiManager.refactorCode(code, language: lang, instruction: "Improve code quality and readability")
420|c9717a|                    }
421|4e2d32|                }
422|216278|                
423|2260be|                QuickActionButton(icon: "doc.plaintext", title: "Document") {
424|895fad|                    performAction { code, lang in
425|2fce2f|                        await aiManager.documentCode(code, language: lang)
426|c9717a|                    }
427|4e2d32|                }
428|a7dc16|            }
429|e6d942|            .padding(.horizontal)
430|5b6fc5|            .padding(.vertical, 8)
431|5f3077|        }
432|185ec4|        .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground))
433|27e597|    }
434|b4687f|    
435|ae4fbc|    private func performAction(action: @escaping (String, String) async -> String) {
436|b09696|        guard let tab = editorCore.activeTab else { return }
437|adc83b|
438|c7b81e|        // FEAT-111/112: Use selected code when available; otherwise fall back to whole file.
439|574b77|        let code: String
440|2120fe|        if let range = editorCore.currentSelectionRange,
441|afc9ac|           range.length > 0,
442|00361d|           !editorCore.currentSelection.isEmpty {
443|83ed39|            code = editorCore.currentSelection
444|b31999|        } else {
445|c045c2|            code = tab.content
446|5f3077|        }
447|adc83b|
448|2f7b62|        let language = tab.language.displayName
449|d6ed84|        
450|0f1953|        Task {
451|cce2a9|            let response = await action(code, language)
452|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
453|9e0d7b|                let message = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response)
454|eda2ab|                aiManager.currentSession.messages.append(message)
455|a7dc16|            }
456|5f3077|        }
457|27e597|    }
458|b31277|}

507|a7dc16|            }

512|27e597|    }

517|a3d033|struct AISettingsView: View {

519|08e45e|    @Environment(\.dismiss) private var dismiss
520|b4687f|

526|0abd30|                    Picker("Provider", selection: Binding(

6|721814|/// Represents a single change in a file's history (Git commit, local save, etc.).
7|6778fe|struct TimelineEntry: Identifiable, Hashable {
8|1a0762|    enum Source: String, CaseIterable, Hashable {
9|a80273|        case git = "Git"
10|81cedd|        case local = "Local"
11|adc83b|
12|ab8bfa|        var label: String { rawValue }
13|adc83b|
14|f2a495|        var systemImage: String {
15|20c960|            switch self {
16|1b169d|            case .git: return "arrow.triangle.branch"
17|a05b36|            case .local: return "internaldrive"
18|a7dc16|            }
19|5f3077|        }
20|adc83b|
21|5074c9|        var tint: Color {
22|20c960|            switch self {
23|e50f67|            case .git: return .blue
24|e6ec82|            case .local: return .orange
25|a7dc16|            }
26|5f3077|        }
27|27e597|    }
28|adc83b|
29|fabef2|    struct DiffSummary: Hashable {
30|970879|        var added: Int
31|297f61|        var deleted: Int
32|adc83b|
33|030e79|        var isEmpty: Bool { added == 0 && deleted == 0 }
34|adc83b|
35|b5b5f3|        var text: String {
36|2ffdb5|            // VS Code-ish compact summary: +12 −4
37|ad4367|            let plus = added > 0 ? "+\(added)" : nil
38|d4b350|            let minus = deleted > 0 ? "−\(deleted)" : nil
39|511889|            return [plus, minus].compactMap { $0 }.joined(separator: " ")
40|5f3077|        }
41|27e597|    }
42|adc83b|
43|91b0e8|    let id: UUID
44|63989f|    let timestamp: Date
45|b8f784|    let source: Source
46|65ef89|    /// "Author" for git; "Device/User" for local saves.
47|ab0604|    let author: String
48|3f0501|    /// Short change description (commit message, save reason, etc.)
49|edcb08|    let message: String
50|2f3a0d|    /// Optional diff summary if available.
51|70b563|    let diff: DiffSummary?
52|adc83b|
53|62e028|    init(
54|c65c52|        id: UUID = UUID(),
55|8651fc|        timestamp: Date,
56|de8973|        source: Source,
57|514cd7|        author: String,
58|bade9a|        message: String,
59|218dd8|        diff: DiffSummary? = nil
60|981e04|    ) {
61|51d091|        self.id = id
62|18b220|        self.timestamp = timestamp
63|573930|        self.source = source
64|49f336|        self.author = author

66|d98dff|        self.diff = diff
67|27e597|    }

125|69d728|@MainActor
126|08d2b6|final class TimelineViewModel: ObservableObject {
127|8f1de5|    enum SourceFilter: String, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
128|2f89d7|        case all = "All"
129|a80273|        case git = "Git"
130|81cedd|        case local = "Local"
131|adc83b|
132|521b30|        var id: String { rawValue }
133|adc83b|
134|9a85b9|        func includes(_ source: TimelineEntry.Source) -> Bool {
135|20c960|            switch self {
136|ce1839|            case .all: return true
137|6700d9|            case .git: return source == .git
138|57f645|            case .local: return source == .local
139|a7dc16|            }
140|5f3077|        }
141|27e597|    }
142|adc83b|
143|951f3f|    @Published var filter: SourceFilter = .all
144|e1acdf|    @Published private(set) var entries: [TimelineEntry] = []
145|5142d0|    @Published private(set) var isLoading: Bool = false
146|adc83b|
147|309459|    private let provider: any TimelineProviding
148|845876|    private let filePath: String?
149|adc83b|
150|f5e468|    init(filePath: String? = nil, provider: any TimelineProviding = MockTimelineProvider()) {
151|56a045|        self.filePath = filePath
152|882e1f|        self.provider = provider
153|27e597|    }
154|adc83b|
155|59d82a|    var filteredEntries: [TimelineEntry] {
156|4c8a25|        entries

158|022f12|            .sorted { $0.timestamp > $1.timestamp }
159|27e597|    }
160|adc83b|
161|b18045|    func load() async {
162|d52924|        isLoading = true
163|9c61fa|        defer { isLoading = false }
164|11df3c|        entries = await provider.timelineEntries(for: filePath)
165|27e597|    }
